name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My opponent has refused to accept the results of our election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4529%2E35263%2EB9ahj1)
Hi Peter — I’m reaching out with an important update on our Senate race. Last week, I was incredibly honored the people of Wisconsin elected me to serve another term in the United States Senate. As you may have noticed, my Republican opponent has refused to accept the results of this election. Instead, he has chosen to spread lies from the darkest corners of the internet to cast doubt in our free and fair elections, and undermine the will of Wisconsin voters. Let me be clear: **Our democracy is about our voters — and they have made their voices heard. Eric Hovde must stop this disgusting attack on our democracy and concede.** We may not know what will happen next, but our team is preparing for all potential scenarios, including the one where Hovde calls for an official recount of Wisconsin’s Senate race. If that happens, our team will roll up our sleeves and get back to work to defend the will of the people from Eric Hovde and his right-wing allies. We’re not there just yet, and I’m hoping my opponent will have a change of heart and stand with the people of Wisconsin, not against them. Our team will keep you posted as we learn more. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign so far. I’m so grateful to have you on this team. More soon, Tammy | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov2024.9Ml3Bd&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241112_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4529%2E35263%2EB9ahj1)
---

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Thank You
body:
Peter, I am incredibly honored and humbled by the trust and support you placed in me throughout this journey. Every single vote, every volunteer effort, and every word of encouragement kept us going strong.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhtil-dytjdljkkt-r/) Peter, I am incredibly honored and humbled by the trust and support you placed in me throughout this journey. Every single vote, every volunteer effort, and every word of encouragement kept us going strong. Together, we've shown the resilience and dedication of Long Islanders who are committed to protecting our values and our way of life. **I want you to know that my commitment to you, to Long Island, and to our country remains unwavering.** Serving this community is my greatest privilege, and this is far from goodbye. I'm just as committed to America's future as ever, and I look forward to continuing to stand with you in the days ahead. **[Taking back #NY04 begins today.](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhtil-dytjdljkkt-y/)** [DONATE NOW ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhtil-dytjdljkkt-j/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhtil-dytjdljkkt-i/) Thank you again for everything.With deepest gratitude,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-cllhtil-dytjdljkkt-d/)

_**JUST RECENTLY ON X**_ , Elon Musk called for Dr.Fauci to be publicly _**PROSECUTED**_ for his handling of the _**COVID-19**_ pandemic.

For _**FOUR YEARS**_ , Joe Biden and the Radical Left took Fauci’s word as _**LAW.**_

body:
What do you most want to see President Trump and our new Republican majority accomplish with these critical four years? | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2c413aeffab245b19ef759a8735eb2b0&_e=vupzShXiVikfGUNOJTNXPHWGIBI8CntvlfC1Fj1rnFT-HoNofYm-inWWHaJx9UZNdCO_XTYa-Yi00Y2buYzBrQsZ12upVsbqwWPcKXEIhK2Vux28OWEVqAjh0969ThhoYxqHTckWBdHxLSt9nDLxkiSJYtr84ouF5-HwrfCSoT1qglwjAOHoHC79_h0pUiDjkGPparmBONZsdudIsiyqBPG3o37BF7azpYPTNtXLsZmI6wjJD3lYeTte6G3oKqAVE-QPr3q1szAp4vq6_JSoFvQOj17y5NXSYUe6g806O-mQ39ZrSuyA1tdY1C-T_fTA-DvppINoHQw-TbdQtoPMSm7BPVW_jQndeiRs60KdTBuTGAjKRYz1CJuRKj01PAUBYzSCOLfCHNDlL1Jooif-qoEtPD8JXYVLRRSGR_NBYQDtsN-xnfsLnijmo-qh4G5l0zNmR7gtX2DKqjLw5Qd0aXpifFMscqgzoMP_2qkaroU%3D)

Fellow American,

Before I say anything else, I want to thank you for all of your vital efforts and generous support, which helped President Trump and our GOP Senate candidates win this election.

We couldn't have done it without your support, Fellow American.

**But now the most important work begins.**

We must govern the country, and I want to make sure President Trump and Senate Republicans know which national security issues are the top priorities of our most active NRSC supporters.

I've compiled a National Security Top Priority Survey to ensure NRSC members have a voice in President Trump's new administration. **[Please complete your National Security Top Priority Survey today to make your voice heard!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2c413aeffab245b19ef759a8735eb2b0&_e=vupzShXiVikfGUNOJTNXPHWGIBI8CntvlfC1Fj1rnFT-HoNofYm-inWWHaJx9UZNdCO_XTYa-Yi00Y2buYzBrQsZ12upVsbqwWPcKXEIhK2Vux28OWEVqAjh0969ThhoYxqHTckWBdHxLSt9nDLxkiSJYtr84ouF5-HwrfCSoT1qglwjAOHoHC79_h0pUiDjkGPparmBONZsdudIsiyqBPG3o37BF7azpYPTNtXLsZmI6wjJD3lYeTte6G3oKqAVE-QPr3q1szAp4vq6_JSoFvQOj17y5NXSYUe6g806O-mQ39ZrSuyA1tdY1C-T_fTA-DvppINoHQw-TbdQtoPMSsUROyRWsaByBEsjkz8QZ6bmSftEyPPa9PPW7XHzoav070uLBWXWBAk0198aDuF4ock8FaZDF0YsjBbk5rDbdfbnHr5e7BFH02-LqCKNk6vjj2-fVSNxcba8B_gMUXcKhv9BTKFYr7ra9P8Ri-1fkDM%3D)**

[ ** COMPLETE THE SURVEY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2c413aeffab245b19ef759a8735eb2b0&_e=vupzShXiVikfGUNOJTNXPHWGIBI8CntvlfC1Fj1rnFT-HoNofYm-inWWHaJx9UZNdCO_XTYa-Yi00Y2buYzBrQsZ12upVsbqwWPcKXEIhK2Vux28OWEVqAjh0969ThhoYxqHTckWBdHxLSt9nDLxkiSJYtr84ouF5-HwrfCSoT1qglwjAOHoHC79_h0pUiDjkGPparmBONZsdudIsiyqBPG3o37BF7azpYPTNtXLsZmI6wjJD3lYeTte6G3oKqAVE-QPr3q1szAp4vq6_JSoFvQOj17y5NXSYUe6g806O-mQ39ZrSuyA1tdY1C-T_fTA-DvppINoHQw-TbdQtoPMSpFUKzg0tF7CmNybISHYf2JpNcWT0TeLjgh7_c-gzt2InLYVRW80_jL-RMzlt8Ig3s5P5as3w1Jmx_WeFDfrVBIDwZNDAJS5pw2YBUsFDkIwK0vk2tY_LjrmbHGxLSftjJSfvshaaNlG4iui1z8ejjI%3D)
**With President Trump, Senate Republicans, and House Republicans ALL securing significant victories, we have a historic opportunity to advance conservative principles and expand the American Dream.**

Most importantly, we can end the failed foreign policy of the Biden-Harris-Obama era that dominated the Biden Administration.

America must maintain global peace through great strength, or China, Russia, terrorist groups, human and drug traffickers, and other bad actors fill the void with great evil.

President Trump's Administration will champion freedom and liberty everywhere and secure the American Dream for our families.

What is the TOP NATIONAL SECURITY PRIORITY for President Trump and our new Republican Congress? **[Please let us know here.>>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2c413aeffab245b19ef759a8735eb2b0&_e=vupzShXiVikfGUNOJTNXPHWGIBI8CntvlfC1Fj1rnFT-HoNofYm-inWWHaJx9UZNdCO_XTYa-Yi00Y2buYzBrQsZ12upVsbqwWPcKXEIhK2Vux28OWEVqAjh0969ThhoYxqHTckWBdHxLSt9nDLxkiSJYtr84ouF5-HwrfCSoT1qglwjAOHoHC79_h0pUiDjkGPparmBONZsdudIsiyqBPG3o37BF7azpYPTNtXLsZmI6wjJD3lYeTte6G3oKqAVE-QPr3q1szAp4vq6_JSoFvQOj17y5NXSYUe6g806O-mQ39ZrSuyA1tdY1C-T_fTA-DvppINoHQw-TbdQtoPMSjVyduceFsPvepPQBGNsPlppcIeXUKHSxU8KWeyIVYv5qwdIoRKFHbEHZ2hLkR7lj8kWxtVUUDNGOXkoukx9GIlF-KlRiU8rCBHwR1oC-qvLSrcwAEX_VdbVxgbYhWsPjxqX6NIAbaR4_3NvDdar9IE%3D)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: URGENT: Help Democrats take back the House!!!
body:
Peter: it’s tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1&amount=25]
Thank you,
Ruben
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-august-2024?refcode=111024_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-august-2024?refcode=111024_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Thank you, Ruben [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: America Has Spoken
body:
In this video, we cover several important topics.

---|---|---
|
# America Has Spoken
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
In this video, we cover several important topics. First, we discuss how President-Elect Donald Trump has surrounded himself with strong and capable women--a promising sign for his administration. We also dive into the Speaker of the House and consider the impact of him facing an opponent--is this a positive or negative development? Join us as we explore these issues! #AmericaFirst

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Now is the time to act
body:
One week since Election Day — we’re getting to work

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE3NjAzNzIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDE5NTA5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Dear Peter,
---
| | I’m reaching out on behalf of all the folks at League of Conservation Voters to let you know, if you are deeply disappointed by the recent election results — we’re with you.
---
| | We are shaken, not because we were caught off guard, but because, this time, we already know how bad things can get people and the planet with Donald Trump in the White House.
---
| | If you’re asking yourself — **what can I do?** — then read on. One of the most important things you can do is to start an annual contribution to LCV today. ANYTHING you can contribute will make a difference as we head into an extremely challenging 2025.
---
| | [**Make an annual gift to LCV today and show your commitment to defending our climate, democracy, and environmental justice from Trump-led attacks. Secure your membership now so we can prepare for the policy battles that we know are coming.**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | On day one, Trump is likely to begin implementing the playbook from Project 2025, which outlines an extreme and sweeping series of anti-environmental provisions, some of which he can immediately put into action.
---
| | These include **eliminating** or privatizing the National Weather Service, massively **expanding** oil and gas drilling and emissions, **gutting** environmental agencies like the EPA, and giving polluters free rein to poison our air and water.
---
| | LCV plans to do EVERYTHING in our power to disrupt that pro-polluter agenda on day one. For over 50 years, we have fought for strong environmental policies in Congress and the federal administration and in states around the country, and we’ll also continue to mobilize in the streets, in the courts, and in corporate suites. **We can’t — and won’t — stop now, but we need more people like you in our corner.**
---
| | **We will never give up the fight for our Earth.** We are recommitting to this work like never before because the sacrifices of those who came before us must be honored, and the futures of those who come after us must be protected.
---
| | [**Doing everything we can to weaken, delay, and stop Trump’s dangerous agenda will be our number one priority. Start an annual recurring gift now to join us in that fight.**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTg2pE4B_)
---
| | Our work in 2025 and beyond is only beginning. We’re steeling ourselves for what comes next, and we need you with us as we mount a collective resistance to defend our freedoms, our communities, our democracy, and our planet in the months and years ahead.
---
| | Thanks for being with us.
---
| | Onward,
---
| | The LCV Membership Team
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11760372&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDE5NTA5NQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDE5NTA5NQS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11760372&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDE5NTA5NQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDE5NTA5NQS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXdm_~)
---
|
* * *
---

name: Mary Peltola
subject: The most important thing to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96997225/511937224/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241112_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3N2Q5MjAtNTZhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BHZ9sc5eMIQwnReL0WG2ZSJPqahV1x2c3_YFInEnWgU=)
---
We’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. **The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over.** Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. **_There is a LOT of counting left to do. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days._** Team Mary is prepared for _any_ and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support. ** **[So please, will you split $10 between the Arizona Democratic Party and I to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands?>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96997226/511937234/1506322297?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241112_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3N2Q5MjAtNTZhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BHZ9sc5eMIQwnReL0WG2ZSJPqahV1x2c3_YFInEnWgU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Arizona Democratic Party and Mary Peltola immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96997227/511937236/1506322297?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241112_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3N2Q5MjAtNTZhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BHZ9sc5eMIQwnReL0WG2ZSJPqahV1x2c3_YFInEnWgU=)

name: Truth to Power
subject: Adam Gray needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39293%2E3422442%2EvaoL_m)
Derek, this is urgent:
We still have an opportunity to flip CA-13 from red to blue.
Adam Gray is running against a Republican incumbent. Right now, he’s down by about 2 percent, but **over 1/3 of ballots cast still haven’t been counted.**
Adam knows what it means to fight for California families. Seeing a shortage of doctors hurt his community in the Central Valley, he worked successfully in the state legislature to invest in a joint medical school at UC Merced and UCSF-Fresno.
**We need to make sure every vote is counted in this important swing seat.** With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans controlling the Senate, every seat Democrats win in the House will help us push back against the GOP’s dangerous agenda.
**[Will you rush a contribution right now to Adam’s campaign and Truth to Power to help us flip CA-13 from red to blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241112-2?refcode=em20241112-39293&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39293_3422442_vaoL_m&akid=39293%2E3422442%2EvaoL_m)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241112-2?refcode=em20241112-39293&refcode2=39293_3422442_vaoL_m&akid=39293%2E3422442%2EvaoL_m)
Donald Trump is already starting to make his cabinet appointments, so we can’t let up.
Thank you so much,
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241112-39293&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39293_3422442_vaoL_m&akid=39293%2E3422442%2EvaoL_m)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39293%2E3422442%2EvaoL_m).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

name: George Whitesides
subject: It’s official. I’ve been elected to Congress in CA-27!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header]
We did it, Peter.

The count from last night’s batch of ballots has solidified our lead, and I’m proud to share with you today that I will be your next representative in California’s 27th District!

It’s the honor of a lifetime to be elected to serve our district in Congress – and deliver for Santa Clarita, the Antelope Valley, and the San Fernando Valley.

Rep. Garcia called me last night to concede the race, and I thanked him for his years of service to our district and the nation.

In Congress, you can count on me to fight to create more good local jobs, lower everyday costs, build safe communities, protect Social Security and Medicare, and protect reproductive freedom.

To my amazing team, I couldn’t be prouder of the hard work and passion you’ve put into this race. And to the thousands of volunteers, supporters, and donors who fueled and launched this campaign – you made this possible.

This is only the beginning, and I’m ready to get to work in Washington and deliver results for our community.

Thank you!

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-footer]

#

# I am running for re-election!
---
|
---
| | **I am running for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates in my new district.** Currently serving as Chairman of the Virginia House Education Committee and member of the House Appropriations and Public Safety Committees,**I am working hard for you** in the General Assembly. I have worked diligently to ensure that the needs of Roanoke's residents are met through innovative legislation and collaborative state initiatives. As your delegate, I have made it my priority to **take care of our schools, protect our environment, and advocate for basic human rights, especially in the wake of indiscriminate killing in Gaza with our tax dollars. ** Now, for my first competitive race in this new district,**I will need your help. **

clean_body: | | | | | | | | I am running for re-election! | | | I am running for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates in my new district. Currently serving as Chairman of the Virginia House Education Committee and member of the House Appropriations and Public Safety Committees,I am working hard for you in the General Assembly. I have worked diligently to ensure that the needs of Roanoke's residents are met through innovative legislation and collaborative state initiatives. As your delegate, I have made it my priority to take care of our schools, protect our environment, and advocate for basic human rights, especially in the wake of indiscriminate killing in Gaza with our tax dollars. Now, for my first competitive race in this new district,I will need your help. Ways You Can Help! | | | mailto:sam@samrasoul.us?subject=Host%20Re-Election%20Event&body= | = | | "Delegate Sam Rasoul is a man of the people. He is always showing up in our community and working hard for Roanoke. He speaks the truth, even in hard times, and is dedicated to his constituents. I am proud to endorse Delegate Rasoul for reelection," stated Brenda L. Hale, (SFC) Retired U. S. Army. In 2025 and beyond, I plan to continue investing in our children’s education, expanding access to mental health care - including fully funding the Catawba transformation project - and continuing his work to reign in Virginia’s state-controlled utility monopolies to lower costs for Virginians.Thank you for the honor of serving you. = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and authorized by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842 Roanoke, VA 24037 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
But let me tell you...

|
---
| | |

name: Derek Tran
subject: Reaching out with an urgent update on our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

| Peter – It’s Derek Tran.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race.

**We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

_The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._

And, Peter, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.

[_**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. clean_body: We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. | Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district. body:
Peter, we’re counting on support from grassroots patriots just like you. The Democrats will think they have this race locked up and have an army of lawyers to drag this out.
We can't give up now.

| |

We left everything on the table.

We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district.

name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=91ffde0bd3b6407d81cafed3bdeffc8d&_e=uRAiC_7CPFfREGZSj-K7be8_XV-bq6Ovbopj9P2w7kfxJJjq1DswDXfC13X6MYNAKJlPZgTrBmeWPkbdPFrtHjikZdwSuRvfCikZ2VuXlJleIEn5WYEc5YFKNxVgwBfa4-UUvIjrLJ3NB19vCxu7C_mEHTFc_NrJHoS9H_V5wlkPzNz4YLsrei-JZjIQIkngSHUysCCUffplm_v8FFUSUU1Hc8xwC4AXFtRC2Do6lneN7Q5J5vIol8lQ4IlLb-NjJG9JRgi0_CJxbKJexlpbUhqiqKXomjbn8oazHrz7AEGjzBCH6J9LKWaRVHM19eKPwJe89RuZgpaOW9aSh9L76w%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It's happening in our courts. And it's even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans' lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=91ffde0bd3b6407d81cafed3bdeffc8d&_e=uRAiC_7CPFfREGZSj-K7be8_XV-bq6Ovbopj9P2w7kfxJJjq1DswDXfC13X6MYNAKJlPZgTrBmeWPkbdPFrtHjikZdwSuRvfCikZ2VuXlJleIEn5WYEc5YFKNxVgwBfa4-UUvIjrLJ3NB19vCxu7C3K9Yr7sqK61NJpTTREt8sfJzoBnuruDifSjnM4TGOsUgdupigJK9Py3bppzBbWHef-jUtV41yAmDrqTTBK9qfdF92-cILJ4DJyLq8EEgV-vpDclQMpqNdPjFaSA2JLktfhnBf-eCL-JQE0AzE92yinTlJkrDzg1nC_inbLrxllbM-uogtU3tN9lbrNSlp4PBw%3D%3D)
The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption -- such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O'Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.

[Please join me in supporting Kash Foundation today. My goal is to help raise $35,000 online in the next 48 hours. Chip in any amount you can generously spare; even $10 goes a long way. Select an amount below to give:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=91ffde0bd3b6407d81cafed3bdeffc8d&_e=uRAiC_7CPFfREGZSj-K7be8_XV-bq6Ovbopj9P2w7kfxJJjq1DswDXfC13X6MYNAKJlPZgTrBmeWPkbdPFrtHjikZdwSuRvfCikZ2VuXlJleIEn5WYEc5YFKNxVgwBfa4-UUvIjrLJ3NB19vCxu7C3K9Yr7sqK61NJpTTREt8sfJuQzvzLi1vCsPbyQNWZDIdvMPLNnGew1IpviHA3IdDXUbJwSSJb9WtjZUvjA3AaExX2j0jbufxDpXqU-fGCdc2oB_15aMXW6hL3bufUW4IMilT38QscPddCu-_wfa5tOFh-JeGvEOQzdZzB7UGsPorkgLE-vpUbqe0fCTc5Z1dg%3D%3D)

body:
Desperate Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are going to do everything they can to take down Republicans.
We need to secure every possible vote

|
---
| | | _Friend, there are**still seats in California that are too close to call!**_

_**Desperate Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are going to do everything they can to take down Republicans.**_

_**[We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0fc9733c276947329f9b4f6c661ff39f&_e=DUVuS-sZW5n6YIv5AcwftyO58mPOBjySnUGng7VpH6wJmRRsM3Y3HhPyriuJXk7hxntJkkc0FFIOsbWp6jZ5iXm-AE1ZYFti-EuXBFvtNHMiNuQmciX3J-u04oz9Idp9eeGhfG-OotILgudxM-YEeHtcnNeX5r84eYi4eQKNlBoo-6ZADtJjmEleZfAqWb7EKbxPIx3dz5TmyIi1RkClEQu-uGPpQu3mwTq-0crL8pgiCP915AOCMcqEJnwyrAnaiOT7yPgpqXKvpLRLEVLNyCRlAH9L4ckUQgwj2SUU-SeSfRmhRosVnWnkybLhEUJzGSefjBdJ4evbTWG2W_bFQs_-jvMSlC-vXi1l5EkdPsMFq4GEmd91hI77BbxR-jGKlRQIQreysI-VXBuex_-SVA%3D%3D "We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation. name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb0bea9811084ec8a6f8cb4ea8e86336&_e=yTN5H9On1QSlM2w9ESmz3SNrJDlmP1b9QjydN1mXmal8yH7d9qWWTBxhSV_AOwYloPOeyq99y31U3muZ-Pe6jLGbywRLJFGE8DG9zH94hSgdDv379OgtzSfZl5sXc4RWRIPOZVDbcZlhCbg_cvTEKTPCQTE5oQm4hXB5ZjxIwvusZGlRH9R5QGhPykEVnidOvrGVqqJ6BhHPUBYqQcKWnQVJoO-fin5d8C56aamBu0adLJlUuSNMRO6Q83SIahjRzIgBWw1yaPY06RWZx5tx_SlvKaW9LiB3tzt2TZOKSh6Z7X2Vr_HgX2ZPMyMfSw8CUOMrrdyjZsHGC7M-7swPXBwkhPnYA-qSXapZDynuhBhWjJxjIqeqN0tPY1WtiurAuKTa8VSsMF-SpEYMPjHjDQ%3D%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him. But he never stopped fighting for us. And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States. We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks. "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?" THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP | | | "Generic Button" | You've been with the MAGA movement for so long, and as one of the most dedicated patriots in the movement, it would mean a lot if your name was on this thank you letter. body:
What do you most want to see President Trump and our new Republican majority accomplish with these critical four years? | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4a35651865a4c6d923bb4840f3eb60c&_e=avF5kO8ILxYMLKg8BoFn5ENaKl75VPgpd7PTJDjXmjddo3Glgjo5Lpem5Q1y6EgU9T5-wdcsC7enoGpvv6N_D9v8RaDerC9ia3SB5dgAvsK4103lJ8XoJAqhuJRiFrBorc5G84oJgJVf5BVJM3eXJx2FfNQ2S3TPS_T9W5dKR7ayo7QKij4rumFNsMkkhhGLROx7_hEjhixfP8RwraZvvvOFldlH9TpsoZaIQhIH2jyQcAYCapRGWsGc9dptvJebITMR5Rzg6i6h58R0Ka6Bg_Wc68ZbrWJi9vDd0wrRUNGG9YfAC1CUyKXz1_xhiN_9C0LRL7Wl4ZEtE5fsx9ux7036NDp6jxnDBJLhw6BjrQgDzQyekIvEgLt2OBdhjtZyXaAs3qN09APGpwJc-xx5Qz4VUbAnjZC9JXNtx1pI56WC4cLymYbzdkHkWqjJ8oRKybL_c8_cBlDC5IkFbddDnvpznI7ULkCnr5paB6yC5DdJFwM71Jcp6AquR0UJtlGZ)

Fellow American,

Before I say anything else, I want to thank you for all of your vital efforts and generous support, which helped President Trump and our GOP Senate candidates win this election.

We couldn't have done it without your support, Fellow American.

**But now the most important work begins.**

We must govern the country, and I want to make sure President Trump and Senate Republicans know which national security issues are the top priorities of our most active NRSC supporters.

I've compiled a National Security Top Priority Survey to ensure NRSC members have a voice in President Trump's new administration. **[Please complete your National Security Top Priority Survey today to make your voice heard!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4a35651865a4c6d923bb4840f3eb60c&_e=avF5kO8ILxYMLKg8BoFn5ENaKl75VPgpd7PTJDjXmjddo3Glgjo5Lpem5Q1y6EgU9T5-wdcsC7enoGpvv6N_D9v8RaDerC9ia3SB5dgAvsK4103lJ8XoJAqhuJRiFrBorc5G84oJgJVf5BVJM3eXJx2FfNQ2S3TPS_T9W5dKR7ayo7QKij4rumFNsMkkhhGLROx7_hEjhixfP8RwraZvvvOFldlH9TpsoZaIQhIH2jyQcAYCapRGWsGc9dptvJebITMR5Rzg6i6h58R0Ka6Bg_Wc68ZbrWJi9vDd0wrRUNGG9YfAC1CUyKXz1_xhiN_9C0LRL7Wl4ZEtE5fsx9ux73YkICXarJrvHKZE6tazvSAjMECVoZt8OztvINccCYWwqL8DhxB1jpeGNb5qbbowbiLHEv9cVYvj6L5prFOaGvd7vsgCJk3QSrwikgUQE6eLrElPbP1SbJoDvSHo-K4WYPvsJ5Ap9XWBy-Q8WyQZ-0Sq34FSDmrDwqpdiAsVlJlD)**

[ ** COMPLETE THE SURVEY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4a35651865a4c6d923bb4840f3eb60c&_e=avF5kO8ILxYMLKg8BoFn5ENaKl75VPgpd7PTJDjXmjddo3Glgjo5Lpem5Q1y6EgU9T5-wdcsC7enoGpvv6N_D9v8RaDerC9ia3SB5dgAvsK4103lJ8XoJAqhuJRiFrBorc5G84oJgJVf5BVJM3eXJx2FfNQ2S3TPS_T9W5dKR7ayo7QKij4rumFNsMkkhhGLROx7_hEjhixfP8RwraZvvvOFldlH9TpsoZaIQhIH2jyQcAYCapRGWsGc9dptvJebITMR5Rzg6i6h58R0Ka6Bg_Wc68ZbrWJi9vDd0wrRUNGG9YfAC1CUyKXz1_xhiN_9C0LRL7Wl4ZEtE5fsx9ux7zEAuEnBGcEEJo_qRtYTrQQ8_LoZDJAaVyS4bXnFLWN8kPRaQTIEq1sjVtpA9803WkDxMJOVvUtE2h__Y9a-IbbsPmxRvqHok9odSdYsolpN_4WEZ8SXe8OOsXmfYxMp5ieduLdOuFwlEXtyMStgTxqDb4RI0dLZWW4hRDRl-cqV)
**With President Trump, Senate Republicans, and House Republicans ALL securing significant victories, we have a historic opportunity to advance conservative principles and expand the American Dream.**

Most importantly, we can end the failed foreign policy of the Biden-Harris-Obama era that dominated the Biden Administration.

America must maintain global peace through great strength, or China, Russia, terrorist groups, human and drug traffickers, and other bad actors fill the void with great evil.

President Trump's Administration will champion freedom and liberty everywhere and secure the American Dream for our families.

clean_body: What do you most want to see President Trump and our new Republican majority accomplish with these critical four years? | Fellow American, Before I say anything else, I want to thank you for all of your vital efforts and generous support, which helped President Trump and our GOP Senate candidates win this election. We couldn't have done it without your support, Fellow American. But now the most important work begins. We must govern the country, and I want to make sure President Trump and Senate Republicans know which national security issues are the top priorities of our most active NRSC supporters. I've compiled a National Security Top Priority Survey to ensure NRSC members have a voice in President Trump's new administration. With President Trump, Senate Republicans, and House Republicans ALL securing significant victories, we have a historic opportunity to advance conservative principles and expand the American Dream. Most importantly, we can end the failed foreign policy of the Biden-Harris-Obama era that dominated the Biden Administration. America must maintain global peace through great strength, or China, Russia, terrorist groups, human and drug traffickers, and other bad actors fill the void with great evil. President Trump's Administration will champion freedom and liberty everywhere and secure the American Dream for our families. What is the TOP NATIONAL SECURITY PRIORITY for President Trump and our new Republican Congress? Thank you, Mike Pompeo Use of candidate's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy, the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Counter false history and anti-American teaching
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ Oppressive and shameful? | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9c2ad64c24104e07abbaf17bda3bd7ff&_e=i1kw8_ucHQ4rdTFAqZQ__uaM2v455-9zWYhhj5B42k5V2FRYVu7AFO5b4ZI8NfeInwcUnY0_RHAPZY7UcixZQ0OT9xR6UESRCk2ItFejAeen3ijzd2W4oMmW7ghVKFjmwyR3JNFJMSWxJzuReY6gA2zr943diieBJvqWQCfa64ybiaiGjZJPSZ2-pC51J-6Q6VYvNc7huIHtadfKIN5PIxYkKJbuHkk-_P6twASQiGbeur578iljW9ZetMGZtMCKQN79xErgNiMMHfbwYRdwrhGZ_UyQCwMfHttyN91mS0DYfXr1CjTonH-UCp9Cmm1uw9QR4VNC11RkZGzy9exSYxyUKqeLFeR79FSJ_bUdafSnPLZATMdapaQ0YSAPdFyiUpEktUcgxTbCbB5_JXjiiIqAVFxIIedDQkT5ya9xoMhKa5e6o9yEt6-1A6EiviZioXQ7e14qpOKOrypudJ8JZQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is **oppressive** and **shameful**. Sometimes, this effort goes under the name “critical race theory.” Other times, activists advance these ideas through works like _The_ _New York Times_ ’ __ “1619 Project.”

This radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our children that we should replace equal individual rights with the idea of unequal rights based on group identity.
---
| | **Hillsdale College is committed to countering this destructive ideology. That’s why we have produced a new, free online course titled[“Civil Rights in American History.”](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9c2ad64c24104e07abbaf17bda3bd7ff&_e=i1kw8_ucHQ4rdTFAqZQ__uaM2v455-9zWYhhj5B42k5V2FRYVu7AFO5b4ZI8NfeInwcUnY0_RHAPZY7UcixZQ0OT9xR6UESRCk2ItFejAeen3ijzd2W4oMmW7ghVKFjmwyR3JNFJMSWxJzuReY6gA2zr943diieBJvqWQCfa64ybiaiGjZJPSZ2-pC51J-6Q6VYvNc7huIHtadfKIN5PIxYkKJbuHkk-_P6twASQiGbeur578iljW9ZetMGZtMCKQN79xErgNiMMHfbwYRdwrhGZ_UyQCwMfHttyN91mS0DYfXr1CjTonH-UCp9Cmm1u8fk8siIRooVeHieKiucs0U5VdS5_lo7JpY8wWKCHiCHjF1kLOt1jsHZrCiMZxIFXawuLxpZNpHg3kWEYDNB3BNkZSX6NsY6Bsir5cwlVZTxm8-HKZAVoLnFwjnyHlHkM4tD7wwuAwNG6Fi9Vbqr1Wg%3D%3D) And right now, it is available in a special, limited DVD box set.** When you take this course, you’ll learn about:
* How our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and civil rights.
* The quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century.
* The danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics.

---

clean_body: A message from our sponsor... Oppressive and shameful? | | | | | Fellow American, There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is oppressive and shameful. Sometimes, this effort goes under the name “critical race theory.” Other times, activists advance these ideas through works like The New York Times ’ “1619 Project.” This radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our children that we should replace equal individual rights with the idea of unequal rights based on group identity. | | Hillsdale College is committed to countering this destructive ideology. That’s why we have produced a new, free online course titled And right now, it is available in a special, limited DVD box set. When you take this course, you’ll learn about: How our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and civil rights. The quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century. The danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics. | | | You can help promote “Civil Rights in American History” and receive your very own DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today. As we do all of our work, we produce free online courses while refusing to accept any government funding. At Hillsdale, we rely entirely on the support of private citizens like you who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. name: Chairman Chris Ager
subject: About Last Week
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/05fdd2081db5/about-last-week?e=f3aa6419cd)
Logo

** Last Week
------------------------------------------------------------

Last week, New Hampshire Republicans made history. Thanks to supporters like you, we turned the tide and reshaped New Hampshire’s political landscape. But we need to keep that momentum to secure a strong, conservative future.

Here’s what we accomplished together:
* Gained 21 seats in the NH House of Representatives, ensuring more voices fighting for the principles we all value.
* Achieved a supermajority in the State Senate, putting us in the best position to drive positive change and defend against overreach.
* Retained 4 out of 5 Executive Council seats, safeguarding New Hampshire’s checks and balances.
* Defeated the former mayor of Manchester by nearly 10 points, a resounding message rejecting harmful policies and affirming our shared commitment to real solutions.

This success would be impossible without you – but we need you now more than ever.

Tomorrow, we face a crucial recount for one of our House seats. Our candidate is only up by 7 votes, and this race could be decided by a razor-thin margin.

Will you help us cover essential last-minute efforts to keep this seat in Republican hands?

Donate $25 – Keep Our Seat Secure (https://secure.winred.com/nh-gop/donate?utm_source=New+Hampshire+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=a5c74f52c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_11_13_01_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5c74f52c7-3210349)

Donate $50 – Boost Our Last-Minute Efforts (https://secure.winred.com/nh-gop/donate?utm_source=New+Hampshire+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=a5c74f52c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_11_13_01_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5c74f52c7-3210349)

Donate $100 – Defend the Future of NH (https://secure.winred.com/nh-gop/donate?utm_source=New+Hampshire+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=a5c74f52c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_11_13_01_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5c74f52c7-3210349)

Looking ahead, 2026 will be a tough election. After these wins, Democrats will target New Hampshire harder than ever. We need to start building now – with stronger infrastructure and a well-prepared team ready to protect and expand our hard-won majorities.

Your donation today not only impacts tomorrow’s recount, but it also helps us start preparing for 2026. To face the challenges ahead, we need the resources to build an “army” of committed supporters, volunteers, and leaders dedicated to defending the New Hampshire Advantage.

Will you help us secure this victory and prepare for the fight ahead?

Donate to Protect NH Today (https://secure.winred.com/nh-gop/donate?utm_source=New+Hampshire+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=a5c74f52c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_11_13_01_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5c74f52c7-3210349)

Every dollar you give ensures our team has the resources to keep our majorities, mobilize voter outreach, strengthen our communications, and train the leaders who will defend New Hampshire in 2026.

With your support, we’re building an infrastructure that can withstand anything – and keep New Hampshire moving forward.

Thank you for your dedication to this cause. Together, we are shaping a brighter, stronger future for New Hampshire, and it all starts with your support today.

Live Free or Die

Chris Ager

Chairman, New Hampshire GOP

P.S. Tomorrow’s recount is critical, and 2026 will be a huge challenge. Please consider making a donation to keep us strong now and build for the battles ahead. We’re counting on you!

Donate Now to Build the Future (https://secure.winred.com/nh-gop/donate?utm_source=New+Hampshire+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=a5c74f52c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_11_13_01_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5c74f52c7-3210349)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m counting on you.
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going.[Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $10 or more right now between myself and Lucas Kunce?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84153?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84154?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84153?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj)
---
Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
**Let’s finish this strong:[Split $10 or more between Lucas Kunce and me to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84153?refcode=em20241112-8667&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8667%2E614464%2EE53URj)**
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: They can help us consider our future
body:
You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger...

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0ouv7a2s48tpbla7enau0ge1dc05u9qbt3usa7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ieco76cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger ...**

* The far Left routinely violates the Constitution in ways reminiscent of despotisms such as the Soviet Union and Maoist China.

* Recent events demonstrate that the consent of the governed has been replaced by a government of the elites, by the elites, and for the elites.

* The promise of equal justice for all is being turned into weaponized justice against anyone who _dares_ to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

Is it any wonder that so many of our fellow citizens feel threatened by the government that is supposed to protect our rights?

**In this time of crisis for our country, the classics can help us to think more clearly about America 's future and how we can change course. That's [why Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on classical Greece and Rome.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs70dm7lnbhldaf650q1oro4l8758o0jr4al4fg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ieco76cph2bs)**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about ancient Greece and Rome--including the rise and fall of Athenian democracy and the Roman Republic.

The video series also considers the significant contributions to Western Civilization of poets such as Homer and Virgil and political philosophers such as Xenophon and Cicero.

The founders of our country looked to classical Greece and Rome as their "lamp of experience."

clean_body: Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism." Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization." I know you're not fooled by these disguises. Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx. It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country. It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God. And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities. The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally new about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact... ... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty. Or you can send this to a friend! This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture. Will you join us by registering for this free online course? You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today: Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism. That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America. You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below: Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights. You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today! | | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: BREAKING: Republicans hold the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
This is all because of you.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl7c87c2j75g9cp5njjr8a36m97i15at9sdadj70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ie1pj4cph2bs)
---
**_[**_BREAKING: REPUBLICANS WILL HOLD THEIR HOUSE MAJORITY_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsa77dsn0p349kopv9bqnv5hi34umqhgg54isdvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ie1pj4cph2bs)_** Friend, We’ve done it. Republicans will deliver President Trump a **GOVERNING** **TRIFECTA** in Washington. We took the White House. We took the Senate. **[And now, we’ve officially held our Republican House majority.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2chqv2h9vvfl1mmdmg9177qmq144lr3t9aicrho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ie1pj4cph2bs)** None of this would be possible without the generous support of patriots like you. Your votes, your donations, your survey responses, and your prayers are the **ONLY** reason that we’ve emerged victorious. This historic victory doesn’t belong to me, it belongs to **YOU** , the American people who put your faith in us. From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you. I want you to know that every time I pick up the gavel, I will do it with you in mind. I will never, ever forget the patriots who made our victory possible. I promise that I will wake up every morning ready to serve and ready to deliver. Thank you again for your support. Now let’s get to work. -Speaker Johnson P.S. If we want to make sure President Trump has a supportive Congress for **ALL FOUR YEARS** of his presidency, we need to start making preparations NOW. If you have a few extra bucks to spare, **[we'd be extremely grateful if you can help us out!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn6grj3ubv2cvfeuu1dbn6ah5t7a8t3vmh4bdp6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5ie1pj4cph2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW7ASqZWNN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW7ASqZWNN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in
Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court is requested.

Your response will only
take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of
liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders
thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the
Constitution.

But progressives see the
Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from
the bench.

Do you agree that the role
of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is
written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy
agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives
dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the
bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy
agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren
(D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and
integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the
Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching
out to you today...

What is your opinion about
the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts
with me using the College's National Survey on the United States
Supreme Court right away.

Your response will help
Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of
Americans about the importance of the Constitution to
liberty-including the proper role of an independent judiciary
that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the
bench.

You can easily complete
your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63804665:W7ASqZWNN:m:3:2532013465:B8DB3ACBCDF351E3E9C8F41E2A4CC777:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale
College

Pursuing Truth - Defending
Liberty since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St
Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: BREAKING: Republicans hold the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
This is all because of you.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zipjaffgv9lb1egs8pdd8e4j71m6mjvl9tmrct8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31c9h2bs)
---
**_[**_BREAKING: REPUBLICANS WILL HOLD THEIR HOUSE MAJORITY_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl9vsmlpv7dmdl7qq7pitjb5c63vu4lhac3qejho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31c9h2bs)_** Friend, We’ve done it. Republicans will deliver President Trump a **GOVERNING** **TRIFECTA** in Washington. We took the White House. We took the Senate. **[And now, we’ve officially held our Republican House majority.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8pmu0909iv1o4injhu53ki9la40ad8e4dlkiat0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31c9h2bs)** None of this would be possible without the generous support of patriots like you. Your votes, your donations, your survey responses, and your prayers are the **ONLY** reason that we’ve emerged victorious. This historic victory doesn’t belong to me, it belongs to **YOU** , the American people who put your faith in us. From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you. I want you to know that every time I pick up the gavel, I will do it with you in mind. I will never, ever forget the patriots who made our victory possible. I promise that I will wake up every morning ready to serve and ready to deliver. Thank you again for your support. Now let’s get to work. -Speaker Johnson P.S. If we want to make sure President Trump has a supportive Congress for **ALL FOUR YEARS** of his presidency, we need to start making preparations NOW. If you have a few extra bucks to spare, **[we'd be extremely grateful if you can help us out!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkr124ukk3b0uda0cc4243mntcr830h812sp8ldo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31c9h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Our most important online course?
body:
Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6hne7c9g16esbne1kadlaik665cauo2dsapv740_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjabae9u7l5l2kg7s10vp21ufuisedi1uf1070q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31chh2bs)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl1fui57711f95to0e7qbh30a81k3ubjr5mt1la0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31chh2bs)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ip2jc243rl72lpmmeasvlt37bi4iil298gmnr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clg68o31chh2bs)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

---
| |
---

# A SPECIAL ELECTION WILL BE HELD
# IN EARLY DECEMBER TO FILL JOHN MCGUIRE'S SEAT
---
| Dear Dear Did you know there will be a Special Election to be held in early December of THIS year to fill the Virginia Senate Seat in District 10 to be vacated by John McGuire, a current Virginia Senate and Republican nominee for Congress in District 5?
The election will take place just 5 days after Senator Louise Lucas calls for a Special Election. So you will have less than 5 days to hear of the election and know how you can cast your vote.
The election will take place quickly and I want to make sure it's on your radar. The election will take place right after this coming Thanksgiving but before Christmas. So please be alert during the holidays this year.
As an experienced Virginia Senator who served in the Senate for 8 years, I am the only candidate running who has the experience to hit the ground running on day one.
Senate District 10 is also one of the most conservative districts in Virginia. When I served in the Senate from from 2016 to 2023, I was considered one of the most conservative Virginia Senators in Virginia by various conservative watchdog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizen's Defense League, the National Rifle Association and the National Federation of Independent Businesses- all 8 years I served in the Virginia Senate. It's hard to beat a rating of 100%.
I'm the only candidate running with the knowledge, experience and capability to be effective, day one.
Please listen to my recent press interviews with both Joe Thomas and John Reid. And tune in to John Frederick. I'm all in!
If you have any questions, please feel free to hit reply and I will personally respond to your message.
---
|
---

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: What can classical Greece and Rome teach us today?
body:
You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger...

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CRKEc2QLk6OJI_CpCBu6Yg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFwAgP0SuaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY2xhc3NpY2FsLWdyZWVjZS1hbmQtcm9tZS1jY2E_c2M9MDE2NTZOMDI0MkwwNkRPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyZWVjZXJvbWVjY2EmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQxMTEzVwNzcGNCCmcxf2g0Z0ZqHR9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger ...**

* The far Left routinely violates the Constitution in ways reminiscent of despotisms such as the Soviet Union and Maoist China.

* Recent events demonstrate that the consent of the governed has been replaced by a government of the elites, by the elites, and for the elites.

* The promise of equal justice for all is being turned into weaponized justice against anyone who _dares_ to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

Is it any wonder that so many of our fellow citizens feel threatened by the government that is supposed to protect our rights?

**In this time of crisis for our country, the classics can help us to think more clearly about America 's future and how we can change course. That's [why Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on classical Greece and Rome.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CRKEc2QLk6OJI_CpCBu6Yg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFwAgP0SuaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY2xhc3NpY2FsLWdyZWVjZS1hbmQtcm9tZS1jY2E_c2M9MDE2NTZOMDI0MkwwNkRPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyZWVjZXJvbWVjY2EmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQxMTEzVwNzcGNCCmcxf2g0Z0ZqHR9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about ancient Greece and Rome--including the rise and fall of Athenian democracy and the Roman Republic.

The video series also considers the significant contributions to Western Civilization of poets such as Homer and Virgil and political philosophers such as Xenophon and Cicero.

The founders of our country looked to classical Greece and Rome as their "lamp of experience."

**The study of the classics encourages a love of liberty, which is why it was once considered an essential element of a liberal arts education. **

But today, it has disappeared from most college and university curricula.

Far-left academics claim that this kind of education forms the "scaffold of white supremacy"--**but the truth is, they don 't want American citizens like you to understand what it means to be free.**

**That 's why I invite you to learn from the founders of Western Civilization before it's too late to save it.**

You can receive instant access to our free video series right now using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/classical-greece-and-rome-cca](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/CRKEc2QLk6OJI_CpCBu6Yg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFwAgP0SuaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY2xhc3NpY2FsLWdyZWVjZS1hbmQtcm9tZS1jY2E_c2M9MDE2NTZOMDI0MkwwNkRPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdyZWVjZXJvbWVjY2EmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQxMTEzVwNzcGNCCmcxf2g0Z0ZqHR9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**Please use the secure link above to receive your video series on classical Greece and Rome immediately.**

There is much we can learn from the classics about the fundamental principles of Western Civilization and the defense of liberty. I urge you to begin your study today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **
**

---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What can classical Greece and Rome teach us today?
body:
You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56c0ede07f164b159238cba884e81ba6&_e=B2HXxQBP7E-hitW-95AHVjFrjp3eJOzq609lT3QZ8986lZvsjHcauIsfdmoHjR3pY01DJ4pj3jDoNKMNQMNajVdPuo2u2RQ-GPT2ay7Qds4QZskCD9vdTSSB1mJZoEXyR8YmLfHbAIpTAWoUNKTPlLUs_lwHpShx_zwsPPwL9VN88vIW2ka7lbPSUFVMeM9pZVyrivsIUmHwTCZQyz-Z03gq8YbKirP5sUE30nz9ULYP-lbFUoPbKxIvk3AM8m3nJwm-Jl6DJQLuHbVH4p4hO7lIUeF-Q4HC530S-aBy4qAIUWvhLO9c6t20EaloLmkVgANkKXQq0npIRusJaAZsSM1ruCTUPZuqQP8gsC72bqSj1Efih3X1KeHaJki3z0OnyLGLbQdIL0sWQgObwqdxXw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**You and I live in a time in which our freedom is in grave danger ...**

* The far Left routinely violates the Constitution in ways reminiscent of despotisms such as the Soviet Union and Maoist China.

* Recent events demonstrate that the consent of the governed has been replaced by a government of the elites, by the elites, and for the elites.

* The promise of equal justice for all is being turned into weaponized justice against anyone who _dares_ to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

Is it any wonder that so many of our fellow citizens feel threatened by the government that is supposed to protect our rights?

**In this time of crisis for our country, the classics can help us to think more clearly about America 's future and how we can change course. That's [why Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on classical Greece and Rome.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56c0ede07f164b159238cba884e81ba6&_e=B2HXxQBP7E-hitW-95AHVjFrjp3eJOzq609lT3QZ8986lZvsjHcauIsfdmoHjR3pY01DJ4pj3jDoNKMNQMNajVdPuo2u2RQ-GPT2ay7Qds4QZskCD9vdTSSB1mJZoEXyR8YmLfHbAIpTAWoUNKTPlLUs_lwHpShx_zwsPPwL9VN88vIW2ka7lbPSUFVMeM9pZVyrivsIUmHwTCZQyz-Z03gq8YbKirP5sUE30nz9ULYP-lbFUoPbKxIvk3AM8m3ngBfwGqQQO5OBHSv4Bze_7VLCkAu6BFLLZSj8UFPC-045BAdaqY1yDT19VogIkrbbzMyFSMNzHYgtN0aDES0eCWRyzLQi5OkwCwab43rSsJt80BgwV2xNAZ6QoOmpEF2lHvBKIrGgZUZ3zSuXw-LJVw%3D%3D)**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about ancient Greece and Rome--including the rise and fall of Athenian democracy and the Roman Republic.

The video series also considers the significant contributions to Western Civilization of poets such as Homer and Virgil and political philosophers such as Xenophon and Cicero.

The founders of our country looked to classical Greece and Rome as their "lamp of experience."

**The study of the classics encourages a love of liberty, which is why it was once considered an essential element of a liberal arts education. **

But today, it has disappeared from most college and university curricula.

Far-left academics claim that this kind of education forms the "scaffold of white supremacy"--**but the truth is, they don 't want American citizens like you to understand what it means to be free.**

**That 's why I invite you to learn from the founders of Western Civilization before it's too late to save it.**

You can receive instant access to our free video series right now using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/classical-greece-and-rome-cca](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56c0ede07f164b159238cba884e81ba6&_e=B2HXxQBP7E-hitW-95AHVjFrjp3eJOzq609lT3QZ8986lZvsjHcauIsfdmoHjR3pY01DJ4pj3jDoNKMNQMNajVdPuo2u2RQ-GPT2ay7Qds4QZskCD9vdTSSB1mJZoEXyR8YmLfHbAIpTAWoUNKTPlLUs_lwHpShx_zwsPPwL9VN88vIW2ka7lbPSUFVMeM9pZVyrivsIUmHwTCZQyz-Z03gq8YbKirP5sUE30nz9ULYP-lbFUoPbKxIvk3AM8m3nbLGQ3B_3a5V5ig37UcW7s5CeKpe2UTTcRP2j0KD3HRvzMIDCCM6D6zAOFKOCt_VxoSa7d-teqzW4-DjmPwd47t202ohfALBjBJFF_ERw07ot4z8CLwccWV8aMBBu_PyLM8V9UpF8rlvDEqdC4L1xrg%3D%3D)**

**Please use the secure link above to receive your video series on classical Greece and Rome immediately.**

There is much we can learn from the classics about the fundamental principles of Western Civilization and the defense of liberty. I urge you to begin your study today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ** **
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: “Marxism, Socialism, and Communism” | Watch the Trailer
body:
