| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b1ac204ab14f2497250116c3d0bc8c&_e=sbTnVcd1RTr0emRB80MAER3WuamPMEj-pRej04L_DBxp4-_B26lNeK5oK7yFuO_pE6CQe_qy4gzqLGdhBiKAt31MzPIazjzoc9roQ-x08O2ct2-7R3INIS4H4SfjeOQFQ-6ZseDz9TLYkQJQZRVY7_NemmRbzKTrjYSDOdANu7uOimoNZfpHM1jDacHWnkg5zwPnO9vRcc9mxeEB5ganBIAAncPfhfvXxaXvmUwTFOapCceeIoEi1QMzJuAclnRENwLc3DrfetElzLs3dOSvkJwz6f2OziPL7UINKPpcrEagoKXSkUuoTzdehKYv23ynSmhxgv1Q3lkt8LyQcev_DYfG4y13gFFnLIw8xGLpJ4MfYWxDlARv_PuY8DENB_FDQr58Fklr61PaPaNxTCuP2N61XLLXvB768hKBjOhsfIc%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b1ac204ab14f2497250116c3d0bc8c&_e=sbTnVcd1RTr0emRB80MAER3WuamPMEj-pRej04L_DBxp4-_B26lNeK5oK7yFuO_pE6CQe_qy4gzqLGdhBiKAt31MzPIazjzoc9roQ-x08O2ct2-7R3INIS4H4SfjeOQFQ-6ZseDz9TLYkQJQZRVY7_NemmRbzKTrjYSDOdANu7uOimoNZfpHM1jDacHWnkg5zwPnO9vRcc9mxeEB5ganBIAAncPfhfvXxaXvmUwTFOapCceeIoEi1QMzJuAclnRENwLc3DrfetElzLs3dOSvkC72JW6lrVNBmFvn26vmeBDoO2aCbowS1lD5oBU-QQz2hQkz-UylynDR3zEZW0uv9tbuhtA8SyEht1eJW4b2q6zEZnPaTrImOKbzd_oWj1F7RN2CqTqcBKJEuIIaiAa2FNf0Aj8cgX-BB7Lfj20ALOA%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Theology 101
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f384d59186ad4bc783a3835783690654&_e=c8SO6tnbgLoeA13-csyybMn8INYOtknfn8CBaxvRVBptI6Nyw6N3ysqsYR4wa5ZZKz9Do8VWNGG070VJu8WUdnjLs2QeHIAAixvawrvkhJ6Vknzt_o6eQpnpLSPGGpZ_hCmUBYOV0s_fyi_VOvLEtvCbWoI7ub8VsYGkpkN7rSnhb3gn8x8-KjaDa-bVm2Jx5DZ0TOjoxKC_ibvz85gzGvMwVtS27eI1ADX3tSJvpvVqb8AluzIm2LLr96BSpQ6t_8ohvLuG8Wc9S7E4AQSkpzEIZslQxSsA8rolsVk9F3xxIpNSJ3iQ_LMDVFb6YZR7Rwpc6-ByhaGLuleJeofTeuB-4j-rOKshIHwoRbEH4qm3bNJ4SuW8vAG1MNIc-Tpl8UIo-foi6eEd56FgYryk6HrpBcKPXH2uq5poBkWsCq03mnAprSC9CvZS3eM9cf7D) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f384d59186ad4bc783a3835783690654&_e=c8SO6tnbgLoeA13-csyybMn8INYOtknfn8CBaxvRVBptI6Nyw6N3ysqsYR4wa5ZZKz9Do8VWNGG070VJu8WUdnjLs2QeHIAAixvawrvkhJ6Vknzt_o6eQpnpLSPGGpZ_hCmUBYOV0s_fyi_VOvLEtvCbWoI7ub8VsYGkpkN7rSnhb3gn8x8-KjaDa-bVm2Jx5DZ0TOjoxKC_ibvz85gzGvMwVtS27eI1ADX3tSJvpvVqb8AluzIm2LLr96BSpQ6t_8ohvLuG8Wc9S7E4AQSkpzEIZslQxSsA8rolsVk9F3y7BDyunYKGbHSiQvGUEdlou310M91z3jrzJpi_arQaSs5n58AbGpcaZ6lHtm_HwlXGcR2DBCXfuMUMMTrr_R-9MHQQHzGAwjFYHhMkgPmiSsY3DzaoIFB1aKu68H2jJLbRhb2LJUFW_G13uR1TgjV9) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f384d59186ad4bc783a3835783690654&_e=c8SO6tnbgLoeA13-csyybMn8INYOtknfn8CBaxvRVBptI6Nyw6N3ysqsYR4wa5ZZKz9Do8VWNGG070VJu8WUdnjLs2QeHIAAixvawrvkhJ6Vknzt_o6eQpnpLSPGGpZ_hCmUBYOV0s_fyi_VOvLEtvCbWoI7ub8VsYGkpkN7rSnhb3gn8x8-KjaDa-bVm2Jx5DZ0TOjoxKC_ibvz85gzGvMwVtS27eI1ADX3tSJvpvVqb8AluzIm2LLr96BSpQ6t_8ohvLuG8Wc9S7E4AQSkpzEIZslQxSsA8rolsVk9F3ynymrPm6-o-AKszYynY2h-2D3sj0fjbb7LiB4MSRo1uLiq73MXu2xmZxCLYfHxhVxoIosPRuWxVjXPWgt6I92zeQ8m95Mf3NNIbngppxY5Pjze7ly-f5Xyuw9HA2C7xSO8HPqokXp0Wsiapdximque). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f384d59186ad4bc783a3835783690654&_e=c8SO6tnbgLoeA13-csyybMn8INYOtknfn8CBaxvRVBptI6Nyw6N3ysqsYR4wa5ZZKz9Do8VWNGG070VJu8WUdnjLs2QeHIAAixvawrvkhJ6Vknzt_o6eQpnpLSPGGpZ_hCmUBYOV0s_fyi_VOvLEtvCbWoI7ub8VsYGkpkN7rSnhb3gn8x8-KjaDa-bVm2Jx5DZ0TOjoxKC_ibvz85gzGvMwVtS27eI1ADX3tSJvpvVqb8AluzIm2LLr96BSpQ6t_8ohvLuG8Wc9S7E4AQSkpzEIZslQxSsA8rolsVk9F3xw8xBDXBa80wqABHArB5lL4Id8GwcnUuZN2uXHn8gJF9lA_qluSXoAPswVWfqmTRP4yFuAkmivrcFfgG29IuXIc-LOiDM9Nngigv8EUyYVE-MblYxvSENHXYCpfUZyoTCZ043uCOGUKSD6ur7lm_Th)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: No kings allowed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Have you heard of the No Kings Act?
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta723c240-6ee4-47c9-bb9c-0f96b9c8dfcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| If this law were to pass, here are three reasons why this bill would be an important guardrail for our democracy: 1) Trump would be held accountable for his many crimes – including the 34 felony convictions on his record. 2) The Supreme Court, controlled by a 6-3 conservative majority, would stop any corruption that they’ve been a part of! 3) Trump would not be in office EVER AGAIN.
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c679783-9b38-480e-b3ac-33d18ffffb9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – President Biden, Senator Schumer, and Senate Democrats are working around the clock to pass this law before Trump is inaugurated. But we need EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT who reads this to endorse this bill before midnight >> _**[[ ADD YOUR NAME → ]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f3d30ab-9035-49a2-bad1-a7ff07a8b0c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_
---
|
---
| | | | | This is a democracy, Peter. There are no kings that rule the United States of America. And we need to keep it that way. [So if you’re ready to fight for the future and support the No Kings Act, add your name NOW – you only have until MIDNIGHT to do so.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T759bb86c-5580-4690-ba5d-dc33fd58cadd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70fb331f-63df-4f7c-98ab-5212bc1c1d20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: The gifts of reason and speech
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15828c8dc95d4d9fab2f9332abd315e2&_e=Fw8XgAyTN07lkdbJOXphYctaEL5vyQQumXAf5RF1OYQWLGHjT1y2u5KEF7Vpemdd5vYz8ig-DSqY6RptCH1hMZVXlPy2NE1eStZ-tySb70YadytXKDi47xEgL5IfNB4ma0fCODyjsNvt1YlDZ2DR-d2WVi5Rms9CCFQLf5UJGSlUvKgVfirJgEWxml5jNObTFHJGO0pCweOlowYkqb258tzkAvPhs-XC-wzdmWoU2rVtgCM9msBmI0j9fmedb-d78pLgrCubDCx4E-MJsLO7jm8KHdOjK9a9u1YZM3Yf8QNRyCKM0us5C_PXyO0RyHAxyVlmq1hpxO8EYrGMaYzky1iTgu3Cv3bvoGO-X2rEmUkYvxcfJF5Q3tTF3QqoLfB-QM89WZkHSuqmXc7LAtWz4reEgZi9zqdByLDb6o1D0bMBBHdo09H3emMGfmyP0rD-) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15828c8dc95d4d9fab2f9332abd315e2&_e=Fw8XgAyTN07lkdbJOXphYctaEL5vyQQumXAf5RF1OYQWLGHjT1y2u5KEF7Vpemdd5vYz8ig-DSqY6RptCH1hMZVXlPy2NE1eStZ-tySb70YadytXKDi47xEgL5IfNB4ma0fCODyjsNvt1YlDZ2DR-d2WVi5Rms9CCFQLf5UJGSlUvKgVfirJgEWxml5jNObTFHJGO0pCweOlowYkqb258tzkAvPhs-XC-wzdmWoU2rVtgCM9msBmI0j9fmedb-d78pLgrCubDCx4E-MJsLO7jm8KHdOjK9a9u1YZM3Yf8QM2tEKM2erJmZ6xBgxA-yCLdNJ00sjJTUaysPDtgA3F8JYR4XhZmf7QryDnhG0Ml4I-tLflQah9bTBTcMY8APDrmf14DJKBsR4R9OpE4V09BObTU96ndpLr3M41f53_nPluy8xqlMwc0qUlR3amwXUm) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15828c8dc95d4d9fab2f9332abd315e2&_e=Fw8XgAyTN07lkdbJOXphYctaEL5vyQQumXAf5RF1OYQWLGHjT1y2u5KEF7Vpemdd5vYz8ig-DSqY6RptCH1hMZVXlPy2NE1eStZ-tySb70YadytXKDi47xEgL5IfNB4ma0fCODyjsNvt1YlDZ2DR-d2WVi5Rms9CCFQLf5UJGSlUvKgVfirJgEWxml5jNObTFHJGO0pCweOlowYkqb258tzkAvPhs-XC-wzdmWoU2rVtgCM9msBmI0j9fmedb-d78pLgrCubDCx4E-MJsLO7jm8KHdOjK9a9u1YZM3Yf8QMGWPrMb08m0VXLtEg0sitNZ49pPMy2-sWTWgICbBRRshc7f3cWXrBm6f-pjZsDoDmOzeET1HIePjVq3mhCMBMUKITvXyFahsphq0XsVjDkekBxFGmXEDwgvAh2SzkrIwhNAB0tr3wN7Jx_0mqpm7Lr). name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Marxism—New Documentary Course
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9924e998ac14a0893e767053fef40e0&_e=7mX1wk8CSpPL3SQ6e0gfq9En_ti7r-gRGq0TFqXlEfWCOJkNkGpsafLQFJodZVXOlZj2H5zMzCvXTJ2PupRKKtQ5ClCg7beW0o7YQjlPdki-N0IvskLlv2G6Ep75XiuNL_q-DXL1CCH5sioXHEm4gJGW15kSWExJcTKDj4i63RrHiSTWACDWO6PCMGQcBzDDdrORkrwPOIy3LvukJ7PNxY2Rl1qeb9dLlLQzpO2kN6f0jF6noIl6fZu0MeRzCfsp4aZZ9ehOzQKL1N_yhrnWrhCaT1r8ycP4D6HwzZ1bBjxLxKXREyyQ8e29iH119In6ogtJALWPvrODf_HLG6847ZPGF-gYuC2_Mcj_QmE9bTEZqlGyT2fiUYtljDNKRRL4SX2mrFjMuRjtMVErAm4lYGbNC3bI9N9l4oWWwCcHpsg%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9924e998ac14a0893e767053fef40e0&_e=7mX1wk8CSpPL3SQ6e0gfq9En_ti7r-gRGq0TFqXlEfWCOJkNkGpsafLQFJodZVXOlZj2H5zMzCvXTJ2PupRKKtQ5ClCg7beW0o7YQjlPdki-N0IvskLlv2G6Ep75XiuNL_q-DXL1CCH5sioXHEm4gJGW15kSWExJcTKDj4i63RrHiSTWACDWO6PCMGQcBzDDdrORkrwPOIy3LvukJ7PNxY2Rl1qeb9dLlLQzpO2kN6f0jF6noIl6fZu0MeRzCfsp4aZZ9ehOzQKL1N_yhrnWruppDGF7OuuJjANpPWIqc5ynnGMt3xj-HwgcQEuYAGGR3fY4BnFsCTfrQ_7wXcghDSo_acvRxPYzhqqL4P2BpWsDbzBh4zvhiTXflWOR11nPtxsbviwS7-QEe7JwCh6J0N50gUdcHerZgFhdFOGry0A%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9924e998ac14a0893e767053fef40e0&_e=7mX1wk8CSpPL3SQ6e0gfq9En_ti7r-gRGq0TFqXlEfWCOJkNkGpsafLQFJodZVXOlZj2H5zMzCvXTJ2PupRKKtQ5ClCg7beW0o7YQjlPdki-N0IvskLlv2G6Ep75XiuNL_q-DXL1CCH5sioXHEm4gJGW15kSWExJcTKDj4i63RrHiSTWACDWO6PCMGQcBzDDdrORkrwPOIy3LvukJ7PNxY2Rl1qeb9dLlLQzpO2kN6f0jF6noIl6fZu0MeRzCfsp4aZZ9ehOzQKL1N_yhrnWrs1BMXeoBIoYkJyALUoVdIA0LAVGDfQNOet-746541OdYOHxEUEdke5yXnAY2tgjJQJyx8PbY6qRmQ6GbhKOQje457SuTgoZVXs_XnOpA1bESVR-DtxAlVBIiEZQiEy1qf-U45tGg-W7Ah6m7U8HL8w%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9924e998ac14a0893e767053fef40e0&_e=7mX1wk8CSpPL3SQ6e0gfq9En_ti7r-gRGq0TFqXlEfWCOJkNkGpsafLQFJodZVXOlZj2H5zMzCvXTJ2PupRKKtQ5ClCg7beW0o7YQjlPdki-N0IvskLlv2G6Ep75XiuNL_q-DXL1CCH5sioXHEm4gJGW15kSWExJcTKDj4i63RrHiSTWACDWO6PCMGQcBzDDdrORkrwPOIy3LvukJ7PNxY2Rl1qeb9dLlLQzpO2kN6f0jF6noIl6fZu0MeRzCfsp4aZZ9ehOzQKL1N_yhrnWrsq2D3UJ3Nbz3DdqNXNwB9phuuSPK89a2PBuW5PaI_R3N6LjCwLuSMIrmXzjXJSzIwWYYBFZUOZY9AZmC9TZgBotBQgYXNI64-PRUmAG9-SWpz_QqlXk2OZ9zEhJC_acZ-dledtZpFAwApOnJTW77d0%3D)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

subject: Sign: NO Pardons for January 6th Rioters!
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign: NO Pardons for January 6th Rioters! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6497cfd-9604-4a63-acd2-b1b24e3f736d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Now that Trump has won the election, January 6th rioters are [expecting](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95cb3f43-b2b3-4239-a63e-b145640fa783/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) him to pardon them when he takes office. Trump called the rioters "patriots" while campaigning and said they were "political prisoners." To this we say, NO WAY! The rioters brought chaos and destruction upon our Capitol, beat police officers, sought out members of Congress who they threatened to attack and kill, and tried to overturn the results of a free and fair election, all in Trump's name. They deserve to be held accountable to the fullest extent of the law. **[Sign your name to demand NO PARDONS for January 6th rioters>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b2420e8-6da7-4120-877f-edd8a9c68be2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **

name: The Flyover
subject: Elon, Vivek to Lead Cost-Cutting Agency, CNN Layoffs, and a James Bond Auction
body:
President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday named Elon Musk and former GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy to head up a [new federal agency, the Department of Government Efficiency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD2PgzAU-zVhC-IlaSlDhlvYeuuN6IW8tLnmA0FKxL8_0f0kD7Ys2ZZ_7tMdffDp8Y2RdHF5Ep1QHICDnCz6cEyqsdoRCZINaeglqKFXt6F5akf2YtAZNJ2cLQ409MI5oxClcDOoxuszDQDkCXFr5QUNkAUFcJvN1TDVkfUlr-1v9qk8yYUj77S2c45N0M9Slo3JLyZGJsZaazubLVHdTp-J8aRMjGV9x4VTyInH9_biu9_pxVeMuFWMB09UuaUF1xIpFZ4df5wl6aPIOT97SvPBxNis2i7Vh-C3a89U94jow2dM-e-cXYu_AAAA__8wtmrv), or DOGE.

## Musk, Ramaswamy to Head New Cost-Cutting Agency
President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday named Elon Musk and former GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy to head up a [new federal agency, the Department of Government Efficiency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD2PgzAU-zVhC-IlaSlDhlvYeuuN6IW8tLnmA0FKxL8_0f0kD7Ys2ZZ_7tMdffDp8Y2RdHF5Ep1QHICDnCz6cEyqsdoRCZINaeglqKFXt6F5akf2YtAZNJ2cLQ409MI5oxClcDOoxuszDQDkCXFr5QUNkAUFcJvN1TDVkfUlr-1v9qk8yYUj77S2c45N0M9Slo3JLyZGJsZaazubLVHdTp-J8aRMjGV9x4VTyInH9_biu9_pxVeMuFWMB09UuaUF1xIpFZ4df5wl6aPIOT97SvPBxNis2i7Vh-C3a89U94jow2dM-e-cXYu_AAAA__8wtmrv), or DOGE. Trump said the new agency _"will pave the way for my administration to dismantle government bureaucracy, slash excess regulations, cut wasteful expenditures, and restructure federal agencies."_ Also on Tuesday, Trump named South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem to [head the Department of Homeland Security](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQhJ_GdEb4BzgKF2noLm1K5J_l2MTYyOwd4e0jUqSLNMVIoxmNvo_7dLcYMT3e7QqG5jzJRmouBBdqChbjOekqmBlAgqrAiF4JPfT6NlSLgaZvFQwdzKq33s_CtSpo59zQzqFtQ4XmWhNCqEvyVqvWOgFBaCFu3nWO6QYCUi71Z8ZEC8zxzC8otc9rFc1CtO1MvTE5Mjkex1En5xMc-5UzOW45IqHfmRyTJczJRr6Dfxakk8mRynPdOHxv4AkCT3nFZAn4V8GdkKcMK1_yCtGm8Ne7TAGy5eTFJyv6odddVUzYDowR965nunmsFuPvSfoP2svInwAAAP__NjpzDw), giving her oversight of key federal agencies, including ICE, FEMA, and the Secret Service. Other key announcements included naming former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee as the next U.S. ambassador to Israel and former Director of National Intelligence [John Ratcliffe to serve as CIA director](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_u4yAQhJ8Gd1heIP5TUFzjLtdeaa1hiTeHwTJcrLz9Kel_0khTjDT69P25L3fkyOnxG3eyNeRFdcpIAAl68cjxvZjG20CkSDdkYdBgpsGMU7NZNyB2fRecAUNaGdLGB1Shv2lCupmG7ecNAPQnamz1DVcgDwZgdGu_CtOR55rP9pk51Y1CfOcXna3LexPtVutRhP4l1CzUfF1Xm1aX6CqfXaj5yJEruyLU7HPC6GU9_-2HUPO35cHub5HPvCV5YnWRQyAZCb10jLKQy8lL9DsnLvXEyjnJ0yWEYRqHqTmtPy6OkUs_CNM9duT4Jas_mXpZ9T8AAP__X7htlg). Trump also said he planned to nominate [Fox News host Pete Hegseth](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd0S-QGxcULyGLq_d0sLhErPCYMFNsv77ldOvNJrmSEej-brNNxdTzI__bkNDocyiF4oDcJCzdzEds-q8CYgCZYcGRglqGpWeutVoLwNqN2ndKy_DMIUBhyUMV6VGN06-i-a0AYA8I_RFXt0C6EEB6PsyLEz16COVevkuMdOKIR3lhfVyL1uXzEq0Nyb_MWGZsPnYS6MTMWFPMRMW4CzBhH02nvHdmLBUn9vOc9lidoSNh_LzQXwtjfiOhHzFR0NaeSiVN7xXJFcPXgL3GDA3ZMJ21fj9HVOKbRiZ6h-bi-mzi_766WXEbwAAAP__2o9qUg) as Secretary of Defense. Hegseth served in Iraq and Afghanistan and has worked for Fox since 2014, most recently as a co-host of _Fox & Friends Weekend_.
## CNN Plans Layoffs After Ratings Fall
CNN CEO Mark Thompson is reportedly [planning layoffs that could affect hundreds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQhJ_GdHu6XczPFS7S0F3alMjg5XBibGTv3Ym3j0gfaTTNSJ9G39d9vFsffHx82o2NLGmkK2lABKxHZ304Rl05szAT1xUb7GrUt073t2o11jXcU29npqnv7OTQNbpp69vS0qSbrvLmpCFifYb6S93YCdmhRuznqZ2UvrLzkvLlO_koKy_hSC_OlzltVTCryF5U_aFoUDTEY09FzknRcIIVDYhnkaJhY-etomGOEaZUCmw2_4CsadtLiiAJgj0gLQusz-gyuwJ2Ec7AgWfxKYKzB2QrPj4KvP3O6SmQeU9ZFA1VNm5_-xB8aTulr4_N-vB3U_7T9jL0GwAA__9x0XAI) of employees following the network’s low ratings during last week’s Election Night coverage. The cuts are expected to target high-paid on-air talent and [production staff](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZI1o4wEmcHAJ2Vx6ITJ2e-iTx0a2Z1j-fsXmK1VUKpWe3r_H8jAcOD7_mhfp6tMiO6kAEbBfnOFwLqpx2hNJ6hvSOPao7qOa7s2mrbl3KFdjb97YcepGb63znqZpcPZGQ8P6ekPE_oqc2v5mViSHCnGy67AK1ZHjmnL7P3GsG_lwpg_l1qZXE_RW615E_0fIWcj5OI72YEdpp2jTO9Z8XjshZxsjcAHzxfEJNe1QqskFTHTgOV_l9o4ukyvAEfZUKlAgWzlFCOZM3kOmPeUq5Nxk7faDQ-AyjEJ1z5fh8MNTf_Pz0fI7AAD__0Yla88) as part of a shift to a digital-first strategy. CNN, which drew just 5.1 million prime-time viewers on Election Night, lagged behind MSNBC's 6 million viewers and Fox News' audience of over 10 million viewers. The network’s workforce is said to be coping with _“an atmosphere of high stress and high anxiety,”_ according to reports. Thompson may also push for salary reductions for top anchors like Anderson Cooper and Erin Burnett. One of the highest-paid CNN stars, Chris Wallace, announced [he was leaving the network](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvTniAAMeGLpkS9eO1sGdk6sIthyUNP--cvdKb3l60vuk7-syX1CK1Osn3jm2ZZ210nYAGMDMhFLes-0pLsyaTc8RvAE7eRum_haVI3IKgraBOOjRIy45GTtO4I2j1Es83gDAHNHhZEZMwAQWIOTkUmcVk7R1P32vUtuNl_Jen7yf8nrvS7y1tj0689Hpc6fPuFV-PY7pKHuTXLjT51zr8MJSMPPAP9IGqcQbV-LaBu-0CwG8G2lMEyVMrNW0hEUZF9Dnfo-0vaQUeTjfWXW9o5Q_evvPxjPq3wAAAP__KN5fuA) after three years.
## Judge Pauses Trump Sentencing
A New York court has paused [all deadlines in President-elect Donald Trump’s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0ULEO3CAU-xqyEfEeNJCBoQvbde0YEXh3oSIhCuSi_H2V7pUsy4NlW_79ml4-5bR9fvmVbHuXCQUqDsBBTtGnfE-qi_ZNhCQ7sqAlqFErM3aLlUOIJgQ_a6lwpFnEQCAMCG20RiO6ZJ80AJAP0PTyh5-BIigAE-ZhZkpQTK0c_Z-StrbQO9_lS0cfytplu7S2VyZ_MnQM3XVd_Vl9K9Hfj4Ghq60cN0O30VUZur3k1FJ45FPM0AE8hAxdLJvPkbfjXHe-nHXha9no5sFX4pF8zGmjynd_VooMnR5gHI1UQmiGrjts3K-Uc6qDZkp8Vp_yv5Xtf699Lf4NAAD__zgsbGc) hush money case, including his Nov. 26 sentencing for 34 felony convictions. Judge Juan Merchan was expected to decide Tuesday on whether Trump’s convictions should be overturned in light of the Supreme Court ruling on presidential immunity, but he delayed that hearing until Nov. 19 at the request of both parties. Trump’s legal team argues [the case should be dismissed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD1vxCAU-zVkI7oH5OMGhi7ZrmvH6AEvF64EokAuyr-v0s6VvNiWLNtfj_GBPvj4_MSFdJnSKG5CcQAOcnTowzmqyumJSJCsSEMnQd071d-rWbseTUNN2zUS5dTKtnEoTEuN6RqQSlReX2kAIC-IvpYNGiAHCqC3pjVM3cj5krb6lXwsM03hTG_aapuWKui5lDUz-cHEwMRwHEcdjY105MtnYlhT8MXbzMTgUsTgeNn2ZWVieO3uSX-Mz3ue-ZIindxiJu4o4Jn5N51826_tHGdCxzPFQtFewmYjQnfvWllt2q2HD8HntmPq9lzQh9965b-73lr8BAAA__8Tdm7R) entirely to avoid “unconstitutional impediments” to his ability to govern. The delay raises uncertainty over whether Trump will be sentenced before taking office—or at all during his presidency.

clean_body: President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday named Elon Musk and former GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy to head up a , or DOGE. | | | | | | Wednesday, November 13, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1940, Disney released Fantasia , a groundbreaking film that combined animation with orchestra music, abstract themes, and stereo sound—and introduced Mickey’s . The House will hold a UFO hearing today, focusing on government secrecy. You can read more about it in today’s edition, but first, we'd like to ask your opinion: Do you think aliens have visited Earth? Take the poll below and let us know. Today's sponsor is . Check out the three foods that could fight memory loss. | Musk, Ramaswamy to Head New Cost-Cutting Agency President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday named Elon Musk and former GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy to head up a , or DOGE. Trump said the new agency "will pave the way for my administration to dismantle government bureaucracy, slash excess regulations, cut wasteful expenditures, and restructure federal agencies." Also on Tuesday, Trump named South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem to , giving her oversight of key federal agencies, including ICE, FEMA, and the Secret Service. Other key announcements included naming former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee as the next U.S. ambassador to Israel and former Director of National Intelligence . Trump also said he planned to nominate as Secretary of Defense. Hegseth served in Iraq and Afghanistan and has worked for Fox since 2014, most recently as a co-host of Fox & Friends Weekend. CNN Plans Layoffs After Ratings Fall CNN CEO Mark Thompson is reportedly of employees following the network’s low ratings during last week’s Election Night coverage. The cuts are expected to target high-paid on-air talent and as part of a shift to a digital-first strategy. CNN, which drew just 5.1 million prime-time viewers on Election Night, lagged behind MSNBC's 6 million viewers and Fox News' audience of over 10 million viewers. The network’s workforce is said to be coping with “an atmosphere of high stress and high anxiety,” according to reports. Thompson may also push for salary reductions for top anchors like Anderson Cooper and Erin Burnett. One of the highest-paid CNN stars, Chris Wallace, announced after three years. Judge Pauses Trump Sentencing A New York court has paused hush money case, including his Nov. 26 sentencing for 34 felony convictions. Judge Juan Merchan was expected to decide Tuesday on whether Trump’s convictions should be overturned in light of the Supreme Court ruling on presidential immunity, but he delayed that hearing until Nov. 19 at the request of both parties. Trump’s legal team argues entirely to avoid “unconstitutional impediments” to his ability to govern. The delay raises uncertainty over whether Trump will be sentenced before taking office—or at all during his presidency. **Good morning!** On this day in 1947, musician [J. C. ## Cornyn Vies For Top Senate Post
U.S. Sen. John Cornyn is in the running to [become the next Senate majority leader](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZEbudoMhcHAJ2Vx6ITK4mfHJ2CNjDcPfr2ajTTYrVUmlp_fvNt9ciCHd_7qdbX1veUaFJAEk6Nm7EK-ZGm8X5Udo2ILRQKPpO9U8rFrVQIY76PqFO0dbp83Wj0ioySAuTbCfMwDQAJqUaQdi2Hhx6zIM0EEvSLEPNZe2Prjy2x1bvPKLS7vmvYn2UevzEPqPwEngdJ5nm5bVb-dnFjglPg-B0zPHUMP6iTEnlkd1Rf4oX7myPDi5motcc0lXkrv7n0uol4zsPBeBk-5HMqQFTk2x_nmGGMPRG0HqvrsQv4nqr4peFr8CAAD__zeHaO4) when the new Congress is sworn in on Jan. 3. After picking up four seats in last week’s elections, Republicans will hold a 53-47 majority in the new Congress. They are meeting behind closed doors today to select who will lead the conference after Minority Leader Mitch McConnell steps down at the end of the year. John Thune of South Dakota and Florida’s Rick Scott are [also running for the position](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ8GZ23RGP8FBJNYl-ylG1oY2mv2MKyAG8Zvf_LkF1VQpU-l7_Nj_dDOu_D1W5-kymuPq-BCAiJgt1rt_LXKxqqN2xkbUjh2KOdx6HlzKKKe283IeTK9RsvNvO2z2QRNA43DaBqnbhgidoid5GM7ScKdNm22acIeByY5WVdiastBhV467_6KT0qtiWfj1VHKT2bdg4mFiaXW2p453B0TCwX4m5lYAtU7YjkoMbFkCvAdjwAmpnAFiDu8wVB1KBlKhI0gU9CF4NTfMblygSdtKcFBiSBDPXS5h39CrEwsOsHjgeXzV_ZNUvanOu9dHkYm-depnX9_Lf-V91TiXwAAAP__RNJ0SQ). Thune currently holds the No. 2 post among Republicans as the party’s “whip,” a position Cornyn previously held from 2013 to 2019. Cornyn and Thune have previously criticized Trump, making Scott the preferred pick among some of the President-elect’s supporters. [All three expressed agreement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAUAL_G3rB4gG0yMHTJlq4dLWyeY1oMFryE-O-rdO9-upPu6zbdrA8-3j_tjoZea5oEF4oBMJCTsz6ck2qdmbm7QIsGRgnqMg49bzcD8wqz1WM_SN1rQACx6HkEJYRY7dK33rxlACABpOJjpxXCirNdZq2hh6FRHJ2nlDvakPBlyxrO9MTcLWlvg9mIjtLIj0ZcG3GttXYRa6mIP2-gEdeC0RKy3X6n7OlkAa3DzCg_9oPR9ojIlpTjGVlZEhGDi1a8l2027qg-BF-GsVH8vlsf_pr074SnEb8BAAD__9W1X6k) with a social media post in which Trump stated his intent to make recess appointments for new Cabinet members.
## Texas A&M Funds $200M Space Institute
The Texas A&M Board of Regents approved more than half a billion dollars in construction projects last week, chief among them a [$200 million Space Institute](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOhCAYRp8GOgw_Vy0otrGbbbc0CL8jCV4i7Djz9hvtt_uSk5wvOT-P4eFTTuvz2y_o6nvaBsGFYgAM5BB9yp9B0ehGHjug6MBKUJ01mtPZRRVDG0BOUwg2gtZSG7TRaOUNj1HT5C4ZAEgAqbhtWoUw4ejD2LagwRDFMaa6HU2dseLblyl_thceTdgWmt1c616I_CKiJ6I_z7MJ87GtFyWiX_EsRPRl9wGJ6P1RU8jXuk3Ms4XdjKW11FR_KzLoOm6k0c0-7_RwcT9TzqkYSxR_Lj7l-7j-W-LlxF8AAAD__8l_YG0) on 32 acres near NASA's Johnson Space Center in Houston. The four-story facility will house [simulated lunar and Martian landscapes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQxfGnMZ2Rx5ivwsVt6HLbLdFgD2DJYIQnkLz9Kum3PtJPR_-fx_jAEMO-_MeNLL_mNGqljQSQUI0eQ3yPpvB2Ur6Hgiy0FZi-bWpVrLZH512tXdVSP6sGSHfTVJted32Hk8Mi2A8GABVAZVRbdoZgpgnd1HVQQyOMIh84nSWvxPTCPMd3uugsXdqKaFfmI4vqn9CD0MN93-WSLia3fnahB_JPhxzSLvSwhmWlU5IXevhSEuUm8TjOdFGWR8RdzumUWqlN5gMdybBnDvxkKk7rjzvEGHLTCqOWDUP8fuA_o1xW_wYAAP__nW1l8A) the size of Kyle Field, along with research garages, labs, offices, classrooms, and an auditorium. Construction is slated to begin in January. Other projects receiving funding include a [$10 million hypersonic wind tunnel](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2SozAQhJ9GZKI0I_EXKLiEzJdeSA3SYOtWIErIxn77LTbfpJPu-qrr-3ebbhRi2O5_aWVb3kuaUKGRABL05CnEz2Qqb2flB6jYQqfBDF3bqOphl34ws5udNqhpQNW3jSflaOiapkdoq2AvGABoAG1UV_eGYeGZ3Nz30EArjGIfSsp1eXDhNx1L_KQX59qltYr2Ucp-CP1H4ChwPM-z_prL-yoFjhdb4AhwBQoct6eLTFlmJldSlntO_9kVmTnGcEhH6_48pEtbCduTD7mmV9juckn5pOwFjlW2fj_DtW47YdR9pRB_rpRf3bwsfgcAAP__7f5mXQ) at the tech-focused RELLIS Campus in Bryan, a $181 million clinical veterinary teaching and research complex, and a $25.3 million training facility for first responders and law enforcement.
## _Michelin Guide Texas_ Debuts
Houston’s 713 Music Hall hosted the award ceremony for the first-ever _Michelin Guide Texas_ , a [list of the state’s top eateries](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQhZ8Gd1gMxmAXFLdxl9tuaYGZ2CNhEwHJJm-_irVbrbYbab7zo_NxmS-OIh3rf7ejrc9rmqWQigNw6ObgKL5m1QTrRRihQQumAzUa3Ytms9ppPxjTB9lrvTiNozcKhUaDEs04NmTfZgDQAXRKmHZQCFf0bvHDAD1opgQGqim3dcOKT1eu8ZUemNsl7U20W623wrp_TE5MTuudArY7LRtGOt4Ik9O9MDnhweTkcqUlIpPTD8JPBV8w456O1-_PGclLdbnwNSMe37cnz9d0z7s7QpNtuH1SjFS0YUqsu6N49qt_Dvaw8isAAP__K95wOA) curated by the French tire company. Dating back to 1900, the Guide awards one, two, or three stars to restaurants [based on five criteria](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO5CAQBNCvwRkW3cYGBwSXONtLL7TaphkjYbMCZr3796eZfKMKSnoq1b-P9YNiitfjL53s2nfIKyrUEkDCsHqK6WfVnXeb8jN07MAMoGczjao7nKFpU542xXpgnK3FaQqBN_CTGRG2LroXBgADwKCV6a1mCLzRvlkLI0xCK_ax5dK3gxt_Uw3pJ39x6fd8dskdrX1WMfwRuAhc7vvu70D0KgUuVFrcEwtcUgyvCDl7gcsZ94NTvOTjGT3L2qjIty0L10bPQler8o7XxaVKH2555Gdt-RK4oDXS4Gh33pXcg0WpaWRJAWY5Dwop-NnM2nbF-c87phTrZIRWj5Nieo9uv7745fB_AAAA___8jHPJ), including ingredient quality, mastery of flavors and cooking techniques, and consistency across visits. While no Texas restaurants received the incredibly rare two- or three-star award, 15 received one star. [Austin led the way](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFygzAQRL9GdGJ0JxnhQkUaOqdNyRziMJoR4EFnx_77jO2kTHPN7b7d2a9Tf6KU03r-pIWD3KetR4NOA2iw_UgpP3pXjWEw4xEqDuAtuKNvDqaaAzfGRE84-QgHaiZPbIbILTKyjYxVCk8YAFgA64yvW8cw8UBxaFs4QKOc4THJttcys_CdypQf2433Om5LlcMscinKfijsFHZ0LZLWmkneAoXdk6-wA_g76PBofeN_f_rt0UuKM-e06iK0652L0HWnVYp-pVZ7GC_fKedUGq-cOS-U8quD_DvKLeBPAAAA___8sWJA) with seven, followed by Houston with five. Dallas, San Antonio, and Spring each have a single one-star restaurant. The Guide also named 45 restaurants receiving the Bib Gourmand recognition, which highlights establishments offering exceptional food at moderate prices. [See the list here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQhZ8Gd1gMxmAXFLdxl9tuaYGZ2CNhEwHJJm-_irVbrbYbab7zo_NxmS-OIh3rf7ejrc9rmqWQigNw6ObgKL5m1QTrRRihQQumAzUa3Ytms9ppPxjTB9lrvTiNozcKhUaDEs04NmTfZgDQAXRKmHZQCFf0bvHDAD1opgQGqim3dcOKT1eu8ZUemNsl7U20W623wrp_TE5MTuudArY7LRtGOt4Ik9O9MDnhweTkcqUlIpPTD8JPBV8w456O1-_PGclLdbnwNSMe37cnz9d0z7s7QpNtuH1SjFS0YUqsu6N49qt_Dvaw8isAAP__K95wOA).

John Cornyn is in the running to when the new Congress is sworn in on Jan. 3. After picking up four seats in last week’s elections, Republicans will hold a 53-47 majority in the new Congress. They are meeting behind closed doors today to select who will lead the conference after Minority Leader Mitch McConnell steps down at the end of the year. John Thune of South Dakota and Florida’s Rick Scott are . Thune currently holds the No. 2 post among Republicans as the party’s “whip,” a position Cornyn previously held from 2013 to 2019. Cornyn and Thune have previously criticized Trump, making Scott the preferred pick among some of the President-elect’s supporters. with a social media post in which Trump stated his intent to make recess appointments for new Cabinet members. Texas A&M Funds $200M Space Institute The Texas A&M Board of Regents approved more than half a billion dollars in construction projects last week, chief among them a on 32 acres near NASA's Johnson Space Center in Houston. The four-story facility will house the size of Kyle Field, along with research garages, labs, offices, classrooms, and an auditorium. Construction is slated to begin in January. Other projects receiving funding include a at the tech-focused RELLIS Campus in Bryan, a $181 million clinical veterinary teaching and research complex, and a $25.3 million training facility for first responders and law enforcement. Michelin Guide Texas Debuts Houston’s 713 Music Hall hosted the award ceremony for the first-ever Michelin Guide Texas , a curated by the French tire company. Dating back to 1900, the Guide awards one, two, or three stars to restaurants , including ingredient quality, mastery of flavors and cooking techniques, and consistency across visits. While no Texas restaurants received the incredibly rare two- or three-star award, 15 received one star. with seven, followed by Houston with five. Dallas, San Antonio, and Spring each have a single one-star restaurant. The Guide also named 45 restaurants receiving the Bib Gourmand recognition, which highlights establishments offering exceptional food at moderate prices. . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z01cmebhkq33ddejso14d09rsbsalrtkr6nsdi40_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6aob2cjh2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2oblcm49hno5cvptsma4cbv6rh8bvm224492lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6aob2cjh2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjper7hpjrv5aspi6mild6g1fq9bnuhau2qmekf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6aob2cjh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjucpvqp9q675od1t2hb7ecoqn5bd88ujel7e8bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6aob2cjh2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znmi3nis4f80i4k5bjaer7009bvui6qhsl69mlco_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6aob2cjh2bs)
---

---

subject: Friend, can you do me a huge favor?

body:

Friend, this is Senator Ted Cruz.

I want to once again say thank you for your unwavering support, not just for my campaign but for so many across the country.

_YOU_ are the reason Republicans took back the Senate, and we're counting on your input for continued success.

_**[That's why I'm specifically reaching out to you about this poll.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zptrbq68mvsp123srnitqehunn8j0r6i66tjh2oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4c5h2bs)**_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Defend the next generation
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5f4k82gjpgfkoomm7dkbangfhdure5hgu5fvd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4cph2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsm080bo7hblpob7hq70cadeovbt8e3527himrcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4cph2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs78e39dukrmhcd0ahf56mnn04kg0oofdhj5da4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4cph2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqsv02gpacek59b8656hfsukko40bbrqq9asnvvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4cph2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6e5efstfhic37a7ofsi4jkksqcif7nci306nm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli66pj4cph2bs)
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Defend the next generation
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z08kg64315k5lbmoflq0jmg82m5j3g0s7gt26668_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6eoj4cdh2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zp2fq459cnvkm3au1shhp1dil2un7tgdmt8ikgsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6eoj4cdh2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkqhle9g3o4eqfdsip7miu8370ao0atb11s4arb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6eoj4cdh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgfvf31glqs8epbln6tl4dua9nhdvj8coe472qpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cli6eoj4cdh2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

name: History Facts
subject: The myth of Betsy Ross 🇺🇸
body:
In 1777, Congress passed a resolution dictating that the official flag of the newly founded United States would consist of 13 white stars against a blue background, and 13 alternating red and white stripes. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bej61ehqboi2moda6msf6h65v0z3tq76lpe7xz6t0bywzvdfvbii2fh5xnft59pnnmz1xwv9bp0hlr2kd93fq0bsuvpncypc4r7jv30lg5vymyssvajd9gqpwtwgdpzp0r0h0erpqhw8wfp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Betsy Ross probably didn't make the first American flag.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n 1777, Congress passed a resolution dictating that the official flag of the newly founded United States would consist of 13 white stars against a blue background, and 13 alternating red and white stripes. According to popular myth, the first American flag was subsequently created by Philadelphia resident Elizabeth “Betsy” Ross. There’s just one problem with this common narrative: There’s [no evidence](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that it’s actually true.
---
The claim that Betsy Ross made the first American flag didn’t surface until 1870 — nearly a century after the nation’s founding — in a speech Ross’ grandson William Canby delivered to the Historical Society of Pennsylvania. Canby said that his grandmother would often recount a [story](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the time she received a visit from George Washington, who presented her with a proposed design of 13 stripes and 13 six-pointed stars, and asked if she could create a flag based on the sketch. According to Canby, Ross agreed, and even came up with the idea to give the stars five points instead of six, and to arrange them in a circle.
Canby’s story was compelling, and the speech was widely circulated in popular newspapers. Before long, it became accepted as fact that Ross created the first American flag. However, although Canby produced affidavits from Ross’ daughter and granddaughter corroborating the tale, he never offered any concrete evidence — including, crucially, the flag itself. (In fact, there’s no evidence of any American flag that can be traced back to Ross.) Over the years, historians have called Canby’s account into question, and while it’s been established that Ross did sew flags for the Pennsylvania Navy, some historians suggest the original Stars and Stripes was actually created by Francis Hopkinson, a New Jersey delegate to the Continental Congress. They cite a bill that Hopkinson sent to the Congress in 1780, asking for payment for designing “the flag of the United States of America.” But this theory also remains unconfirmed, as the Congress refused to pay Hopkinson for his services, [claiming](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) he “was not the only one consulted.” To date, the true origin of the American flag remains a mystery.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---|---|---
## The flag that “The Star-Spangled Banner” is based on can still be seen today.
“The Star-Spangled Banner,” the United States national anthem, is based on a specific American flag made in 1813 by [Mary Pickersgill](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smw1nc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a Baltimore designer and seamstress. Her flag became immortalized when Baltimore’s Fort McHenry was attacked by the British navy in September 1814, during the (misleadingly named) War of 1812. After several days of fighting, the United States finally emerged victorious, and as the British fleet retreated, the large American flag that Pickersgill had made was raised above the fort. At 30 by 42 feet, the flag was so massive, it could be seen for miles around the fort, including by American Francis Scott Key, who was on board a British ship 8 miles away negotiating the release of a prisoner. The sight inspired Key to write the poem “Defence of Fort M'Henry,” whose words became the lyrics to “The Star-Spangled Banner.” Pickersgill’s flag, with its unusual arrangement of 15 stars and 15 stripes, can still be seen today (though it’s missing one of its stars) on display at the Smithsonian National Museum of American History in Washington, D.C.

clean_body: In 1777, Congress passed a resolution dictating that the official flag of the newly founded United States would consist of 13 white stars against a blue background, and 13 alternating red and white stripes. | I n 1777, Congress passed a resolution dictating that the official flag of the newly founded United States would consist of 13 white stars against a blue background, and 13 alternating red and white stripes. According to popular myth, the first American flag was subsequently created by Philadelphia resident Elizabeth “Betsy” Ross. There’s just one problem with this common narrative: There’s that it’s actually true. The claim that Betsy Ross made the first American flag didn’t surface until 1870 — nearly a century after the nation’s founding — in a speech Ross’ grandson William Canby delivered to the Historical Society of Pennsylvania. Canby said that his grandmother would often recount a of the time she received a visit from George Washington, who presented her with a proposed design of 13 stripes and 13 six-pointed stars, and asked if she could create a flag based on the sketch. According to Canby, Ross agreed, and even came up with the idea to give the stars five points instead of six, and to arrange them in a circle. Canby’s story was compelling, and the speech was widely circulated in popular newspapers. Before long, it became accepted as fact that Ross created the first American flag. However, although Canby produced affidavits from Ross’ daughter and granddaughter corroborating the tale, he never offered any concrete evidence — including, crucially, the flag itself. (In fact, there’s no evidence of any American flag that can be traced back to Ross.) Over the years, historians have called Canby’s account into question, and while it’s been established that Ross did sew flags for the Pennsylvania Navy, some historians suggest the original Stars and Stripes was actually created by Francis Hopkinson, a New Jersey delegate to the Continental Congress. They cite a bill that Hopkinson sent to the Congress in 1780, asking for payment for designing “the flag of the United States of America.” But this theory also remains unconfirmed, as the Congress refused to pay Hopkinson for his services, he “was not the only one consulted.” To date, the true origin of the American flag remains a mystery. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Area (in square feet) of the Superflag, the largest American flag ever made 128,775 | | Age (in years) of the Danish flag, the oldest continuously used national flag 398 | Age (in years) of the Danish flag, the oldest continuously used national flag 398 | | American flags currently on the moon 6 | | Price paid for a Revolutionary War battle flag from 1779, the most expensive flag ever sold $12.3 million | Price paid for a Revolutionary War battle flag from 1779, the most expensive flag ever sold $12.3 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The flag that “The Star-Spangled Banner” is based on can still be seen today. “The Star-Spangled Banner,” the United States national anthem, is based on a specific American flag made in 1813 by , a Baltimore designer and seamstress. Her flag became immortalized when Baltimore’s Fort McHenry was attacked by the British navy in September 1814, during the (misleadingly named) War of 1812. After several days of fighting, the United States finally emerged victorious, and as the British fleet retreated, the large American flag that Pickersgill had made was raised above the fort. At 30 by 42 feet, the flag was so massive, it could be seen for miles around the fort, including by American Francis Scott Key, who was on board a British ship 8 miles away negotiating the release of a prisoner. The sight inspired Key to write the poem “Defence of Fort M'Henry,” whose words became the lyrics to “The Star-Spangled Banner.” Pickersgill’s flag, with its unusual arrangement of 15 stars and 15 stripes, can still be seen today (though it’s missing one of its stars) on display at the Smithsonian National Museum of American History in Washington, D.C. I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard, whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election.
Now, let’s finish the job.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

| OnePA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/13/2024
body:
Republican strategist to grassroots: ‘Help cure ballots’ in tight HD 16, 19 races
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Today's edition brings you insights on races that have [yet to be called](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Colorado's evolving energy landscape, with Northwest Colorado showing [openness to nuclear power generation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), as revealed in a recent survey. We also dive into local political dynamics, with "Uncle Benny" calling on Republicans to [rethink funding strategies for down-ballot races](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to maximize impact in future elections. Meanwhile, an in-depth look at [Denver’s spending on homelessness services](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) raises questions about effectiveness and accountability in tackling this complex issue.
Other articles to look forward to in today's newsletter? ➡️ [Colorado announces possible release areas for next wave of introduced wolves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ➡️ [In ‘Griswoldgate’, it is time to prove we have the ‘gold standard’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ➡️ [Why risk-limiting audits are risky (software is auditing software)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ➡️ [Devotional: Refined through trials, the gift of suffering well](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Lastly, more Trump appointments were made today! Trump is expected to select Kristi Noem to head [Department of Homeland Security](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Rep. Mike Waltz, R-Fla., has been offered the role of [national security adviser](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee is the choice to be the next [U.S. ambassador to Israel](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In other good news, Republicans are projected to keep control of the House of Representatives, [delivering Trump a trifecta](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 12, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Republican strategist to grassroots: ‘Help cure ballots’ in tight HD 16, 19 races](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
If Republicans are able to hang on to razor-thin leads in two Colorado House races, it would prevent veto-proof Democrat supermajorities in both state legislative chambers.
As of late Tuesday, Republican Rebecca Keltie led Democrat Steph Vigil by 21 votes in House District 16, while Republican Dan Woog led Democrat Jillaire McMillan by 207 votes in House District 19.
“These two races are still too close to call and will come down to the wire,” said Tyler Sandberg, chief campaign strategist for Colorado House Republicans.
The El Paso County House District 16 was separated Monday evening by 0.06%, or six one-hundredths of one percent after counting of 41,007 votes. Woog has a little more breathing room, but not much, in District 19. The former member of the Colorado House leads by 0.38% in the Boulder and Weld County district.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Northwest Colorado open to prospect of nuclear power generation, survey says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Northwest Colorado is considering nuclear power generation as a replacement for fossil fuels, with a recent survey showing local residents' strong support for small nuclear modular energy, which is favored over other alternatives like wind or solar.
* The survey, led by the Northwest Colorado Energy Initiative (NCEI), found that regional residents highly value reliable, affordable electricity, along with energy independence, and are notably more knowledgeable and supportive of nuclear energy than the general U.S. public.
* With local coal power stations closing, the area is exploring nuclear options as a potential economic and energy solution, with existing infrastructure making it a feasible choice for the future.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘Uncle Benny’ urges Republicans to change approach to down-ballot funding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Republican Ben Aste, who ran for Larimer County District 3, is advocating for a "future election monies" account, encouraging small, consistent donations to build a funding base for future campaigns.
* Republican candidates like Donna Walter and Phoebe McWilliams noted the challenges they faced without large donors, emphasizing the need for grassroots support and strategic financial planning.
* Former Senator Kevin Lundberg highlighted the broader impact of Republican candidates running in tough districts, which pressures Democratic opponents to spread their resources thinner.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Denver spent $138M in two years to rent, lease hotels for homeless and illegals](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Since January 2023, Denver has spent approximately $138 million on purchasing and leasing hotels to house homeless individuals and migrants, utilizing mostly federal COVID-19 relief funds which are set to expire in 2025.
* Mayor Mike Johnston’s administration has accelerated this initiative, acquiring properties such as the DoubleTree in Central Park and Embassy Suites in Hampden, aiming to house 1,000 people by the end of 2023 and beyond.
* Although this hotel strategy has met some success, including housing 2,000 people since Johnston’s term began, Denver faces challenges in sustaining this model once federal funds run out.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado announces possible release areas for next wave of introduced wolves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) plans to release 10-15 wolves from British Columbia in Colorado's northern zone during the 2024-25 season, with Pitkin, Garfield, Rio Blanco, and Eagle counties as potential sites.
* The decision for these locations considers factors like habitat suitability and proximity to livestock, following earlier backlash over CPW’s initial reintroduction strategy, which involved secrecy and led to significant livestock predation incidents.
* Following a loss of support from Washington's Confederated Tribes, British Columbia has offered wolves for Colorado's program, with CPW pledging increased transparency and collaboration with local stakeholders in the new release phase.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Lundberg: In ‘Griswoldgate’, it is time to prove we have the ‘gold standard’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KEVIN LUNDBERG, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_When Tina Peters was accused of sharing Mesa County election equipment password,s all of the machines were replaced and she got several years in prison._
_But, when the shoe is on the other foot and Secretary of State Griswold (SOS) is caught publicly exposing more than 600 complete BIOS passwords of election machines from all across Colorado and kept it a secret for several days right before the election, it becomes an honest mistake and no big deal._
_I say either pardon Tina or arrest Jena. Or, better yet, do both, for Jena is clearly guilty of withholding the facts from the public and Tina was just trying to get to the truth, so everyone could know those facts._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Carr: Why risk-limiting audits are risky (software is auditing software)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY TASHA CARR, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_As an election watcher, I have witnessed many risk-limiting audits (RLAs) in Larimer County._
_I was immediately struck by how inadequate they seemed because the most important audit step is hidden within the RLA tool and is not observable by the audit board or election watchers._ ___After reading the so-called “gentle introduction” to RLAs, I quickly learned that my skepticism was justified. The problem is not with the RLAs per se, but that Colorado is not doing the RLAs correctly and as a result cannot guarantee that the election outcomes are correct._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Devotional: Refined through trials, the gift of suffering well](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Suffering and flourishing may seem like opposites, yet they often walk hand-in-hand. Some of our deepest growth springs up from our darkest trials._ ___Just look at Christian history: Jesus’ suffering wasn’t a detour, but a central part of His journey— and many of His earliest followers faced the ultimate cost for their faith. Their sacrifices remind us that we, too, share in Christ’s suffering. When Jesus spoke of drinking of the same cup and being baptized similarly (Mark 10:39), He invited us to follow Him even through suffering, knowing that it has the power to transform us and resurrect us to a new life._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Garfield County deputy terminated for alleged embezzlement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 11** _Corp. Trisha Worley, a 14-year veteran of the Garfield County Sheriff’s Office has been terminated for allegations of embezzlement, a a press release from Garfield County Sheriff Lou Vallario reads._
**[With Evans victory in 8th District, Colorado Republicans earned split in U.S. House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | NOVEMBER 11** _Gabe Evans has delivered on a seat Republicans always believed they could capture._ _“Black Hawk helicopter pilot, Army veteran, Arvada police officer, state representative, grandson of immigrants, and now: Congressman,” said Delanie Bomar, a spokeswoman for the Republican National Congressional Committee._
__
[**Western Slope livestock raisers seek answers on wolf concerns from CPW**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY LINDY BROWNING | STATE |****NOVEMBER 11** _Livestock raisers from the Western Slope are trying to plan ahead as Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) prepares to relocate another 10 wolves on the western landscape this winter._

**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** One of the **strangest conflicts in history** , the "War of the Stray Dog," occurred in 1925 between Greece and Bulgaria. It started when a Greek soldier chased his dog across the border into Bulgaria and was shot, leading to a brief and intense skirmish that resulted in at least 50 casualties.

**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
“Every man is said to have his peculiar ambition. Whether it be true or not, I can say for one that I have no other so great as that of being truly esteemed of my fellow men.” – Abraham Lincoln

This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 12, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY BRIAN PORTER, If Republicans are able to hang on to razor-thin leads in two Colorado House races, it would prevent veto-proof Democrat supermajorities in both state legislative chambers. As of late Tuesday, Republican Rebecca Keltie led Democrat Steph Vigil by 21 votes in House District 16, while Republican Dan Woog led Democrat Jillaire McMillan by 207 votes in House District 19. “These two races are still too close to call and will come down to the wire,” said Tyler Sandberg, chief campaign strategist for Colorado House Republicans. The El Paso County House District 16 was separated Monday evening by 0.06%, or six one-hundredths of one percent after counting of 41,007 votes. Woog has a little more breathing room, but not much, in District 19. The former member of the Colorado House leads by 0.38% in the Boulder and Weld County district. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Northwest Colorado is considering nuclear power generation as a replacement for fossil fuels, with a recent survey showing local residents' strong support for small nuclear modular energy, which is favored over other alternatives like wind or solar. The survey, led by the Northwest Colorado Energy Initiative (NCEI), found that regional residents highly value reliable, affordable electricity, along with energy independence, and are notably more knowledgeable and supportive of nuclear energy than the general U.S. public. With local coal power stations closing, the area is exploring nuclear options as a potential economic and energy solution, with existing infrastructure making it a feasible choice for the future. | Colorado Republican Ben Aste, who ran for Larimer County District 3, is advocating for a "future election monies" account, encouraging small, consistent donations to build a funding base for future campaigns. Republican candidates like Donna Walter and Phoebe McWilliams noted the challenges they faced without large donors, emphasizing the need for grassroots support and strategic financial planning. Former Senator Kevin Lundberg highlighted the broader impact of Republican candidates running in tough districts, which pressures Democratic opponents to spread their resources thinner. | Since January 2023, Denver has spent approximately $138 million on purchasing and leasing hotels to house homeless individuals and migrants, utilizing mostly federal COVID-19 relief funds which are set to expire in 2025. Mayor Mike Johnston’s administration has accelerated this initiative, acquiring properties such as the DoubleTree in Central Park and Embassy Suites in Hampden, aiming to house 1,000 people by the end of 2023 and beyond. Although this hotel strategy has met some success, including housing 2,000 people since Johnston’s term began, Denver faces challenges in sustaining this model once federal funds run out. | Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) plans to release 10-15 wolves from British Columbia in Colorado's northern zone during the 2024-25 season, with Pitkin, Garfield, Rio Blanco, and Eagle counties as potential sites. The decision for these locations considers factors like habitat suitability and proximity to livestock, following earlier backlash over CPW’s initial reintroduction strategy, which involved secrecy and led to significant livestock predation incidents. Following a loss of support from Washington's Confederated Tribes, British Columbia has offered wolves for Colorado's program, with CPW pledging increased transparency and collaboration with local stakeholders in the new release phase. | BY KEVIN LUNDBERG, When Tina Peters was accused of sharing Mesa County election equipment password,s all of the machines were replaced and she got several years in prison. But, when the shoe is on the other foot and Secretary of State Griswold (SOS) is caught publicly exposing more than 600 complete BIOS passwords of election machines from all across Colorado and kept it a secret for several days right before the election, it becomes an honest mistake and no big deal. I say either pardon Tina or arrest Jena. Or, better yet, do both, for Jena is clearly guilty of withholding the facts from the public and Tina was just trying to get to the truth, so everyone could know those facts. | BY TASHA CARR, As an election watcher, I have witnessed many risk-limiting audits (RLAs) in Larimer County. I was immediately struck by how inadequate they seemed because the most important audit step is hidden within the RLA tool and is not observable by the audit board or election watchers. _After reading the so-called “gentle introduction” to RLAs, I quickly learned that my skepticism was justified. The problem is not with the RLAs per se, but that Colorado is not doing the RLAs correctly and as a result cannot guarantee that the election outcomes are correct. | BY DRAKE HUNTER, Suffering and flourishing may seem like opposites, yet they often walk hand-in-hand. Some of our deepest growth springs up from our darkest trials. _Just look at Christian history: Jesus’ suffering wasn’t a detour, but a central part of His journey— and many of His earliest followers faced the ultimate cost for their faith. Their sacrifices remind us that we, too, share in Christ’s suffering. When Jesus spoke of drinking of the same cup and being baptized similarly (Mark 10:39), He invited us to follow Him even through suffering, knowing that it has the power to transform us and resurrect us to a new life. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 11 Corp. Trisha Worley, a 14-year veteran of the Garfield County Sheriff’s Office has been terminated for allegations of embezzlement, a a press release from Garfield County Sheriff Lou Vallario reads. BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | NOVEMBER 11 Gabe Evans has delivered on a seat Republicans always believed they could capture. “Black Hawk helicopter pilot, Army veteran, Arvada police officer, state representative, grandson of immigrants, and now: Congressman,” said Delanie Bomar, a spokeswoman for the Republican National Congressional Committee. BY LINDY BROWNING | STATE |NOVEMBER 11 Livestock raisers from the Western Slope are trying to plan ahead as Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) prepares to relocate another 10 wolves on the western landscape this winter._ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? One of the strangest conflicts in history , the "War of the Stray Dog," occurred in 1925 between Greece and Bulgaria. It started when a Greek soldier chased his dog across the border into Bulgaria and was shot, leading to a brief and intense skirmish that resulted in at least 50 casualties. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “Every man is said to have his peculiar ambition. Whether it be true or not, I can say for one that I have no other so great as that of being truly esteemed of my fellow men.” – Abraham Lincoln | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Thank you for your steadfast support for our candidates. Senate Republicans could not have won this new majority without you.

Thank you, Friend.

Thanks to your constant support and generous contributions of time and effort, Republicans took back the Senate majority last week and elected Donald Trump to another term as President.

We are excited about this incredible opportunity to pass legislation to Make America Great Again and restore us to the prosperity we enjoyed thanks to President Trump.

We are humbled by the hard work and generous donations of our volunteers, donors, and every supporter who stepped up to this critical effort.

**[Senate Republicans couldn't have done this without you, Friend.

But there's still work to do. With votes to still be counted in Pennsylvania, we have a chance to increase our Senate majority!

I know times are still tough because of the Biden-Harris economy, but if you can spare even $5, it will help us further our Senate majority.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgj66nii3ar5f2c64ojmq6jtlife16h9igh4chtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clh60o74c9h2bs)**

_Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight for conservative values and the American Dream._
For America's Future!
