name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: Can you do me a huge favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Here’s a personal link, just for you

Friend, two things:

1.) Thank you for always being a steadfast conservative. Thanks to you, we kept Texas [RED](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb706h4mo8nicaj67e43r5vutqam22dl4cgftaao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clh60o74cph2bs) and won back the Senate Majority.

2.) Can you do me a huge favor? **[Will you fill out our Senate Majority Survey to let Senate Republicans know what you want us to focus on in the first 100 days?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlf4oi4sgaap5t1vv2vgjls56nd4245r1d8lt0mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clh60o74cph2bs)**

Here's the link: **[SenateMajoritySurvey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3126qv4oghbq4l0o2b9pnuh3u55uhvommack4d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clh60o74cph2bs)**** **

Just as your participation was critical to our victories on Election Day, it will be critical to our success delivering conservative wins next year.

Thank you,

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpsg5mfbnb5ndaf6e6uorcchfvkkccrqij0vo6io_rp22sh2s8i6epj4clh60o74cph2bs)

subject: The most important race in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, Bob Casey needs your help in Pennsylvania RIGHT NOW.
**[Donate to Bob Casey ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-1&refcode2=4835_552475_7Ick3H&akid=4835%2E552475%2E7Ick3H)**
This race is still _too close to call_ , and we need to act fast to make sure that Pennsylvanians' voices are heard. Bob’s team needs urgent resources to keep this work going.
I’m not $#!ting you when I say this is **the most important race in the country now.** We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat. Bob Casey MUST be re-elected to stand up to Republicans and Donald Trump in the Senate.

She's a reminder that our work is not over and sometimes the fight takes a while. We wanted to thank her for taking a stand against Trump's extremism and showing us that we can have a bright future ahead of us. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc679419-7e67-4872-a15f-d900e6aefea5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Old GLory Today
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OxienU5UNtiDFtqmbZ-uww~~/AARclAA~_BHPNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OxienU5UNtiDFtqmbZ-uww~~/AARclAA~_BHPNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OxienU5UNtiDFtqmbZ-uww~~/AARclAA~_BHPNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OxienU5UNtiDFtqmbZ-uww~~/AARclAA~_BHPNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Old Glory Today
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w4CJDq6OkjAB8EV3TntuLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF0h4P0RhaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQub2xkZ2xvcnl0b2RheS5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmUvP2I9T2xkLUdsb3J5LVRvZGF5LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnK02uNGevwRzzUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6B2G3njCsXdpgSSJ-6Uo5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF0h4P0QmaHR0cHM6Ly9vbGRnbG9yeXRvZGF5LmNvbS9wcml2YWN5Lmh0bWxXA3NwY0IKZytNrjRnr8Ec81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_

name: Thank You @ USO
subject: On behalf of service members around the world and all of us at the USO:
body:
It's not too late to honor a hero in your life!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[HONOR A HERO](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[**THANK YOU for your support
this Veterans Day!**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~NY0J7/UU9Tc0lrSzdrY1FJQ3h6WkxZcUIweEhzNEYyWjU2TzRUNTdUSk5vYVcwQmYxbWU3V1k5VWpwUG5CK3pVWnpPNUMwWVRTemJaSTNZVTA4Y2x4TVZaZFNxdHlQbkV2SE1YOHAwUHNYQ0JHNmM9S0/UjJ5RmtIeGZLSzBPRGVtcHdPWHJWQS96eVkyWjBSamZqdkxpa2RrVmp4ME9CNDgzWEVBWVNDSmk1QlFRejZBYmw2U2ZQWG1UYmp6Y2dqQXNORDZZWGNNdHAxWXFZaDl3S0)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/4NKwHKrP~6Hb/UU9Tc0lrSzdrY1FJQ3h6WkxZcUIweEhzNEYyWjU2TzRUNTdUSk5vYVcwQmYxbWU3V1k5VWpwUG5CK3pVWnpPNUMwWVRTemJaSTNZVTA4Y2x4TVZaZFNxdHlQbkV2SE1YOHAwUHNYQ0JHNmM9S0/UjJ5RmtIeGZLSzBPRGVtcHdPWHJWQS96eVkyWjBSamZqdkxpa2RrVmp4ME9CNDgzWEVBWVNDSmk1QlFRejZBYmw2U2ZQWG1UYmp6Y2dqQXNORDZZWGNNdHAxWXFZaDl3S0)
USO Supporter,
We are so grateful for your support this Veterans Day -- and always! Thank you to the thousands of proud supporters who signed our **[Military Heroes Honor Wall](https://links.e.uso.)** and to everyone who donated in honor of all who have served our country.
Thanks to caring military supporters who took advantage of our match offer from the NFL, we're well-positioned to support members of our military and their families this holiday season and beyond.
We'll be able to provide service members with more connections to loved ones, more care packages filled with essential supplies and reminders of home, more support for their families and more support transitioning back to civilian life. All of this is only possible thanks to support from friends like you.
As you read this, our staff members and volunteers at USO Centers across the world are ramping up their efforts for our service members this holiday season.
We asked you to step up in honor of Veterans Day, and you did so in a big way. Many of us at the USO are veterans or the loved ones of veterans, so we know how much your support means to the members of our military and those who love them.
**We can 't thank you enough.**
Sincerely,
Team USO
P.S. If you haven't had the chance to do so yet, **[please share your tribute on our Military Heroes Honor Wall now.](https://links.e.uso.)**

name: Her Bold Move
subject: The glimmer of light…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97019437/512004701/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241113glimmer_N_JZ_90DO_9_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZmNjZGMwLWNiYTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Nh9DG48L-xSwz98B5zVRoKL3gpApxlH2J8wZE-eypqQ=)
---
Hi Peter,

As the dust settles from the unbelievably disappointing results of last week’s elections, it has become obvious that misogyny and sexism are not flaws within the MAGA movement... they’re features OF the movement itself.

We have every reason to believe that the attacks on women’s rights will continue to take even more dangerous shape in the months and years to come. For example, in the days since Trump’s victory, young men have started a disturbing trend of commenting on women’s social media posts, “Your body. MY choice.”

We are sickened, and we WILL NOT STAND FOR IT.

But here is the glimmer of light getting us through these hard days:

Women have made unimaginable progress in less than 1 century. Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember a time when women couldn't even open their own credit cards or apply for high paying jobs. None of the rights women have today were handed to us. Women fought TIRELESSLY for them. They committed to never giving up and won SO MANY critical battles.

We will continue to win these important battles – as long as we never give up the fight.

**Over the next few years, the work we do at Her Bold Move will be more important than ever.** We MUST continue working to elect pro-choice, **pro-WOMEN** women to our government AT ALL LEVELS. We must continue the work of unseating the legislators who worked to strip us of our rights.

We have a vision for this country, and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. We will get there. But it will take continued work and determination. We hope you’ll continue to join us.

[**Donate to Her Bold Move today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_C_241113glimmer_N_JZ_90DO_9_NG_N_L1)

With love and solidarity,

Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more.

**Will you support us with a contribution today?** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97019438/512004702/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241113glimmer_N_JZ_90DO_9_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZmNjZGMwLWNiYTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Nh9DG48L-xSwz98B5zVRoKL3gpApxlH2J8wZE-eypqQ=)

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Tell the judge in Trump's hush money trial: Don't dismiss the charges just because Trump won the election!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't dismiss Trump's criminal charges just because he won the election](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb71a765-c7d2-43c0-b507-403ab240cf09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb69dadd-af1b-47d7-935e-0f9b22a76867/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump's lawyers are pushing to overturn his convictions in the so-called "hush money" case, because he won the presidential election. And the court is [considering](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f295198-e418-4f9b-946d-935b7a8918fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) it. **How the hell does this make any sense?** If a student burns down the school, but then wins the vote for homecoming queen, would there be no punishment? If I rob a bank, but then get a coffee mug with "world's greatest dad", do I get to keep the money? Trump was convicted of a crime. 34 of them, in fact. And he should be punished and serve his time. At worst, that could be delayed. But overturned? Hell no. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump's convictions not be dismissed, and that he be punished for his crimes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ebc624e-7ba2-4c83-be7d-6c781e1afad7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T273268c1-bdc1-487f-b221-21b28528149c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

This is HUGE for the California GOP.

Trump's performance shattered expectations and unleashed a RED WAVE across America, claiming victory in:
* Presidency
* Popular vote
* Senate majority
* State governor majority
* State legislature majority

_**And now, California is officially in PLAY.**_
Trump's impact is undeniable. California is not the "deep blue" fortress they want you to believe. Trump won over 40% of the vote and flipped KEY counties - San Bernardino, Orange, Riverside, Fresno - counties once locked in by Democrats. California is waking up. _**The message is LOUD and CLEAR****:**_ voters here are DONE with failed Democratic policies, and the media and political analysts were wrong. The Golden State is changing, and Trump flipping counties here proves it. For too long, Californians have been told that change was impossible, that one-party rule would suffocate this state forever. Not anymore. We are reshaping California's future, as we're reaching the working class, bridging divides between urban and rural voters, and standing up for REAL change. Now, it's up to YOU to keep this momentum alive. As a dedicated supporter, we need your input on what issues the California GOP should prioritize to make the greatest impact. **[

Trump's performance shattered expectations and unleashed a RED WAVE across America, claiming victory in: Presidency Popular vote Senate majority State governor majority State legislature majority And now, California is officially in PLAY. Trump's impact is undeniable. California is not the "deep blue" fortress they want you to believe. Trump won over 40% of the vote and flipped KEY counties - San Bernardino, Orange, Riverside, Fresno - counties once locked in by Democrats. California is waking up. The message is LOUD and CLEAR**: voters here are DONE with failed Democratic policies, and the media and political analysts were wrong. The Golden State is changing, and Trump flipping counties here proves it. For too long, Californians have been told that change was impossible, that one-party rule would suffocate this state forever. name: Elisabeth Smith
subject: [U.S. ELECTION RESULTS] Abortion Ballot Measures
body:
We need you in the fight | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021464/512011542/2141984067?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021465/512011543/2141984067?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

Despite Donald Trump's victory, Americans came out to show strong support for abortion rights, [**approving amendments in seven states**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021466/512011544/-1651364967?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237) to enshrine those rights into their state constitutions.

Since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ in 2022 and took away the federal constitutional right to abortion, voters in 14 states have come out in favor of abortion rights.

The terrible harms of abortion bans have become clearer by the day—and they've helped to galvanize Americans to come out and demand their reproductive freedom. This year, voters in seven states passed ballot measures to protect and expand access to abortion in Arizona, Colorado, Maryland, Missouri, Montana, Nevada, and New York.

Our team is clear when we say: **the Center for Reproductive Rights will vigorously oppose any attempts to roll back progress.** [**Your support is paramount as we continue this fight forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021467/512011545/2141984067?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237)

In Pennsylvania, across the country, and around the world, abortion and bodily autonomy should be recognized as basic human rights. We will take on this fight at every possible turn and we will NEVER give up.

[**Are you with us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021468/512011546/2141984067?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237)

Onward,

Elisabeth Smith
Director, State Policy & Advocacy | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97021469/512011547/2141984067?sourceid=1150033&utm_campaign=25emkab-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI4NmY0MS1jZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyCZoozYTR7WAM29AaMxPwN6F9ULpPYxcPE7buspE_E=&emci=8d17f97d-189e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=2fb86f41-cfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

clean_body: We need you in the fight | | | ---|--- Peter, Despite Donald Trump's victory, Americans came out to show strong support for abortion rights, to enshrine those rights into their state constitutions. Since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022 and took away the federal constitutional right to abortion, voters in 14 states have come out in favor of abortion rights. The terrible harms of abortion bans have become clearer by the day—and they've helped to galvanize Americans to come out and demand their reproductive freedom. This year, voters in seven states passed ballot measures to protect and expand access to abortion in Arizona, Colorado, Maryland, Missouri, Montana, Nevada, and New York. Our team is clear when we say: the Center for Reproductive Rights will vigorously oppose any attempts to roll back progress. In Pennsylvania, across the country, and around the world, abortion and bodily autonomy should be recognized as basic human rights. We will take on this fight at every possible turn and we will NEVER give up. Onward, Elisabeth Smith Director, State Policy & Advocacy | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m incredibly proud of this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I want to take a moment to say thank you. This isn’t the result we’d hoped for, but I’m incredibly proud of this grassroots team.
We knew when we set off on this reelection campaign that this was going to be a tough race – the toughest race of my career in fact.
When Ohioans first sent me to the Senate in 2007, I got to work right away, and I’ve spent every day since fighting for Ohio workers and their families.
**Because I believe that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.**
I’ve never been afraid to stand up to corporations and special interests to level the playing field for Ohioans – taking on everyone from Wall Street to Big Pharma. And I’m proud to have worked with both parties to pass some of the most significant legislation in recent years to hold corporations accountable.
I want to say my biggest thank you to the good folks of Ohio who trusted me to represent them in the U.S. Senate for these last 18 years.
And I’ll continue to work for the good folks of Ohio because that’s what this movement has always been about – fighting for folks like you, friend.
**So whether you’ve been with me since my first campaign many years ago or just joined our fight for the Dignity of Work in the last few days, weeks, or months, thank you for being in this with me.**
If you'd let me, I'd like to leave you with a quick story: You might have noticed, but where most of my colleagues wear the official Senate pin, I wear a pin depicting a canary in a birdcage. It's a reminder of how far we've come fighting for the Dignity of Work and how far we still have to go.

This pin was given to me two decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally. I proudly wear it every day on the lapel of my suits – because it represents all of us.

In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners had to take a canary down into the mines to warn them of poisonous gas. Those workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that cared enough to protect them.

Over the last 100 years, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare and recognized workers' rights, women's rights, and civil rights.

But progress didn't happen on its own. **It happened because people like you and me stood up and demanded their government work for them. And win or lose, friend, you can bet I’ll still be right there fighting alongside you.**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: The fights worth having are rarely easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I refuse to give up hope
#

Dear friends -
I know it’s been a tough week, and I hope you’ve been making some time to take care of yourselves.
I won’t sugarcoat it: The work ahead isn’t going to be easy. But the fights worth having rarely are.
After being shot in 2011, I have been on a recovery journey every day since. Some days are harder than others, but even on the toughest days, I refuse to give up hope.
It’s the same way I refuse to give up hope on our gun violence prevention movement, even if the outcomes of last week’s elections are not what we wanted.
On Friday, we’re coming up on our first mid-month fundraising deadline after Election Day. Our gun lobby adversaries likely think that we’re too discouraged to have a strong showing at this deadline.
**Now is our chance to prove them wrong and show them that we don’t back down in the face of adversity.**
[**So please. Can my team and I count on you to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today as we launch our first mid-month fundraising drive since Election Day?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241113-1-30&t=1&akid=9424%2E3935704%2EwxMUcP)

I can’t thank you enough for all that you do. Let’s keep moving forward together.

name: Bill Gray
subject: National Survey on Higher Education
body:
Campus radicals

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_e=-wz01l0UIntFp_HTjvYpcKtY7_pm6mWuBLIJXR6LeWD6jdQLRytTirqNbQUW6OqxMWSo1P2MYCR4wibEjD8gpcIsIywYcD2fF9TjYq09GbqogXA24ycRqVmEWmoweq5QArXQ6dDULz5IL5oICboXPTuEBRZ9_-IctASWDjlXDIwTWVSRzfKelZUGOgZbDNVuuyOwLkJ-PpXaPjw0QjQOuG9YESAslmDRE_zQhou2OYwzVz7Il9o_2Rfv7a0kxUDubc2TPmMuKBjq_zC0VBM1xy7K4MF81tygvs4HYUbdi9DjgzfPU2MAnz0DuSB0DA320TP-SkmfHBC4dr9fcjwqOIa9M0zLCYXfJGgn_HaI-e_vRvscAinaNz-7z4m8etBfaYt1wuCESvLGXDAsCE5Uzw%3D%3D)
---
| | Have you followed the latest coming from college and university campuses in America?

In 2024, revolutionary leftists and rent-a-mob organizations funded by progressive billionaires occupied elite universities across the country.

Many of these universities canceled classes and commencement due to pro-terror protests. Police have arrested students and even professors at several institutions due to violence!

That's why I need to hear from you right away. What do you think about all of this?
**Could you please take a few minutes to complete our National Survey on Higher Education and let me know your thoughts[today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_e=-wz01l0UIntFp_HTjvYpcKtY7_pm6mWuBLIJXR6LeWD6jdQLRytTirqNbQUW6OqxMWSo1P2MYCR4wibEjD8gpcIsIywYcD2fF9TjYq09GbqogXA24ycRqVmEWmoweq5QArXQ6dDULz5IL5oICboXPTuEBRZ9_-IctASWDjlXDIwTWVSRzfKelZUGOgZbDNVuuyOwLkJ-PpXaPjw0QjQOuG9YESAslmDRE_zQhou2OYwzVz7Il9o_2Rfv7a0kxUDupGXv3Ax5OKQm4rFK-56s7bzNFTK-fqWlzGdwHGai7Mhbk8fTVfF0ozVWZj10hQbbPAbNqttdB3RQ5eZD4P3_AXU9CKGGObRvWon-dTFZPJuMTrTteVLmmm0et83TK8F463ta4Mi0RxJDgRg6LdexXw%3D%3D)?**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_e=-wz01l0UIntFp_HTjvYpcKtY7_pm6mWuBLIJXR6LeWD6jdQLRytTirqNbQUW6OqxMWSo1P2MYCR4wibEjD8gpcIsIywYcD2fF9TjYq09GbqogXA24ycRqVmEWmoweq5QArXQ6dDULz5IL5oICboXPTuEBRZ9_-IctASWDjlXDIwTWVSRzfKelZUGOgZbDNVuuyOwLkJ-PpXaPjw0QjQOuG9YESAslmDRE_zQhou2OYwzVz7Il9o_2Rfv7a0kxUDus9V4B9BkWBFFgnvx8v0uJWf8FzcSVZF_ghCXwG3B3SbWLPuo-fX8O1x4vkn9T9UHcK6MOdoEG7NtSVzyb5hQqEmFbiCRxnMgLPuT4_DGGVpTCBSYURPO-AFtEulNXvxXgnfyKBWC2wqXzM0fhwhCmQ%3D%3D)

It’s no secret that these campus radicals get their inspiration from the student protestors of 1968...

Our country has changed a lot since that year. And I would say—and I think you agree—not for the better.

A big reason is that many of these radicals took over our education system...as professors, administrators, and government bureaucrats.

And they spread far-Left propaganda in our schools and culture with the help of big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars.

**Hillsdale College is one of the _only_ colleges in this country that hasn’t fallen into this madness. **

We are one of the _only_ colleges that teach young Americans—and millions of people around this country—what makes our country the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

**But in response to the violent mobs we see in far too many colleges and universities, we need YOUR HELP to do even more. We must reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty, far beyond Hillsdale’s campus. **

We refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly, in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

This independence frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations. It’s why our college is a place that seeks to DEFEND LIBERTY rather than OVERTHROW IT.

But it comes at a cost! We rely heavily on the generosity of friends like you to do our work.

So, would you consider chipping in to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide?

**You can teach millions** —everyone from the high school senior who takes a civics course in one of our K-12 classical schools using our **free** curriculum ...

...to the family who reads _Imprimis_ —our **free** digest of liberty—and engages in a lively discussion at the dinner table over what Heather Mac Donald, Victor Davis Hanson, or Christopher Rufo had to say ...

...to the grandparents who watch our **free** online courses on the Constitution and American history and tell stories to their grandchildren about the great heroes of liberty.

When elite schools are doing everything they can to destroy this country, you can change this country for the better—one person, one family, one community at a time.

So, after you take our survey, please consider supporting us once again.

Any gift you can give from **$10** , **$25** , **$35** , or even **$50** , if you’ve been especially blessed this year, will help us relentlessly pursue our mission on behalf of liberty—especially when our higher education is in crisis. But we need your help right away.

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on Higher Education** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_e=-wz01l0UIntFp_HTjvYpcKtY7_pm6mWuBLIJXR6LeWD6jdQLRytTirqNbQUW6OqxMWSo1P2MYCR4wibEjD8gpcIsIywYcD2fF9TjYq09GbqogXA24ycRqVmEWmoweq5QArXQ6dDULz5IL5oICboXPTuEBRZ9_-IctASWDjlXDIwTWVSRzfKelZUGOgZbDNVuuyOwLkJ-PpXaPjw0QjQOuG9YESAslmDRE_zQhou2OYwzVz7Il9o_2Rfv7a0kxUDuApr-rYcgHxAUZ8XSZmVoMSMV79Nqqe6bgyDyR8_4SEhNXuFCSh12RvDvReZGFQoXaDIMtPGSYd3A4hdC9NnbAzb5iBiEEIyxXdcjvZ5MxpA8eOUf8k5NOLThPIGQPUjEVCY60oQ8H0lsoo2D_i6DpA%3D%3D)

Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ’01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors.

That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on Higher Education**. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_e=-wz01l0UIntFp_HTjvYpcKtY7_pm6mWuBLIJXR6LeWD6jdQLRytTirqNbQUW6OqxMWSo1P2MYCR4wibEjD8gpcIsIywYcD2fF9TjYq09GbqogXA24ycRqVmEWmoweq5QArXQ6dDULz5IL5oICboXPTuEBRZ9_-IctASWDjlXDIwTWVSRzfKelZUGOgZbDNVuuyOwLkJ-PpXaPjw0QjQOuG9YESAslmDRE_zQhou2OYwzVz7Il9o_2Rfv7a0kxUDuRrBB7gULFCxoFvd1gGQmQPHr5C7e3J7YyNBtel1IOgzqrcfflq0NvS0C7RY-eLPiwWPRXZGQRn0G-1AdSyQsBpOo0Rdf3tOQUUmxqZMP6H9iB2IJwd8soEo4HiZXtjxwy8k97DtVOywKe2uT4lujdw%3D%3D)**

Thanks again! [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7102f0bf46cc4a2585c6f495de281e9a&_t=WAbh16SXaeVNLjCGWcKNAmMuH_Cgxxx5PDfLmtyLPV32E9SeN9Qy3U5gNOmLcQp-8quW3QqMm9oOghglxQhSSXLnfqkCn-xkFtfivcTt5qKhySgVwKH5LeB0B86zzYOW)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: New Album Coming November 22nd!!!
body:
Get ready for "In God We Trust!"| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=0f60c7774aee43cd875df61057db669e&_e=odI7Ltgmnw-5SS9F3GT_ezyKhfhhp4TMclHI8xJkx3FI4rGgR-FNvYHhxxDryoY8ZbV5mgKvWDW_tX4MsZFghnbUQ0X8HiRQpxhWLK6Eh7X8P7stWTc7sAXE_-k0xt97bLbCaS9JcJVIqIREqvnS2TaT5xIxO_3ntQnrbnZ5sPg9ZEtPCGF91rxTlYqS6HAZmVcfe7PBoH3gDUODPd77dhPozMBwdKDjzePAd0kTPkpyaFb-nNY0l5q4AosRy_2HM4TIbkdSm6PsLCfXrwZwz9VAkL5a7GCbdoIweSFMLoG0N9pis4jbVhxgaaiOahdJKCzoK8pSavfjCHR3LwFADw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I am so excited to announce we are releasing the next Let Us Worship album, _In God We Trust_ , on November 22nd!! This album was filmed LIVE at our One Nation Under God Revival last month in Washington, D.C.

name: Democratic House Majority
subject: Democrats can still flip the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
We know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses, but we still have a chance to take back the House. Can you chip in to these recount funds to ensure we count every vote and win the seats we need to flip the House blue?

The fight is not over yet, Derek.

We know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses, but we still have a chance to take back the House. **[Can you chip in to these recount funds to ensure we count every vote and win the seats we need to flip the House blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97026743/512026928/570715589?refcode=email_111324_deluziohousesplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZjN2UyMS1kNGExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qHOHB5F1gl8vbDVeVZZo37bn1rMlBdC6NRSzoyepEd0=)**

Right now, the results are too close to call for six battleground races. **We have people in the field ensuring that every vote is counted, but need to make sure these campaigns continue to have resources to support this staff.**

We have the opportunity now to take back the House majority and create a Blue firewall to fight against a national abortion ban, cuts to Medicare, and prevent a Project 2025 takeover.

But, this fight will be expensive and long. We cannot do this without you, Derek.

**[There is still time to fight and take back the House and we need to leave it all on the field. body:
Join us in Washington D.C. for this conservative tradition
| | |

| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013SSN4ri9rX6owhq45dGtTWG8EuOAZlgtzaL_rm5pvZ5YfP0yjTyYsu4zy2GRkH8tklbiqcL5dZPW3uS0cZTYOO6NDdLkvPCZkkB4q5FEEwQ3t08wf1B-Pss1YznDAiP3ImcqatJxLc1IkU-PWKGIvQQZFUjy4VUUuDEXdj2HUeSTvbrIvVkQs4GlAXuCIdGWquJmHFIcan8lFuoLK5UWh_fD5OA3-EGgnI7fn84fqdQ=&c=v9Ar3ub4-dNvUunTPZ2ZHPc8aaA6zNGsDagQElFhnlZZMDAIo46pmA==&ch=N_oLmVy9zqvksFR_-yfoH9OguyZb90cOcF9FOCToYOLmZ86SSQ2Aqg==)

| Friends,
The festive season is upon us, and this one, more than ever before, has something for us all to celebrate.
We're thrilled to invite you to our annual Christmas Ball on Thursday, December 5th in Washington D.C. -- this year will be a memorable celebration, and we would love for you to join us.
The American Principles Project Christmas Ball has become an important tradition, bringing together both emerging conservative voices and seasoned advocates - policy makers, and conservative commentators.
In past years, we've hosted influential speakers like Tucker Carlson, this year, who better to have as our main speaker as someone who trail-blazed a return to common sense by asking basic questions like: What is a woman?
Matt Walsh, host of the Matt Walsh Podcast and creator of groundbreaking documentaries "What is a Woman?" and "Am I Racist?" will be our keynote speaker and I couldn't be more excited.
---

| [Join us for this special night](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013SSN4ri9rX6owhq45dGtTWG8EuOAZlgtzaL_rm5pvZ5YfP0yjTyYsnoOSz58nckXM3jORzNUchtfww9SEOa_OR6YNLJr03lIbR5RfBrQ5M9HuUJLzoiDrsW0hBSaD04rvuok2nGoCkGkilzGmYwV4g==&c=v9Ar3ub4-dNvUunTPZ2ZHPc8aaA6zNGsDagQElFhnlZZMDAIo46pmA==&ch=N_oLmVy9zqvksFR_-yfoH9OguyZb90cOcF9FOCToYOLmZ86SSQ2Aqg==) as we celebrate the return of President Trump to the White House with lively festivities and exclusive remarks from our honored guests.
Mark your calendar--you won't want to miss it!

* **TOP NEWS**

"**At Texas-Mexico border, feds seize over $30 million of meth,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Jeffrey Smith** -- "Federal authorities say they seized over $30 million of methamphetamine stashed in a shipment of serrano peppers in the Rio Grande Valley.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection says its officers at the Pharr International Bridge on Sunday sent a tractor-trailer coming from Mexico to a secondary inspection. Their search revealed 1,859 packages of the drug totaling 2,155.02 pounds." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/65ea8722-1527-4cfd-a579-096f571b65c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

"**Kerrville wrestles with growth, affordability as it eyes future,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Ricardo Delgado** -- "As it adjusts its long-term vision for the future, Kerrville's focus is on some of its residents' biggest concerns -- namely finding ways to attract more housing options while preserving its small-town charm.

After surveying a number of residents, a consulting firm hired by the Hill Country city is recommending Kerrville's leaders work to attract denser housing and lean into the city's natural attractions. Freese and Nichols, a Fort Worth-based consulting firm, in particular identified revitalizing different sections of Kerrville near the Guadalupe River as important steps for the city's growth.

The firm's suggestions are a part of the city retooling its Kerrville 2050 Comprehensive Plan, a set of guidelines adopted in 2018 that are intended to shape the city's future in the decades to come.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBERl $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/55fb3b81-63ec-40cd-8c1e-fbf5e1004e6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The document states it is a "direct reflection of the values and priorities of residents, workers, business owners, students and community leaders." It's considered a policy north star for conservation, development and almost every aspect of the city's day-to-day operations. City officials say they use the 2050 plan to guide many of their decisions, with items on city council agendas often marked with a symbol indicating they are intended to push the master plan forward.

In presentations to city officials, Freese and Nichols representatives encouraged Kerrville's leaders to guide the city's growth, rather than trying to resist it.

"In Texas, we cannot stop development and we cannot control growth,"**Caitlin Admire** , Freese and Nichols' project manager, said during the presentations. She pitched some of the firm's suggestions to residents during a public forum and also presented them to the city's planning and zoning commission.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/55fb3b81-63ec-40cd-8c1e-fbf5e1004e6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Some of the firm's recommendations included incentivizing duplex and multi-family housing units in areas that are currently zoned for single-family homes.

Another recommendation suggests finding ways to better connect businesses to Nimitz Lake, which was created by damming the Guadalupe River that runs through the heart of Kerrville. The lake and the riverfront are some of city's biggest "catalyst areas," places where the city should be driving "renewed public interest," according to the presentations.

The firm's recommendations don't carry any obligations for city officials; the Kerrville City Council has the final say on any changes to the 2050 plan. Admire described the report as a "high-level statement" that could serve as a basis for future ordinances and regulations. City leaders and Kerrville residents will get multiple chances to speak their minds before any of the recommendations become policy. .

Kerrville, which currently has about 25,000 residents, hasn't grown as swiftly as some other Hill Country cities. Depending on growth trends, the city's population could be between 38,000 and 51,000 by 2050, according to estimates cited by the report.

Kerrville needs between 2,000 to 2,500 housing units to meet demand, according to a study cited by Freese and Nichols. There are 800 to 900 new housing units coming to the city soon, which could meet housing demand for the next two to three years.

The city has taken steps recently to encourage developers to build hundreds of units. Miami-based Lennar Homes is building 620 units across two developments, Assistant City Manager **Michael Hornes** told the Express-News in a written statement. Other projects have passed the permitting process, but have yet to break ground." * **TOP NEWS**

"**At Texas-Mexico border, feds seize over $30 million of meth,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Jeffrey Smith** -- "Federal authorities say they seized over $30 million of methamphetamine stashed in a shipment of serrano peppers in the Rio Grande Valley.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection says its officers at the Pharr International Bridge on Sunday sent a tractor-trailer coming from Mexico to a secondary inspection. Their search revealed 1,859 packages of the drug totaling 2,155.02 pounds." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/6b4958d9-725e-480f-b5a3-92a5ac3600d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

"**Kerrville wrestles with growth, affordability as it eyes future,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Ricardo Delgado** -- "As it adjusts its long-term vision for the future, Kerrville's focus is on some of its residents' biggest concerns -- namely finding ways to attract more housing options while preserving its small-town charm.

After surveying a number of residents, a consulting firm hired by the Hill Country city is recommending Kerrville's leaders work to attract denser housing and lean into the city's natural attractions. Freese and Nichols, a Fort Worth-based consulting firm, in particular identified revitalizing different sections of Kerrville near the Guadalupe River as important steps for the city's growth.

The firm's suggestions are a part of the city retooling its Kerrville 2050 Comprehensive Plan, a set of guidelines adopted in 2018 that are intended to shape the city's future in the decades to come.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/4b8c098c-9a5d-4a51-80aa-58e12c2b311c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The document states it is a "direct reflection of the values and priorities of residents, workers, business owners, students and community leaders." It's considered a policy north star for conservation, development and almost every aspect of the city's day-to-day operations. City officials say they use the 2050 plan to guide many of their decisions, with items on city council agendas often marked with a symbol indicating they are intended to push the master plan forward.

In presentations to city officials, Freese and Nichols representatives encouraged Kerrville's leaders to guide the city's growth, rather than trying to resist it.

"In Texas, we cannot stop development and we cannot control growth,"**Caitlin Admire** , Freese and Nichols' project manager, said during the presentations. She pitched some of the firm's suggestions to residents during a public forum and also presented them to the city's planning and zoning commission.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/4b8c098c-9a5d-4a51-80aa-58e12c2b311c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Some of the firm's recommendations included incentivizing duplex and multi-family housing units in areas that are currently zoned for single-family homes.

Another recommendation suggests finding ways to better connect businesses to Nimitz Lake, which was created by damming the Guadalupe River that runs through the heart of Kerrville. The lake and the riverfront are some of city's biggest "catalyst areas," places where the city should be driving "renewed public interest," according to the presentations.

The firm's recommendations don't carry any obligations for city officials; the Kerrville City Council has the final say on any changes to the 2050 plan. Admire described the report as a "high-level statement" that could serve as a basis for future ordinances and regulations. City leaders and Kerrville residents will get multiple chances to speak their minds before any of the recommendations become policy. .

Kerrville, which currently has about 25,000 residents, hasn't grown as swiftly as some other Hill Country cities. Depending on growth trends, the city's population could be between 38,000 and 51,000 by 2050, according to estimates cited by the report.

Kerrville needs between 2,000 to 2,500 housing units to meet demand, according to a study cited by Freese and Nichols. There are 800 to 900 new housing units coming to the city soon, which could meet housing demand for the next two to three years.

The city has taken steps recently to encourage developers to build hundreds of units. Miami-based Lennar Homes is building 620 units across two developments, Assistant City Manager **Michael Hornes** told the Express-News in a written statement. Other projects have passed the permitting process, but have yet to break ground." With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "At Texas-Mexico border, feds seize over $30 million of meth, " San Antonio Express-News' Jeffrey Smith -- "Federal authorities say they seized over $30 million of methamphetamine stashed in a shipment of serrano peppers in the Rio Grande Valley. U.S. Customs and Border Protection says its officers at the Pharr International Bridge on Sunday sent a tractor-trailer coming from Mexico to a secondary inspection. Their search revealed 1,859 packages of the drug totaling 2,155.02 pounds." ($) "Kerrville wrestles with growth, affordability as it eyes future, " San Antonio Express-News' Ricardo Delgado -- "As it adjusts its long-term vision for the future, Kerrville's focus is on some of its residents' biggest concerns -- namely finding ways to attract more housing options while preserving its small-town charm. After surveying a number of residents, a consulting firm hired by the Hill Country city is recommending Kerrville's leaders work to attract denser housing and lean into the city's natural attractions. Freese and Nichols, a Fort Worth-based consulting firm, in particular identified revitalizing different sections of Kerrville near the Guadalupe River as important steps for the city's growth. The firm's suggestions are a part of the city retooling its Kerrville 2050 Comprehensive Plan, a set of guidelines adopted in 2018 that are intended to shape the city's future in the decades to come. The document states it is a "direct reflection of the values and priorities of residents, workers, business owners, students and community leaders." It's considered a policy north star for conservation, development and almost every aspect of the city's day-to-day operations. City officials say they use the 2050 plan to guide many of their decisions, with items on city council agendas often marked with a symbol indicating they are intended to push the master plan forward. In presentations to city officials, Freese and Nichols representatives encouraged Kerrville's leaders to guide the city's growth, rather than trying to resist it. "In Texas, we cannot stop development and we cannot control growth,"Caitlin Admire , Freese and Nichols' project manager, said during the presentations. She pitched some of the firm's suggestions to residents during a public forum and also presented them to the city's planning and zoning commission. Some of the firm's recommendations included incentivizing duplex and multi-family housing units in areas that are currently zoned for single-family homes. Another recommendation suggests finding ways to better connect businesses to Nimitz Lake, which was created by damming the Guadalupe River that runs through the heart of Kerrville. The lake and the riverfront are some of city's biggest "catalyst areas," places where the city should be driving "renewed public interest," according to the presentations. The firm's recommendations don't carry any obligations for city officials; the Kerrville City Council has the final say on any changes to the 2050 plan. Admire described the report as a "high-level statement" that could serve as a basis for future ordinances and regulations. City leaders and Kerrville residents will get multiple chances to speak their minds before any of the recommendations become policy. . Kerrville, which currently has about 25,000 residents, hasn't grown as swiftly as some other Hill Country cities. Depending on growth trends, the city's population could be between 38,000 and 51,000 by 2050, according to estimates cited by the report. Kerrville needs between 2,000 to 2,500 housing units to meet demand, according to a study cited by Freese and Nichols. There are 800 to 900 new housing units coming to the city soon, which could meet housing demand for the next two to three years. The city has taken steps recently to encourage developers to build hundreds of units. Miami-based Lennar Homes is building 620 units across two developments, Assistant City Manager Michael Hornes told the Express-News in a written statement. Other projects have passed the permitting process, but have yet to break ground." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. HOU CHRON: "Sen. Americans Stood Tall — Let’s Take the Final Step
[A NEW DAY FOR OUR NATION](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
We the People sent a message LOUD and CLEAR: we rejected censorship, war, and Big Money control over our government agencies. We chose freedom, accountability, and a future grounded in health and transparency.
With President Trump’s return to the White House, RFK Jr. is joining him in Washington as a trusted partner, committed to restoring integrity and breaking the corporate grip on our failed, dangerously mismanaged health agencies.
Together, they will fight for truth and work to dismantle a system that has put profits before people for far too long.
RFK Jr.’s unwavering fight against this menacing oligarchy has ignited a powerful movement across America. In the face of silenced voices and a tightly controlled narrative, _he held his ground_ , inspiring a fierce wave of defiance and resilience.
**And with you by his side, he overcame legal barriers, ballot challenges, and every hurdle put in his path— _no matter the cost._**
[**Now, we face the final step: clearing the campaign debt incurred to make this journey possible, and most importantly, keep Bobby safe.******](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=6)********
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=7)
After the Biden administration unjustly denied him Secret Service protection, Kennedy's campaign took on the heavy cost of private security to keep him safe as he delivered his message to reclaim America.
Now, as he prepares to enter Washington, we need to retire this campaign debt so he can focus entirely on his mission to Make America Healthy Again.
We’re on the verge of real change, and we’re taking the fight to the heart of the problem in Washington, D.C.
[**Your gift today—whether $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or more—will go directly toward paying off our debt and ensuring Bobby can devote his complete attention to the huge job he’s got ahead of him in Washington.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=8)
Every penny raised will go directly toward closing this debt and empowering him to tackle the hard work ahead.
Can we count on you once again to help close this chapter and send Bobby to Washington fully equipped for this mission?
[Yes, you can count on me to help retire debt for Bobby](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=9)
Thank you for standing with us and championing this cause.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_13_24_unnd1&n=10)

clean_body: Can we count on you once again? | | | | | | | Americans Stood Tall — Let’s Take the Final Step Dear Peter, We the People sent a message LOUD and CLEAR: we rejected censorship, war, and Big Money control over our government agencies. We chose freedom, accountability, and a future grounded in health and transparency. With President Trump’s return to the White House, RFK Jr. is joining him in Washington as a trusted partner, committed to restoring integrity and breaking the corporate grip on our failed, dangerously mismanaged health agencies. Together, they will fight for truth and work to dismantle a system that has put profits before people for far too long. RFK Jr.’s unwavering fight against this menacing oligarchy has ignited a powerful movement across America. In the face of silenced voices and a tightly controlled narrative, he held his ground , inspiring a fierce wave of defiance and resilience. And with you by his side, he overcame legal barriers, ballot challenges, and every hurdle put in his path— no matter the cost. ******** After the Biden administration unjustly denied him Secret Service protection, Kennedy's campaign took on the heavy cost of private security to keep him safe as he delivered his message to reclaim America. Now, as he prepares to enter Washington, we need to retire this campaign debt so he can focus entirely on his mission to Make America Healthy Again. We’re on the verge of real change, and we’re taking the fight to the heart of the problem in Washington, D.C. Every penny raised will go directly toward closing this debt and empowering him to tackle the hard work ahead. Can we count on you once again to help close this chapter and send Bobby to Washington fully equipped for this mission? Thank you for standing with us and championing this cause. Team Kennedy | | ©2024 • • • • PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY P.O. Box 147 South Walpole, MA 02071 This communication is not authorized by any other candidate. Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Derek Tran
subject: Too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ECU Non-federal
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22536%2E4449941%2EYYazrS)
---
It’s Derek Tran,

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you an update on our race.

**We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

_The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._

And with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.

[**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund to help us count every vote and Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard. »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57284?t=7&akid=22536%2E4449941%2EYYazrS) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Derek Tran will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57285?t=8&akid=22536%2E4449941%2EYYazrS)

Thank you for standing by me,

Derek

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Statement on President Trump’s Election Victory
body:
Judicial Watch congratulates President Trump on
his remarkable election as 47th president of the United States. The
voters broadly and directly repudiated the lawfare targeting Trump, as
well as the dangerous government abuses and contempt for the rule of
law endemic here in Washington, DC.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 13, 2024

[image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71066&L=32849&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=37f62b24c7452afd31dcbb4564b05665a0ab1404fb3b89b270ceb52cc53353ce]

RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL

_"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to
know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial
Watch"_ - SEAN HANNITY

Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the
progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4f860af8f6e34cb199f4c9b06a104420&_t=DJ4PYEMmbO0Xx8uu5asHHcf0quq_BS-Nmqw0z6E7v8RARjCoWGvmrmfkbbm91-agFq6e2HB1JQ49FsxfNykoNbCCG96lQuUv1ywC7Fz_ZDQovK7rb4bjPkJWT3CIMKhp)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f860af8f6e34cb199f4c9b06a104420&_e=SiCjynUshcLp1v05km2z8cctVe-Ga3f5KJ7raG8I7cjzvhkB6d9PN-Qkoine4aJPFF6k7SmMFrFcJ3YxH3weKZq8PlU01o9UeLw0iRi9bzxazY_VT910mh13CRP54eBxwLjmuepAYiN_xja-lH60Wg62MV6ODAHnU9srDhX3Rp-guca8VWG8iZ6EBE4XKvWpzcICiUWN3TMsh1gHkzZpxR1CDln8A8mUjHnCqQ6lhhrMD813paVMr_TzJSkiFdu6pAv5p95U6KkUJmw1Mu3doZHVeX_nBiE31pTtQ05IqbxvQz2iV_Vzhtv0Qc4lBWa3bT_aB6axk_9T_rbPzfP4Kkq-pWpgUiXav1_OZ6GIjmaPswpBnG4hC7SzFgW87tTM__xs8Rvd2J524OMMx3Qs_g%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f860af8f6e34cb199f4c9b06a104420&_e=SiCjynUshcLp1v05km2z8cctVe-Ga3f5KJ7raG8I7cjzvhkB6d9PN-Qkoine4aJPFF6k7SmMFrFcJ3YxH3weKZq8PlU01o9UeLw0iRi9bzxazY_VT910mh13CRP54eBxwLjmuepAYiN_xja-lH60Wg62MV6ODAHnU9srDhX3Rp-guca8VWG8iZ6EBE4XKvWpzcICiUWN3TMsh1gHkzZpxR1CDln8A8mUjHnCqQ6lhhrMD813paVMr_TzJSkiFdu648hByMJR6xr7D9w9sh03xN-lz_r6yYBZMu_APHXBCSSX2aCdsgND1HFJAsy04s-RBBrQ0YflWXkXatYpHipjihe09SFKEwto3dmp9HXMfLpOYydVf6UpGZa4QgZE800Q0WXbPS6-jfz1SQ620tuIjA%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f860af8f6e34cb199f4c9b06a104420&_e=SiCjynUshcLp1v05km2z8cctVe-Ga3f5KJ7raG8I7cjzvhkB6d9PN-Qkoine4aJPFF6k7SmMFrFcJ3YxH3weKZq8PlU01o9UeLw0iRi9bzxazY_VT910mh13CRP54eBxwLjmuepAYiN_xja-lH60Wg62MV6ODAHnU9srDhX3Rp-guca8VWG8iZ6EBE4XKvWpzcICiUWN3TMsh1gHkzZpxR1CDln8A8mUjHnCqQ6lhhrMD813paVMr_TzJSkiFdu68eUBEkx1XRoCWjXrveDtSCg7pCswk8lmU6GF-TCYC9NCToZCGCJUxXzJUwj7TcCrwMsZsS3sc9f3oJiZI9959x_hXffqT1NRlaud5wNemOOFdJtoB1nlsnHpQpLfqoYAKrrhJVSKmm0oMJIm96VXQw%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: Friend, thanks to YOU, we won back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Your support fueled our movement, kept our ads running, supported our field teams, and delivered a Republican Senate Majority

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d374428fc5114f2e9d8ca02e6af8e919&_e=eonhBB7aglMM8SpuvhKYdXnsSWOxQ0CACC-UOHHnXrPp2OAv6xsuTs3bLQ3shca2_UIieOk_FZCg75B0mLfFBJMoWNlyIVwAtu6ofvjrwLnIvBFaHQt_dXKkndnytYY8oOLccpolOdizyRMXNkaelBacV5VBVn6o7DW18E0ZYPzv1a-PsQHdy0CBQPX1DHNpSasm6mNDxr1q8gBqz-iEQH8mb6I1JVf9QqEw2iuUAzAQlD0_7HMwyfw_3GbHX-FOV-sjB7kZe6D1M6WQcgm603hK2caJdd2vqxNZiqyCf4Hj0nwx-Cb1zzTcfuIAxmH6qZTNf1PjmLYH5Jg3Jwfq-qEoAe2QXWgO1ZVmG5i39AllQln4Uq5y61r0MA860g4ByV7Np2UeIL60vgRVlamtgxg2g9OFabD5vkGNvZysIYuUC9o3K_LNVkZAtGGkHTBXM5gbx3K2hPEiqb7rO2LhIA%3D%3D)

Friend, thanks to YOU, we won back the Senate.

Your support fueled our movement, kept our ads running, supported our field teams, and delivered a **[Republican Senate Majority!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d374428fc5114f2e9d8ca02e6af8e919&_e=eonhBB7aglMM8SpuvhKYdXnsSWOxQ0CACC-UOHHnXrPp2OAv6xsuTs3bLQ3shca2_UIieOk_FZCg75B0mLfFBJMoWNlyIVwAtu6ofvjrwLnIvBFaHQt_dXKkndnytYY8oOLccpolOdizyRMXNkaelBacV5VBVn6o7DW18E0ZYPzv1a-PsQHdy0CBQPX1DHNpSasm6mNDxr1q8gBqz-iEQH8mb6I1JVf9QqEw2iuUAzAQlD0_7HMwyfw_3GbHX-FOV-sjB7kZe6D1M6WQcgm603hK2caJdd2vqxNZiqyCf4Hj0nwx-Cb1zzTcfuIAxmH611f6kyq5G4h5vdcby7wS_T8IO3QnIjUq2A0Fp-NXvGQ4QXyG1ohXoOfujMhnvRtwCNcuNvc0j28qPypf-EWX79dhhKVO3JC9Z7Z73VlDKycoZe9NQaFExtt_I-8paPnp5Q7pLdAu7EDnhCUJP4187w%3D%3D)**

Together, we've ensured that Chuck Schumer will not have power -- and that President Trump will have an America First majority to get to work for Americans next year.

But our work isn't over.

**[--> In PA, Dave McCormick is hanging on but facing a possible recount.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d374428fc5114f2e9d8ca02e6af8e919&_e=eonhBB7aglMM8SpuvhKYdXnsSWOxQ0CACC-UOHHnXrPp2OAv6xsuTs3bLQ3shca2_UIieOk_FZCg75B0mLfFBJMoWNlyIVwAtu6ofvjrwLnIvBFaHQt_dXKkndnytYY8oOLccpolOdizyRMXNkaelBacV5VBVn6o7DW18E0ZYPzv1a-PsQHdy0CBQPX1DHNpSasm6mNDxr1q8gBqz-iEQH8mb6I1JVf9QqEw2iuUAzAQlD0_7HMwyfw_3GbHX-FOV-sjB7kZe6D1M6WQcgm603hK2caJdd2vqxNZiqyCf4Hj0nwx-Cb1zzTcfuIAxmH6TFB38mB0iLeHEl3vHf4oW0aJFjzNz3hXZLTvhMifbvUZJxbPPP6zYswJT8klPu9AxVsZ39Ein8b47ZpMa0lZkkYuLGeIOaUgEGcmImKI56Xc1x35lIg0-yQy9Mww2uJf2knMffVSLd-V2T5vAoMZVw%3D%3D)**

Here at the NRSC, we're preparing to send field teams to all of these states to offer support -- and we're preparing for a legal fight.

As you know, recounts are expensive and Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop us.

_**[Our ask today is that you'll pitch in just $10 to support this critical effort. Make your donation to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund here: NRSCEmergencyLegalFund/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d374428fc5114f2e9d8ca02e6af8e919&_e=eonhBB7aglMM8SpuvhKYdXnsSWOxQ0CACC-UOHHnXrPp2OAv6xsuTs3bLQ3shca2_UIieOk_FZCg75B0mLfFBJMoWNlyIVwAtu6ofvjrwLnIvBFaHQt_dXKkndnytYY8oOLccpolOdizyRMXNkaelBacV5VBVn6o7DW18E0ZYPzv1a-PsQHdy0CBQPX1DHNpSasm6mNDxr1q8gBqz-iEQH8mb6I1JVf9QqEw2iuUAzAQlD0_7HMwyfw_3GbHX-FOV-sjB7kZe6D1M6WQcgm603hK2caJdd2vqxNZiqyCf4Hj0nwx-Cb1zzTcfuIAxmH6y0eFMDb76Dn-CybvYdabyg0z3W-tW4WN1-n9gKT1MPVe4VCVf4Yudq1fK-ikibZ3fYmTiGmIr6Awd9fW9sH-OLbbaqGa8J503uHJuA35oO20jNBTCJef-gSVOeMu2HqoS0_VEDgNG6wu9Gq6mcRTDA%3D%3D)**_

Your support fueled our movement, kept our ads running, supported our field teams, and delivered a Together, we've ensured that Chuck Schumer will not have power -- and that President Trump will have an America First majority to get to work for Americans next year. But our work isn't over. Here at the NRSC, we're preparing to send field teams to all of these states to offer support -- and we're preparing for a legal fight. name: Tim Walz
subject: We’re going to have to be ready to defend the progress that we made over the last four years. And we’re going to need your help to do it.
body:
| There are still a number of races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges, and we’re relying on your donation to make sure every vote is counted.
---
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2412?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&t=1&akid=270%2E2563979%2Ebqa9Gv)
Peter -- I know there are a lot of folks who are worried about the next four years -- I’m one of them. The agenda we heard from Donald Trump and JD Vance over the course of this campaign is very different from the one we know is right for our country, and we have already seen the damage this president can cause when he’s in it for himself and not the American people. We know what could be coming down the pipe -- higher costs for the middle class, a repeal of the Affordable Care Act, the gutting of Social Security and Medicare, and bans on abortion across this country. We’re going to have to be ready to defend the progress that we made over the last four years. And we’re going to need your help to do it. **[So, I’m asking: Will you please rush a contribution to the Harris Fight Fund program today? There are still a number of races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges, and we’re relying on your donation to make sure every vote is counted.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&countdown=-8&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ak&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&refcode2=270_2563979_bqa9Gv&akid=270%2E2563979%2Ebqa9Gv)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/1009?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.OpRu0f&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241113_b1_tw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-srg-&countdown=-8&t=3&akid=270%2E2563979%2Ebqa9Gv)

name: Team DLCC
subject: The fight isn't over...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Despite the setback our movement faced last week, our work must continue to build the country and future we want. We have upcoming special elections we're fighting to win – take a look: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Despite the setback our movement faced last week, our work must continue to build the country and future we want.** State Democrats will be the last line of defense against a second Trump presidency, and as we await a final tally in some of our most competitive states and prepare for potential recounts, Democrats are already gearing up for special elections – take a look: | ****State** ** | ****District** **
---|---
Virginia
| SD-10
Virginia
| SD-32
Delaware
| SD-1
Delaware
| SD-5
Louisiana
| SD-14
Louisiana
| SD-23
Oklahoma
| SD-8
**Every special election marks a chance to defend or expand Democratic power in state legislatures, and with Republicans taking power at the federal level, we need to seize every opportunity to fight back.**
[We’re counting on this grassroots team to step up and help continue our fight to elect state Democrats nationwide. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkc2O2yAURp8G74iAy0-8YJHI9qgauaq8SJcIA87QGNvCeKq-fRW16b7bI52re_R9701v4xyX-1ebgs7J5N2M3ozZfgb8iPmB5zhmm2PYDSOMY0oxBQOV17Jm6kyroKkCKhihklQfWijHa177WlA3ybNyXgJ3DjhISYQnVdTPO5RSoJITYKdpYgIUcRbgrKwSiJMctmOco7NLsj_WHMuv0xJKNeuPUrYdwQWxDrFuD-7I4WSX4NdycmtCrPvz-biujx2xziuvggwKn5V3mHsx4noiAnspgYuJUjoSBN1RktnXI7uAoLk2b3hob4jJJ07BxyMhaNr-L3E2bTbeFwTNq8RcmzdzHS631rx_Gd7BtL0Z2pv5dsHDP21dSlgKgmbo8UussvbbzzjPcZcKcXJPNs7Pkqr8zxifmv0OAAD__5K9jIo)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkc2O2yAURp8G74iAy0-8YJHI9qgauaq8SJcIA87QGNvCeKq-fRW16b7bI52re_R9701v4xyX-1ebgs7J5N2M3ozZfgb8iPmB5zhmm2PYDSOMY0oxBQOV17Jm6kyroKkCKhihklQfWijHa177WlA3ybNyXgJ3DjhISYQnVdTPO5RSoJITYKdpYgIUcRbgrKwSiJMctmOco7NLsj_WHMuv0xJKNeuPUrYdwQWxDrFuD-7I4WSX4NdycmtCrPvz-biujx2xziuvggwKn5V3mHsx4noiAnspgYuJUjoSBN1RktnXI7uAoLk2b3hob4jJJ07BxyMhaNr-L3E2bTbeFwTNq8RcmzdzHS631rx_Gd7BtL0Z2pv5dsHDP21dSlgKgmbo8UussvbbzzjPcZcKcXJPNs7Pkqr8zxifmv0OAAD__5K9jIo)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkc2O2yAURp8G74iAy0-8YJHI9qgauaq8SJcIA87QGNvCeKq-fRW16b7bI52re_R9701v4xyX-1ebgs7J5N2M3ozZfgb8iPmB5zhmm2PYDSOMY0oxBQOV17Jm6kyroKkCKhihklQfWijHa177WlA3ybNyXgJ3DjhISYQnVdTPO5RSoJITYKdpYgIUcRbgrKwSiJMctmOco7NLsj_WHMuv0xJKNeuPUrYdwQWxDrFuD-7I4WSX4NdycmtCrPvz-biujx2xziuvggwKn5V3mHsx4noiAnspgYuJUjoSBN1RktnXI7uAoLk2b3hob4jJJ07BxyMhaNr-L3E2bTbeFwTNq8RcmzdzHS631rx_Gd7BtL0Z2pv5dsHDP21dSlgKgmbo8UussvbbzzjPcZcKcXJPNs7Pkqr8zxifmv0OAAD__5K9jIo) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkc2O2yAURp8G74iAy0-8YJHI9qgauaq8SJcIA87QGNvCeKq-fRW16b7bI52re_R9701v4xyX-1ebgs7J5N2M3ozZfgb8iPmB5zhmm2PYDSOMY0oxBQOV17Jm6kyroKkCKhihklQfWijHa177WlA3ybNyXgJ3DjhISYQnVdTPO5RSoJITYKdpYgIUcRbgrKwSiJMctmOco7NLsj_WHMuv0xJKNeuPUrYdwQWxDrFuD-7I4WSX4NdycmtCrPvz-biujx2xziuvggwKn5V3mHsx4noiAnspgYuJUjoSBN1RktnXI7uAoLk2b3hob4jJJ07BxyMhaNr-L3E2bTbeFwTNq8RcmzdzHS631rx_Gd7BtL0Z2pv5dsHDP21dSlgKgmbo8UussvbbzzjPcZcKcXJPNs7Pkqr8zxifmv0OAAD__5K9jIo)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

clean_body: Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | | Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _
