name: COURIER
subject: Trump picked a Fox and Friends host to lead the most powerful military in the world. Seriously.
body:
Fox News is evolving from Trump’s media megaphone to influence his governing decisions directly.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97032935/512046047/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNiM2YwNGQtZGVhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PHNByYkl6TA-cCtBRTSzzpX5C4u297rB_NyUl-LeUMQ=&emci=05ab3c41-dea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=5cb3f04d-dea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Yesterday, Donald Trump announced he’s picking _Fox & Friends_ co-host Pete Hegseth to lead the U.S. military. 🫠
**The AP reports:**
“President-elect Donald Trump stunned the Pentagon and the broader defense world by nominating Fox News host Pete Hegseth to serve as his defense secretary, tapping someone largely inexperienced and untested on the global stage to take over the world’s largest and most powerful military.”
_– Associated Press, November 13, 2024_
**[We’ll explain more about why Hegseth’s lack of experience and his troubling views are so alarming in a moment. But first, if you support COURIER’s mission to provide fearless, factual news coverage that calls out Fox News’ growing influence on our democracy, can you chip in $25 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97032936/512046048/2081106790?refcode=2024113_Hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNiM2YwNGQtZGVhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PHNByYkl6TA-cCtBRTSzzpX5C4u297rB_NyUl-LeUMQ=)**
Hegseth’s nomination isn’t surprising from a president whose policies have been shaped by a far-right media bubble. Hegseth isn’t just a _Fox News_ host—he’s been an informal adviser to Trump on foreign policy despite lacking qualifications for such a role.
**But this pick isn’t about experience—it’s about loyalty and optics.**
Trump’s announcement of Hegseth was full of praise for his work at _Fox News_ and his book. According to a _CNN_ source, Trump was also big on Hegseth’s “look."
**This choice reflects a bigger trend— _Fox News_ is evolving from Trump’s media megaphone to influence his governing decisions directly. **
In his first term, Trump soured on traditional military leadership and now appears set on replacing experienced generals with loyalists from his favorite network. Reports indicate Trump’s team is even drafting an executive order to purge Pentagon leadership that doesn’t align with his “MAGA military” vision, where leaders put loyalty to him above loyalty to the Constitution.
Hegseth shares Trump’s vision. He’s openly opposed women in combat, and his rhetoric often echoes _Fox News_ ’ far-right talking points rather than adhering to constitutional principles.
[**COURIER was founded to protect democracy and take on _Fox News_ and the far-right’s unprecedented influence on our government. If you believe in our mission to counter right-wing media power with fearless, community-centered journalism****, please donate $25 to help us grow.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97032937/512046049/2081106790?refcode=2024113_Hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNiM2YwNGQtZGVhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PHNByYkl6TA-cCtBRTSzzpX5C4u297rB_NyUl-LeUMQ=)

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: The stakes are high
body:
Donald Trump has pledged to carry out the largest mass deportation in U.S. history. | | | Peter, After we reached out last week about the results of the election, we had **the biggest surge of support we’ve seen in years.** The stakes are high right now — and we couldn’t be more grateful to know this team is still committed to fighting for immigrants and our livelihoods. With so much uncertainty ahead, we need everyone in our movement to step up right now. **[If you haven’t yet joined the hundreds of folks who have joined the fight in the past week, you can add a donation right now. >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATbxVCZ1v0HWSRfKtivw6SPUW2klEJnZi85WLKQIFAN-Y6owlhTQqTc6s7LseX8ZBv-pzxyw0x5gsk-PoyjAI6RM7BdhIYukPcsV-rLHKUx8wl7pittqXvaJRv9-e8kN3Hp3XoU2Olz0rtvoRZqVsGDWRHZrExOIIlyMlyUf3KGa5DbDlxrLI7J2v7Sqxjo08fakicPN812HZH9WB65IpEjJ3_uJcc09CTML-9pVjrQF0-3SugC3mH6XmcAL6zGPK7m0WFMTpz4O1fNhs8cWRN7qhiSltlN1Rx9VKDPc0Qs0kL5mL_0of0KuSFxqgN3Z79qMY5x_KG9IBo19-uIiXTVMPVtuFb1GbxQ7GFA2_2ZtUxqhTGTdpN42nn5J5jl0-c/4bf/2oIb3I5oRcq66uCTdQ-Z7g/h0/h001.oL9s0OwvvRQtL9Cp9Arm1vWh-THCSZLbuXEIV7X_6qs)** Donald Trump has demonized immigrants since he launched his first campaign almost a decade ago. In his first term, he tried to end DACA, enacted the “Muslim ban,” and implemented a policy of family separation. **And now, he’s pledged to carry out the largest mass deportation in U.S. history.** We know Donald Trump is coming after us and our families. We have faced this before, and we’re ready — but we know it’s going to be hard. **[We need all-hands-on-deck as we face our new future. clean_body: Donald Trump has pledged to carry out the largest mass deportation in U.S. history. | | | Peter, After we reached out last week about the results of the election, we had the biggest surge of support we’ve seen in years. The stakes are high right now — and we couldn’t be more grateful to know this team is still committed to fighting for immigrants and our livelihoods. With so much uncertainty ahead, we need everyone in our movement to step up right now. Donald Trump has demonized immigrants since he launched his first campaign almost a decade ago. In his first term, he tried to end DACA, enacted the “Muslim ban,” and implemented a policy of family separation. And now, he’s pledged to carry out the largest mass deportation in U.S. history. We know Donald Trump is coming after us and our families. We have faced this before, and we’re ready — but we know it’s going to be hard. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | For the next four years, our movement will be advocating against all anti-immigrant policies, empowering our community with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants, and building spaces for immigrants to come together and process. All of that will take your consistent support, so thanks for standing with us, Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_4Hoq2YCk7J8UVH-QTDh1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF3CgP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTExM1cDc3BjQgpnLFbZNGdI915xUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_4Hoq2YCk7J8UVH-QTDh1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF3CgP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTExM1cDc3BjQgpnLFbZNGdI915xUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_4Hoq2YCk7J8UVH-QTDh1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF3CgP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTExM1cDc3BjQgpnLFbZNGdI915xUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_4Hoq2YCk7J8UVH-QTDh1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpF3CgP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTExM1cDc3BjQgpnLFbZNGdI915xUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | | ~~ Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | ~~ | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to ~~ My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. ~~ A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | ~~ | | ~~ Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | ~~ | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

| Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district. And, Peter, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense. [The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and Blue Amp Action to help us count every vote? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35874a21-14ec-46c5-bb6a-14355fc74678/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. This is what you can expect from the apparatchiks

Peter,

After taking back the Senate Majority, the GOP is now deciding who will become the Senate Majority Leader.

It seems like the two frontrunners are some of the biggest RINO Uniparty puppets that we have to offer: John Cornyn and John Thune.

**_Is this really the best we have to choose from?_**

BOTH Cornyn and Thune will work against Trump as he looks to end the Russo-Ukrainian War. They've BOTH been shown smiling with Zelenskyy as he robbed us of BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars.

This is what you can expect from the apparatchiks. I need EVERYBODY to understand this fight has just begun.

Donald Trump needs our help and vigilance. We have to thread a needle to save our Republic.

name: Josef Lipp
subject: Do you want pharmacies to distribute the abortion pill?
body:
Imagine walking into your local pharmacy...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=182197282d484375b669fb0baec0d588&_t=uwluOYik_rp1AFhe7Uc6rJ8lcqpbPk7irvEutXlS2yTE6D-unoSb6dpWTV1yclsJFyLLW3YKHjfApeoyAF5HyuH6r3zL918OR_RDvw1Y8UVtrShT1sNcozm_WseBwDwU)_

#
Friend of Life,

Imagine walking into your local pharmacy, the same place where you purchase groceries for your family, while pills that end innocent lives are dispensed just a few feet away from you--medications specifically designed to end the lives of preborn babies.

Today, major chains like Costco, Walmart, Albertsons, Kroger, and McKesson are under pressure from government officials such as NYC Comptroller Brad Lander to start dispensing these fatal drugs. This demand is being made in the name of "long-term shareholder value," despite the devastating human cost.

Over 600,000 preborn babies were killed by abortion pills last year alone. This heart-breaking number is expected to rise unless pro-life individuals take a stand.

We cannot allow these life-ending drugs to be available at our most frequented stores. Corporations must understand that becoming involved in the abortion industry means complicity in the ongoing genocide of future generations.

Pharmacies like Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid, which have already agreed to dispense the abortion pill, have faced backlash from customers who desire a pharmacy that promotes true health and wellness.

We need your support to urge these major chains to resist the pressure. By signing our petition, you can make your voice heard. Let's ensure our local grocery stores and pharmacies remain places where life is embraced, not ended.

Sign the petition and urge major pharmacies to resist the pressure to distribute the abortion pill:
**[https://www.liveaction.org/resist-pressure-to-dispense-the-abortion-pill/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=182197282d484375b669fb0baec0d588&_e=WU1yJtUIID8HPv2u5rCNcqvWzhpTgRz-CTf6nz9Ab0PT3Wjj_ZSuoFOzwxqqtfjEJxOQGOnua3kohTxV7k2x9CjOKMJmHPxqxA2s_FsYZ5usGwdj__-It83YwZDGBt0uGkEUhZRqbMMC2obpMqnVFKZxvh1H67vf4goimzHAYWkHF9DXC3FerD1KPbVali1EyV62GCrVbQ6aqKZbNGQfeAmTIt7KjqwktV7hcdhyJwZXQrs7sNxg18sGq8p40Y0i4fCmH_wfx47JJI0SJEYURp70rPffFUDJBGiEw3jMtqQFjl9jG-XdofTT3aq-_7DojjBCAvFGPnTYHr0kLgNDW-HZZ-Ny9c2jQcEpQZoaTdi98kgZ4aa2u19ko6ja-wlMZTWuLutgMKyD7aWaLxrDig%3D%3D)**

For Life,

Josef Lipp
**Chief Operating Officer**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=182197282d484375b669fb0baec0d588&_e=WU1yJtUIID8HPv2u5rCNcqvWzhpTgRz-CTf6nz9Ab0PT3Wjj_ZSuoFOzwxqqtfjEJxOQGOnua3kohTxV7k2x9CjOKMJmHPxqxA2s_FsYZ5usGwdj__-It83YwZDGBt0uGkEUhZRqbMMC2obpMqnVFKZxvh1H67vf4goimzHAYWkHF9DXC3FerD1KPbVali1EyV62GCrVbQ6aqKZbNGQfeAmTIt7KjqwktV7hcdhyJwaRJBPwga1PHKKDdkGNPUPQfh0JmXoxRNfCGPeMH2b6vwrhZjLJ2I4Vn1Jv5X70NPN8DDRYYe425xi3jaQKcLbmMSOoslX96xd26qGdr1X7znVg1MApY2tg9mZl6UPOZ1EAgQiPuGHSzWa2QFos7UbY_RXaViOiIOmrncfyW4I7VQ%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Live Action.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=182197282d484375b669fb0baec0d588&_t=uwluOYik_rp1AFhe7Uc6rJ8lcqpbPk7irvEutXlS2yTE6D-unoSb6dpWTV1yclsJFyLLW3YKHjfApeoyAF5Hyo3HIiSlQ6m2fB6P6DzMArwseQzjFroz5tRQpWyElHkjiWk1xnmq6d-GMaZF895w1PJscC34XTnPhkheAB-qOcc%3D)

clean_body: Imagine walking into your local pharmacy... | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, Imagine walking into your local pharmacy, the same place where you purchase groceries for your family, while pills that end innocent lives are dispensed just a few feet away from you--medications specifically designed to end the lives of preborn babies. Today, major chains like Costco, Walmart, Albertsons, Kroger, and McKesson are under pressure from government officials such as NYC Comptroller Brad Lander to start dispensing these fatal drugs. This demand is being made in the name of "long-term shareholder value," despite the devastating human cost. Over 600,000 preborn babies were killed by abortion pills last year alone. This heart-breaking number is expected to rise unless pro-life individuals take a stand. We cannot allow these life-ending drugs to be available at our most frequented stores. Corporations must understand that becoming involved in the abortion industry means complicity in the ongoing genocide of future generations. Pharmacies like Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid, which have already agreed to dispense the abortion pill, have faced backlash from customers who desire a pharmacy that promotes true health and wellness. We need your support to urge these major chains to resist the pressure. By signing our petition, you can make your voice heard. Let's ensure our local grocery stores and pharmacies remain places where life is embraced, not ended. Sign the petition and urge major pharmacies to resist the pressure to distribute the abortion pill: For Life, Josef Lipp Chief Operating Officer 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: A total grift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Our 2024 Republican opponent just filed to run _again_ against Alexandria in 2026.
Instead of doing any sort of meaningful work for The Bronx or Queens, she announced this campaign — just one week after being defeated.
We haven’t mentioned this opponent by name this year, and that’s on purpose. She is a perennially failed MAGA grifter who is not running to serve our community, **she is running to spread misinformation and attack Alexandria**.
**As a refresher, here are a few facts about our newly re-announced opponent:**
* She paid George Santos a lot of money to consult on the 2022 election. In 2022, she paid George Santos’ consulting firm $110,320 and hers was the only campaign to ever report working with the firm.
* Her campaign may have been part of a scam run by George Santos. A donor who gave to Santos had their credit card charged for additional, unauthorized donations — including two maxed-out $2,900 contributions to her campaign.
* She participated in the January 6 Insurrection rally.
* She is associated with the white supremacist Proud Boys and proudly posted a photo of herself with their leaders.

With MAGA extremists emboldened, we need the resources to fight misinformation like never before and defeat our newly announced challenger in 2026.
We know that the 2026 elections are far away but our work to keep Alexandria in the House, fighting for all of us, starts now.[ Will you make a $5 donation today to help us prepare for the inevitable attacks from our opponent? **[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241113.lTAWJu&refcode=em20241113-7572-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)** Whether or not you can give today, **thank you for standing with us**. In solidarity, Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241113?refcode=em20241113-7572-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=7572_2526796_LbeIdx&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241113-7572-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=22&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7572%2E2526796%2ELbeIdx)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ A work of unsurpassed beauty | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9acffe4d95b04909b7a6a54a697ddff9&_e=AwKOfKvayRgxRZkr6bg4bFY5_GxTBJFV9JiAmIsuWYCz5YcTH2INmF8smdCk26v67Pdudki7eoxHEbPEMvD_MrBGMEzL0fqemn3rYak8mxVlFCRYVse00cSHUfIzQo1MNWjER1LiwXJWR8TVjZmZ9ACDcfmBp-6XoLX-4J0ZKrGjClf784lv_sAiikEUoywuKbic3-RC9w__Qv7b6srP459Jctwr3HyKukKS9WlXvV4imdqMTY7H_ofMj8kKTI5HVJjMH7uzvUdin9VP2D9WD2zAFvLTlnK8plXgF2tSca_nRxsIbwijIvKPXr3qJlf-LfY2SFXqymlUD7Zj57a0CA3pEjAkDCZC3EmnqN3ysNVTtdP6Fnv4Q6fG6aU0iQiZlSpKZEcuXldItu7xif9jhg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9acffe4d95b04909b7a6a54a697ddff9&_e=AwKOfKvayRgxRZkr6bg4bFY5_GxTBJFV9JiAmIsuWYCz5YcTH2INmF8smdCk26v67Pdudki7eoxHEbPEMvD_MrBGMEzL0fqemn3rYak8mxVlFCRYVse00cSHUfIzQo1MNWjER1LiwXJWR8TVjZmZ9ACDcfmBp-6XoLX-4J0ZKrGjClf784lv_sAiikEUoywuKbic3-RC9w__Qv7b6srP459Jctwr3HyKukKS9WlXvV4imdqMTY7H_ofMj8kKTI5HzmrtItSic-t4hFo9jcRZIjhH5BLgHNBylQ1CTNdO5bpVVaflfLkarU-Q3RYp4Bd-xMrAKeR5deTMSYZ8kXgLhjYpG73fa7KBA0D9zn4xeCIMAaZya7q8sH8du5ee7HCB977uqty30_LE0tpVC08B0g%3D%3D)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9acffe4d95b04909b7a6a54a697ddff9&_e=AwKOfKvayRgxRZkr6bg4bFY5_GxTBJFV9JiAmIsuWYCz5YcTH2INmF8smdCk26v67Pdudki7eoxHEbPEMvD_MrBGMEzL0fqemn3rYak8mxVlFCRYVse00cSHUfIzQo1MNWjER1LiwXJWR8TVjZmZ9ACDcfmBp-6XoLX-4J0ZKrGjClf784lv_sAiikEUoywuKbic3-RC9w__Qv7b6srP459Jctwr3HyKukKS9WlXvV4imdqMTY7H_ofMj8kKTI5Haa7IZr3M517xfiRXgb2HHlxzZpQjZ44jBQgZlIeOVUjvBfgsXdqZFZOaQz86wejoSvdRwTKYKEf1Pjw-qsVdOsNMWHYetz-XKbGidsYTNPXCys8ibpleKceV6pFdXNxOYrEdYBKTPN8SalntTNLIqg%3D%3D)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9acffe4d95b04909b7a6a54a697ddff9&_e=AwKOfKvayRgxRZkr6bg4bFY5_GxTBJFV9JiAmIsuWYCz5YcTH2INmF8smdCk26v67Pdudki7eoxHEbPEMvD_MrBGMEzL0fqemn3rYak8mxVlFCRYVse00cSHUfIzQo1MNWjER1LiwXJWR8TVjZmZ9ACDcfmBp-6XoLX-4J0ZKrGjClf784lv_sAiikEUoywuKbic3-RC9w__Qv7b6srP459Jctwr3HyKukKS9WlXvV4imdqMTY7H_ofMj8kKTI5HH83uBMjrh2nYvICUTUf27VZSE09eXMlfZKlOeyxoXaSFmlNkGfZEiB1BoIulX7w3kglMebpHdtmZTlBOD_1YLPWgo9-IRnL5R0BsQrO8H7D0UxhFAigyt6e8mnViycjpWO4XOIvAnD_eRmjcQd7_JA%3D%3D)** [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=9acffe4d95b04909b7a6a54a697ddff9&_t=kAFcG5rvuPLmTbgcixDQY10x29f5yzD02O-_n4irkQLwDWfnpirkGGzE26dPI-qqCg9pg2_8lr89xz-3CunDnKr7aYqI9-nEmNvKSxVPbrRVOzUDoKxGWJTgyFHJkRn9)

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Sign the petition: A working class agenda could checkmate Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Bernie
isn’t giving up the fight, and neither are we. In his post-election op-ed,
Bernie lays out a working class agenda that Democrats can push for in
Congress — and call Republicans bluff. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20463?source=email-20241113&t=1011&akid=7221%2E5885482%2E_a4uwd ]Add your name to support
Bernie’s agenda and urge Democrats to fight the GOP on policy >>

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20463?source=email-20241113&t=1012&akid=7221%2E5885482%2E_a4uwd ]STAND WITH BERNIE

While Republicans hold Congress, Democrats can still propose bills that
force the GOP to either vote yes and stand with the working class or else
reveal themselves as frauds beholden to corporate greed.

Here are some of the priorities Bernie is urging Democrats to fight for in
2025:

* End Citizens United and stop billionaires from buying elections
* Raise the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour
* Pass the PRO Act to make it easier for workers to unionize
* Protect and expand Social Security benefits by lifting the cap
* Expand Medicare to include home care, dental, hearing, and vision
* Cut prescription drug prices in half
* Guarantee paid medical and family leave
* Guarantee equal pay for equal work
* Build 3 million housing units of affordable housing
* Tuition free higher education
* Make childcare affordable
* Raise public school teacher pay
* Tax the rich
* Slash the massive Pentagon budget

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20463?source=email-20241113&t=1013&akid=7221%2E5885482%2E_a4uwd ]STAND WITH BERNIE

As Bernie said, “The simple fact is: if you stand with working people,
they will stand with you. In my view, if Democrats deliver on an agenda
like this, they can win back the working class of our country and the
White House.”

No matter how many people in the billionaire class or leadership of the
Democratic Party criticize Bernie for speaking the truth, we know our
progressive fight is the way forward.

Our movement must come together now, when many in the Democratic Party
don’t know the best path ahead, and amass our support behind Bernie’s
economic agenda. This is how we fight Trumpism and make a working class
agenda central to the Democratic Party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20463?source=email-20241113&t=1014&akid=7221%2E5885482%2E_a4uwd ]Stand with Bernie now. Sign on to support his call for the Democratic
Party to embrace this agenda and bring the fight to Republicans.

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Here are some of the priorities Bernie is urging Democrats to fight for in 2025: End Citizens United and stop billionaires from buying elections Raise the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour Pass the PRO Act to make it easier for workers to unionize Protect and expand Social Security benefits by lifting the cap Expand Medicare to include home care, dental, hearing, and vision Cut prescription drug prices in half Guarantee paid medical and family leave Guarantee equal pay for equal work Build 3 million housing units of affordable housing Tuition free higher education Make childcare affordable Raise public school teacher pay Tax the rich Slash the massive Pentagon budget [ ]STAND WITH BERNIE As Bernie said, “The simple fact is: if you stand with working people, they will stand with you. In my view, if Democrats deliver on an agenda like this, they can win back the working class of our country and the White House.” No matter how many people in the billionaire class or leadership of the Democratic Party criticize Bernie for speaking the truth, we know our progressive fight is the way forward. Our movement must come together now, when many in the Democratic Party don’t know the best path ahead, and amass our support behind Bernie’s economic agenda. This is how we fight Trumpism and make a working class agenda central to the Democratic Party. [ ]Stand with Bernie now. Sign on to support his call for the Democratic Party to embrace this agenda and bring the fight to Republicans. Thank you, Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Chris Murdock
subject: The fight is just beginning.
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee [contact us](mailto:info@ourtenn
body:
How we’re moving forward.

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f019326810efd-b881a226-9d4e-4484-b2b4-75e8e96ac4a3-000000/XOYLAk8Hm26TAg89jM9TSmZdMrA=185)
---
Hello friend,
---
| | Listen, I don’t know where to start about last Tuesday night.

There is no sugarcoating it. It was a bad night for our Country and for our values. We all have a lot of questions about what comes next.

But, I have one answer so far, and that is I am ready to fight back. And I hope you’ll be ready, too.

We started Our Tennessee Future less than a year ago. And, honestly, I’m proud of what we accomplished.

In just a few months, supporters like you helped us raise **over $500,000** – thank you!

We were able to focus on two key races, HD-60 and HD-67.

And both our candidates – Shaundelle Brooks and Ronnie Glynn, respectively – won! In fact, Ronnie Glynn won his race by just 131 votes, which is the closest margin in the state. If you contributed - know that contribution made the difference.

**So how did we do it?**

Well, we made use of every dollar on hand and didn’t take anything for granted. We hit the airwaves with two hard-hitting ads calling out MAGA Republicans. And these honest ads worked – voters rejected both Chad Bobo and Jamie Dean Peltz.

**Right now, a lot of us are grieving, but we can’t fall into despair.** We are not going to rest on our ass, we know we’ve got a lot of work to do ahead. In our state and in our Country.

I’ve asked our team to compile an after-action report because we believe accountability matters.

I’m excited to share this with you in the weeks to come. Together, we’ll build a road map to continue this fight.
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---

_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight.___

clean_body: How we’re moving forward. | | | | | Hello friend, | | Listen, I don’t know where to start about last Tuesday night. There is no sugarcoating it. It was a bad night for our Country and for our values. We all have a lot of questions about what comes next. But, I have one answer so far, and that is I am ready to fight back. And I hope you’ll be ready, too. We started Our Tennessee Future less than a year ago. And, honestly, I’m proud of what we accomplished. In just a few months, supporters like you helped us raise over $500,000 – thank you! We were able to focus on two key races, HD-60 and HD-67. And both our candidates – Shaundelle Brooks and Ronnie Glynn, respectively – won! In fact, Ronnie Glynn won his race by just 131 votes, which is the closest margin in the state. If you contributed - know that contribution made the difference. So how did we do it? Well, we made use of every dollar on hand and didn’t take anything for granted. We hit the airwaves with two hard-hitting ads calling out MAGA Republicans. And these honest ads worked – voters rejected both Chad Bobo and Jamie Dean Peltz. Right now, a lot of us are grieving, but we can’t fall into despair. We are not going to rest on our ass, we know we’ve got a lot of work to do ahead. In our state and in our Country. I’ve asked our team to compile an after-action report because we believe accountability matters. I’m excited to share this with you in the weeks to come. Together, we’ll build a road map to continue this fight. # [EXCLUSIVE: An Update on the Statehouse Revolution](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=151600244&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjAwMjQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1MTc4ODYsImV4cCI6MTczNDEwOTg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VUXvdcnGIFmmECiWVoU5NsdI7cZGslslBH8YClUil24)
### State Freedom Caucuses Are Ready to Rumble
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=151600244&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjAwMjQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1MTc4ODYsImV4cCI6MTczNDEwOTg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VUXvdcnGIFmmECiWVoU5NsdI7cZGslslBH8YClUil24)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2Zjbi9wL2V4Y2x1c2l2ZS1hbi11cGRhdGUtb24tdGhlLXN0YXRlaG91c2U_.f5SRxEqifbHhI9A7KSQidNFy7SuX1OwgQBseLako5cA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/exclusive-an-update-on-the-statehouse?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
Friends,
No doubt you are taking delight in watching all the news in Washington as Trump prepares his transition team. He needs all the support he can get so that he can enact massive reforms to dismantle The Swamp.
But let's not forget the states. There is no doubt that the federal government is fleecing the American people, but so are the states. Fighting the Swamp has to be a federal battle AND a state battle. **Thankfully the State Freedom Caucus Network is primed for the latter.**
Here are just a few highlights to show you how State Freedom Caucuses are moving aggressively forward to prepare for 2025:
* After the November elections, the results are in. Of the 106 State Freedom Caucus members who ran for re-election, 99 of them won. Plus, they recruited over 30 new members who will join them next year. All told, there will be over **200 State Freedom Caucus members fighting for you going into 2025**. And let's not forget that over 30 hostile RINOs lost their re-elections in the process. It was a Win-Win-Win scenario for freedom.
* **Three freedom caucus members are running for State House Speaker.** WYFC member Chip Neiman is the frontrunner in his race and it's going to be exciting to watch him move Wyoming in an unapologetically conservative direction next year. In Missouri, MOFC member Justin Sparks is challenging the Establishment's pick because the latter is a full blown RINO who routinely undermines conservatives. Both of these races are scheduled for early January. The third, AZFC member Joseph Chaplik, unsuccessfully ran earlier this week in a close vote. But his campaign has put the Arizona GOP Establishment on notice that they can't conduct "business as usual" in 2025. Congratulations to all three men for their courageous and principled races.
* **Arizona Freedom Caucus** member, State Rep. Justin Heap, won his race for Maricopa County Recorder. We can't overstate what a big deal this is. The Recorder is in charge of voter registration and elections for one of the largest counties in the nation. As the entire country knows, Maricopa is plagued with election integrity problems. Justin is going into that office to CLEAN HOUSE. This is a huge win for Arizona and the United States.
* **Missouri Freedom Caucus** member, State Sen. Denny Hoskins, won his race for Missouri Secretary of State. Like Justin, Denny has a strong mandate to clean up elections in the Show Me State. As in Show Me Proof of Citizenship before voting!
* Our **Louisiana Freedom Caucus** is wasting ZERO time to enact conservative policies. A special session is happening NOW before 2025 even arrives to cut taxes and spending. They are going to slash income taxes and corporate taxes and establish a statutory growth limit on spending. The tailwinds are strong in the Bayou State. I've said before that Louisiana is the most conservative state in the country - not Florida - and if they are able to pass these monumental reforms, their lead will only expand further.

If all of this sounds good to you - and I know it does - please support the Network's efforts to continue this momentum. It's not enough to have freedom caucuses in just 12 states - we need to get into all 50. And we have the plan to do it.
One of the Network's founding supporters, Mike Rydin, is offering a $500,000 match donation if we can raise another $500,000 before November 30. We are currently at **$227,965.06** towards that goal. Please consider a one-time gift, or even a recurring gift, so that we're ready to fight in the states in 2025.
Our State Freedom Caucuses need your help. Can we count on your support? Please donate today so we can double your investment! The match opportunity ends on **November 30** \- less than a month away.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/244dd4e6-d6d8-4e48-81c1-047ccb0d9b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you don't want to donate online by clicking the button above, you can send us a check to the following:
* **State Freedom Caucus Network** (not tax deductible)
* **State Freedom Caucus Foundation** (tax deductive)

The mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave, SE, Washington, DC 20003.
We also accept stock gifts and IRA distributions. Please reach out to Dana Parish (dana@statefreedomcaucus.org) or Sara Prinzi (sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org) for more information.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/244dd4e6-d6d8-4e48-81c1-047ccb0d9b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/0f9d1eeb-6a2c-4c84-ae7a-7ef7db6ca4b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4YBVKdhk94Ag0G5e1q6SZuPA4LAPBPUFXNtQ52L9X94?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4YBVKdhk94Ag0G5e1q6SZuPA4LAPBPUFXNtQ52L9X94?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

body:

This is odd, friend.

We were going through our voting records and can't seem to find your results.

Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans?

If you could, do us a quick favor and help us correct our records.

By confirming your voting status, it'll help solidify the results to ensure there weren't any irregularities.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Did you see my announcement?
body:
Hi folks,

I wanted to make sure you saw: I’m running to become Virginia’s next Attorney General.

Now more than ever, we need public servants who respect the law and are committed to defending our freedoms from any threat. That is why, as Attorney General, I will ensure that Virginians’ rights are valued and respected. I’ll push back against any threat to my family and yours.

So please, take a few moments to read more about why I’m seeking to serve my home state as Attorney General. Then [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024] , if you’re able, chip in whatever you can to help me launch this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

Thank you,
Jay

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jay Jones
Subject: Join me in the fight for Virginia families
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]
Friend,
I want you to be among the first to know: today, with hope for a brighter future for our Commonwealth and our nation, I am proud to announce my campaign for Attorney General of Virginia.
I’m running because we need an Attorney General focused on keeping Virginians safe, not a personal, partisan political agenda. If you’re already fired up to support our campaign to retire Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General, please chip in right now to become one of the Founding Donors of this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=5] If you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia...
I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it.
Last week, we awoke to an uncertain future and a President-elect who openly flouts the rule of law. In times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the very darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held unswervingly to hope that a brighter future was possible.
As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be the safety of my family and my fellow Virginians.
The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices, and hazards to our health. And President-elect Trump will find an eager accomplice in Virginia Attorney General Miyares. Jason Miyares has used his office to advance his own radical, ideological agenda, not protect Virginians.
As your Attorney General, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. We’ll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes.
I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll crack down on price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class.
If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it.
And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia.
If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect abortion rights, I need you with me.
Our team has set a goal to earn the support of 1,000 Founding Donors. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and kickstart this campaign. Will you chip in any amount to help us launch our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]
Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight.
– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=J4rM%2F8ZXISREUlvXl6957ihDGc0c4UIt1zSrLUVPeq6P16nu8ZkXo6tAP%2FX2V3BpdRL5W5uO6VvyAE0q01NMK8uz1qeTGKQdUzEqxYraAWOx4KlZvFP8BUTkzh0zPZ4QQL9ZCiz1M6pTWeK7stjxSUQCDT77Ce8%2FIKgF%2F0XyCbt%2F3ySm9uIZcJtrZX0wZH8%2FssDUa1%2FwC3THmNexTcR9i5WYrF45q0gmZeY%2BuXG%2FWuFYrWmKQdLluXWCB4bLtiY24JJIt1%2FEJaPKSDQFUpGyb9W4sWr75RpyfnA6SycEVPIuZNMvt0Je4zYdjozwPC8aLs%2F2rc3uc0WxoAklbrIzlPHBBp14Lx1W35Nag2C%2Fel%2BUVghuEcOvmF7%2BOeUx2L3zN8EYmMNZi%2FNt91c08L3weahRZQyIA1whBDvTQ9bYQNV2bxLUHMFGrjSzXdZrXovq .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s time to clean up shop in the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: paid for by AIPAC and other right-wing,
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday we reached out about a dangerous bill, HR 9495, that would give
the Trump administration sweeping power to shut down any nonprofit
organization he doesn’t like by accusing them of wrongdoing without any
due process.

Many of you spoke up and sent urgent messages to your members of Congress,
and thankfully, the bill failed to pass the House — but 52 Democrats voted
for it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-36144&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36144_1203867_TCKo8n&akid=36144%2E1203867%2ETCKo8n ]List of 52 Democrats who voted for HR 9495

These are Democrats bought and paid for by AIPAC and other right-wing,
corporate lobbies who were okay with granting Trump unprecedented and
unchecked power so that it could be used to silence the Pro-Palestinian
movement.

This bill was a far-right assault on our freedom of speech and right to
protest, and it’s appalling that any Democrat would support it. It’s yet
another example of why so many people are disillusioned with Democratic
leadership, who continue to abandon our shared values and move further to
the right.

It’s time to drastically transform the Democratic Party, and these diet
Republicans are a good place to start cleaning up shop. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-36144&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36144_1203867_TCKo8n&akid=36144%2E1203867%2ETCKo8n ]Help Justice

$5 now →

body:
What is your Top Priority for President Trump and our new Republican majority?

Friend,

Before I say anything else, I want to thank you for all of your vital efforts and generous support, which helped President Trump and our GOP Senate candidates win this election.

We couldn't have done it without your support, friend.

name: Mark
subject: 🆘 ACT NOW: Urgent CALL for Election Integrity!
body:
Your immediate action is required to secure fair elections. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9d9f194300&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Sorry it's been almost 2 months since our last "weekly" message. Lots of things have taken priority, including **ELECTION INTEGRITY** initiatives!

**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6deebc983e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
ELECTION INTEGRITY ALERT!
WE NEED YOUR HELP!
THIS IS AN IMPORTANT "ASK"!
PLEASE READ THIS & TAKE ACTION!
(1st Request)**

---
| **Call to Action**
**Call Frank LaRose today at 877-767-6446 and tell him to “Please authorize and direct Monroe County to conduct a 100% paper ballot hand count audit.”

IT DOES NOT MATTER WHERE YOU LIVE IN OHIO, SO PLEASE DON'T NEGLECT CALLING BECAUSE YOU LIVE IN ANOTHER COUNTY!**
_**"You can vote your values all day long ... but if your vote isn't safe and the process isn't secure, it doesn't matter."**_
**BACKGROUND:**

Monroe County is the second least populated county in Ohio, located in the southeast corner of the state. With only about 13,000 residents and 9300 registered voters, there were only 6801 ballots cast in last week’s election.

**SITUATION:**
* In May, the Board of Elections informed county commissioners that if ballots were hand counted, it would take 9 days at a cost of $156,000 per election. We don’t believe those numbers are accurate. We are a small county, and many of our older residents remember results posted on election night when ballots were hand counted.
* In September, we submitted a public records request for the resources used to arrive at those conclusions. We are still waiting.
* In early October, 45 people attended the Board of Elections meeting and requested that the post-election audit be expanded to hand count 100% of the ballots, noting that volunteers would be provided to assist with that task. No response has ever been given.
* A petition was created and circulated following that meeting. In 10 days, 269 Monroe County registered voters signed that petition with more than 80 of them indicating they would like to volunteer if provided the opportunity.
* This petition was submitted to the Board of Elections on Wednesday, October 23 with a response requested by Monday, October 28, to allow for organization and training of all volunteers. No formal response has ever been provided, however, a text from the Chair stated they were “waiting on a response from the state.”
* Prior to election day, 6 poll observers were approved. Very early on Tuesday, November 5th, an observer was informed that the sheriff’s department had been given observers names as potential trouble makers and law enforcement was assigned to each polling location – a first for this county.
* WHAT IS GOING ON IN MONROE COUNTY??? Why does the Board of Elections continue to ignore the voters and stoop to intimidation tactics rather than encourage transparency?

**Please call Frank LaRose today at 877-767-6446 and tell him to “Please authorize and direct Monroe County to conduct a 100% paper ballot hand count audit.”**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=919a7524d5&e=5c740fa3e2)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: one year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I know when we come together and focus on the issues that matter most – stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families – we can get things done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97038080/512064288/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY3MDI4MzAtZTdhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIoDAzKOstbzRjbTvQRfz9gy1T-QSl3reZpyguFredw=)
---
| Peter,

One year ago today, I launched my campaign for Governor of Virginia. **As I reflect back on the last year, I’m grateful for the many conversations I’ve had with Virginians across our Commonwealth.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97038081/512064289/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY3MDI4MzAtZTdhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIoDAzKOstbzRjbTvQRfz9gy1T-QSl3reZpyguFredw=)
---
I got into public service because, from a young age, my parents – a career law enforcement officer and a nurse – instilled in me a deep devotion to our country. Years ago, I swore my first oath to the U.S. Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a career serving my community, my Commonwealth, and my country — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love.

When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads. I decided to run for Congress. We worked hard, and we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle. In 2018, Virginia’s Seventh District elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968.

As I reflect on both the past year and last week’s election, I’m once again reflecting on what I said when I launched this campaign to serve as the next Governor of Virginia: our Commonwealth is at another crossroads. Do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress?

While last week’s election wasn’t what we wanted, I’m still filled with hope and a true belief in the promise of Virginia’s future. And I am committed to standing up for the values that unite us as Virginians.

I know when we come together and focus on the issues that matter most – stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families – we can get things done.

[_**It is still a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now and support my campaign with a contribution? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97038082/512064290/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY3MDI4MzAtZTdhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIoDAzKOstbzRjbTvQRfz9gy1T-QSl3reZpyguFredw=)

clean_body: I know when we come together and focus on the issues that matter most – stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families – we can get things done. | = | Peter, One year ago today, I launched my campaign for Governor of Virginia. As I reflect back on the last year, I’m grateful for the many conversations I’ve had with Virginians across our Commonwealth. | = I got into public service because, from a young age, my parents – a career law enforcement officer and a nurse – instilled in me a deep devotion to our country. Years ago, I swore my first oath to the U.S. Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a career serving my community, my Commonwealth, and my country — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love. When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads. I decided to run for Congress. We worked hard, and we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle. In 2018, Virginia’s Seventh District elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968. As I reflect on both the past year and last week’s election, I’m once again reflecting on what I said when I launched this campaign to serve as the next Governor of Virginia: our Commonwealth is at another crossroads. Do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? While last week’s election wasn’t what we wanted, I’m still filled with hope and a true belief in the promise of Virginia’s future. And I am committed to standing up for the values that unite us as Virginians. I know when we come together and focus on the issues that matter most – stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families – we can get things done. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e92fb70cda0546efb80f9f4f6dda8c3b&_e=bqzCTLxe_A6G4L3PfYYBYfv1vTaBBSnOp-OME1X9HMxR8_vas2QXsXNs5GxrUeazKz9slULVaNEchPJ36Riz15hOUe3MLjtlLwWvCszcu7n641BdFbs0BNG5-5I3vZYsxUq6p93llA9KyeTRAPtphRRT1KMr2hFHpQzjiD647TUQ9q_xcqcBC9_YjFk3fAM6BTtK-rZv8Xt1yATdyixL3NZeJQsfGVNmJMq_FRr75oQTfLenZnQn967yrTa-JzdzaOGYa6yfU_oI1uvjlxUin2bw5_R5JVa3i7hPTEaVbbmk5sE2h4g0a9Ot2hlBxamCGjBE_RSLLiuTLDetWjN3QFRygMWlpvFqv2EJtSNvQihRU_v_SGLUa-gAhGaO5j77RhaAz4EW6G-B_3rjs9-4mY75F2lWVkDFLL7I9nan644%3D)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_? Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e92fb70cda0546efb80f9f4f6dda8c3b&_e=bqzCTLxe_A6G4L3PfYYBYfv1vTaBBSnOp-OME1X9HMxR8_vas2QXsXNs5GxrUeazKz9slULVaNEchPJ36Riz15hOUe3MLjtlLwWvCszcu7n641BdFbs0BNG5-5I3vZYsxUq6p93llA9KyeTRAPtphRRT1KMr2hFHpQzjiD647TUQ9q_xcqcBC9_YjFk3fAM6BTtK-rZv8Xt1yATdyixL3NZeJQsfGVNmJMq_FRr75oQTfLenZnQn967yrTa-Jzdz39jQmAox-sNeQZAX7Wat9jbOeZJD4utG8gQCs-OtRQqD0foYZL2S9HN2P7mTCAlTUPthPemyw_LHjYVS9aK3zfYXdfEd3oii2HDZwJhzKb5jHUwLtmxT-PiGHu8RSOtPklHhh1igjS0MhfLhFo4mkMXM7DQmggDqzEd-5iynsto%3D)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e92fb70cda0546efb80f9f4f6dda8c3b&_e=bqzCTLxe_A6G4L3PfYYBYfv1vTaBBSnOp-OME1X9HMxR8_vas2QXsXNs5GxrUeazKz9slULVaNEchPJ36Riz15hOUe3MLjtlLwWvCszcu7n641BdFbs0BNG5-5I3vZYsxUq6p93llA9KyeTRAPtphRRT1KMr2hFHpQzjiD647TUQ9q_xcqcBC9_YjFk3fAM6BTtK-rZv8Xt1yATdyixL3NZeJQsfGVNmJMq_FRr75oQTfLenZnQn967yrTa-JzdzFt5yCUHm4foLLIzXBeiwYEHbZjvGfMEEnwM9oyc-Jlfo8jGmfsdUz-ISxCNqlzGCbg5n9SE4CISZFWHLQG24gsS3_imyxXZkt--a2v4StktfohBQUTut5keXOU2Ez-f7g-HyLp4dNtPVXRHDm9G41lc1hGdH696_Ccv4n8mj-yg%3D) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events. Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories. Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries. Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e92fb70cda0546efb80f9f4f6dda8c3b&_e=bqzCTLxe_A6G4L3PfYYBYfv1vTaBBSnOp-OME1X9HMxR8_vas2QXsXNs5GxrUeazKz9slULVaNEchPJ36Riz15hOUe3MLjtlLwWvCszcu7n641BdFbs0BNG5-5I3vZYsxUq6p93llA9KyeTRAPtphRRT1KMr2hFHpQzjiD647TUQ9q_xcqcBC9_YjFk3fAM6BTtK-rZv8Xt1yATdyixL3NZeJQsfGVNmJMq_FRr75oQTfLenZnQn967yrTa-JzdzSwEfVer6chq_9aBxln93fCjGAdIUaBH5yBmhB2Tw9nO_eNz6QSRHVNsqzvXHaVPMscbmUdPjVyPb_5ltx-SdAVZtN0Suu7aWvnS-oXS1ofTfXDaciNs5UfjnS8afF5qOjQJ_z6uoteRvbWatN-Q-1x9Ele_TEi0CwVx_bahjJ4o%3D)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values. God bless America,
---
| | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father

### Here are the receipts legacy media isn't reporting on what cancelling student debt will do for our country
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151608852&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjA4ODUyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTUyMTAxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzM0MTEzMDEyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BE8Ix2YGLlHhdR8miH9GckIB6ECLtdu4RppN8XdOEq0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151608852&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjA4ODUyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1MjEwMTIsImV4cCI6MTczNDExMzAxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Na4qT8VsFSmhVIh8Avh1zAM5TsV-3JVrPhgWKLeM8aQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151608852&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjA4ODUyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1MjEwMTIsImV4cCI6MTczNDExMzAxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Na4qT8VsFSmhVIh8Avh1zAM5TsV-3JVrPhgWKLeM8aQ)
