| | [](https://substack..sseFSmkwWa7Q5-0xcqESo89TY8baHAHArmauPK2Oz4Y?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/seriously-joe-cancel-all-student?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
Yesterday I wrote about [five key actions Biden can take](https://substack.com/redirect/b99de9c9-0198-4e62-b602-92a0d2844c80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to protect Americans and slow MAGA fascism. What if there was one single action that could help our economy, while positively affecting the [racial wealth and income inequality gaps](https://substack.com/redirect/1b531129-6f69-42f5-bbc4-aa24a42fa4cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), grow healthy families, grow local businesses, decrease depression and suicide rates, and increase car and home ownership?
In fact, there is -- cancel student loan debt. Joe Biden should use his Executive powers to cancel all student debt. Biden tried to go through Congress for a bill to cancel all student debt, reform the higher education loan system and make four-year public college free to all Americans. Given that Congress failed to act, Biden should [act now to cancel student debt with an Executive Order.](https://substack.com/redirect/e9cea435-6401-4e39-bee9-334380744136?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Let 's Address This.**
I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JKc7S9SIdrjgOCoduHQBSopyVrN8s7yrtFMiQNDvZX4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151608852)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c90a03c-a293-4c3b-ac34-a98d3964c195?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Student loan borrowers at the White House to tell President Biden to cancel student debt. Credit: _Paul Morigi / Getty Images_
### Can Biden Cancel Student Debt?
In a word, yes. Notwithstanding that "[more than 230 organizations and non-profits](https://substack.com/redirect/75c3f30c-09b2-432c-93e0-43ba26a6d2cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including Americans for Financial Reform, the NAACP and the National Consumer Law Center called on Biden to cancel student loans on his first day as president," Senator Elizabeth Warren published a [detailed analysis by Harvard Law scholars affirming that the President has the authority to cancel student debt](https://substack.com/redirect/5078c662-3951-48af-b1c6-ceed7b547fc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under the Department of Education. And especially given Trump's plan to abolish the DOE, which will no doubt raise education costs, Biden needs to act immediately while he still can to protect American students.
Moreover, Biden has already used his Executive Order powers to [cancel $175 billion in student debt](https://substack.com/redirect/a4b583a7-2ff9-4b5e-af49-7901ecd69ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The question really isn't about whether he has the power, it's why won't he use it? Even Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y. [said he supports forgiving the first $50,000 in loans.](https://substack.com/redirect/f65fae49-d248-497c-968e-b50ea54887cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) A poll from Vox and Data for Progress found that a majority of respondents support [canceling some amount of debt](https://substack.com/redirect/bc68346f-c36a-4d2f-8cdf-494e6f3894b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JKc7S9SIdrjgOCoduHQBSopyVrN8s7yrtFMiQNDvZX4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151608852)
### How Will We Pay For It?
One criticism is the perennial "but how will we pay for it?" But as [The Debt Collective points out](https://substack.com/redirect/3b6e66aa-1477-4c8a-b967-9be570656a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Student debt cancelation doesn't require that any money be drawn from the Treasury. Your taxes aren't "going up" because of student debt relief. The money has already gone out the door. Canceling debt that has existed for 10, 20 and 50+ years is simply not requiring money to be paid back that was NEVER going to be repaid anyway.
Moreover, our nation does not suffer from a lack of resources; we suffer from an excess of greed. As I have said before, we "cancel" the debts of [hundreds of millionaires and billionaires](https://substack.com/redirect/6dd94fab-4de0-41a5-9d0e-ed62bc00fb64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every year through tax breaks. We've [bailed out billionaire corporations](https://substack.com/redirect/1b3a787a-6786-46c2-a4b4-a17541510ee3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) repeatedly without batting an eye. The theory here is that bailing out these corporations is necessary for a healthy economy and sustainable workforce. But isn't it time the American people [received that same benefit](https://substack.com/redirect/d88e5980-0e6b-40e3-859f-42f687654438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to overcome a system many feel is rigged against them?
President Donald Trump's tax cuts [failed to improve our economy](https://substack.com/redirect/dc08ea70-6d53-42ad-bac1-6da409e6e70a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), said Maya MacGuineas, president of the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget. On the other hand, plenty of economists believe that canceling [student loan debt for around 40 million Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/8b46aa7d-c8bf-4712-8c61-2efbaf1f313d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would most likely boost our economy.
### Isn't Cancelling Student Debt Unfair?
Another criticism is that canceling student debt is unfair to those who have already managed to pay off their loans. It's interesting how this argument is never applied to those who had their PPP loans forgiven. But the reality is, canceling student debt benefits everyone, not just those with debt. As the progressive nonprofit Americans for Financial Reform [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/c805ba32-f08f-4e2a-941e-80eba1372bd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "[A study by the Levy Institute showed](https://substack.com/redirect/faa65ce8-24be-43cc-abab-ac4709fbe15c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that student debt cancellation would boost GDP by as much as $108 billion per year, and add up to 1.5 million jobs per year."
Just as important, surviving a past injustice does not mean we should prevent future justice. It means we should accelerate it.
Far from being "unfair," canceling student debt would also deal a blow to the massive and increasing racial wealth gap. Studies repeatedly show that Black students are burdened with [greater student debt as compared to white students](https://substack.com/redirect/ed4449e5-0fe4-45d8-8b78-c548f593d3eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because of the lasting impact of policies like redlining and Jim Crow. Compounding this injustice, [the Black-white disparity in student loans increases after graduation](https://substack.com/redirect/020781bf-8bb8-4c43-b97b-97f121dd89f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This growing divide is generational and further separates the haves from the have nots.
Likewise, studies and polling show that because of student debt, [women are putting off having children](https://substack.com/redirect/0741cd00-7dfa-4e6c-b598-e56d3a025f9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and young people in general are putting off [buying homes and cars](https://substack.com/redirect/d1e67bef-3801-4fe6-9039-bfe955a29771?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or [starting small businesses](https://substack.com/redirect/1b7a29f6-1f03-4f5e-836f-ef0e2bd1f49b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). National Association of Realtors chief economist [Lawrence Yun told NPR](https://substack.com/redirect/c0c6efee-a322-46b5-82c9-baf1eabb6c1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that "student debt has people delaying homeownership by five to seven years," and estimates that broad loan forgiveness would increase home sales.
[One study of 829 people](https://substack.com/redirect/58438c5e-ffce-4001-af1f-16c412a6625e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by a student loan debt planning company even found that high loans can increase depression, anxiety and even suicidal thoughts.
This suffering is preventable. Biden can mitigate it with the swipe of a pen.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JKc7S9SIdrjgOCoduHQBSopyVrN8s7yrtFMiQNDvZX4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151608852)
### Cancelling Student Debt Is The First Critical Step
Obviously, the system needs more than a quick reset. The federal government must ensure that student loans are grounded in reality and in job opportunities after graduation. Debt reform means interest rates should also be capped. But we have to start with meaningful debt relief that will give millions of Americans room to breathe.
And as I've written before, some may argue that Trump would likely try to roll this back. But if so, let's force him to make that choice publicly. Imagine Trump explaining to the 40 million Americans shackled by $1.7 trillion in exploitative debt that he plans to reinstate that burden while simultaneously cancelling $2 trillion in taxes for the wealthiest Americans?
Young people were raised on the belief that education is the passport to the future. They pursued higher education with the understanding that economic security is the natural result of higher education. The federal government, which was elected by students and their parents, is supposed to prevent the exploitation of vulnerable young people. Instead, tuition at four-year private colleges [has increased 25 percent since the 2008-09](https://substack.com/redirect/2b8fb305-bcaf-4c8e-b9cf-2d97c006d913?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) school year and closer to 30 percent for public colleges. Meanwhile, average salaries have not increased by the same margin -- not at all.
### In Conclusion
College should enable the American dream. Instead, for many, it undermines it. It shouldn't seem radical for a young person to want the same economic access afforded to their parents and grandparents. It's no coincidence, then, that millennials are financially worse off than their parents -- [a first in American history](https://substack.com/redirect/6f6a66df-4754-41f4-949b-04ff73792880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[In 1968](https://substack.com/redirect/51eb41f3-f4ec-464a-8ec9-f08307c9ee4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the year Biden graduated from law school, the median cost of public college was $329 and the median salary was about $10,000 -- a 1:30 ratio. Today, the median cost of public college is $10,230 and the median salary is about $51,000 -- a 1:5 ratio. As Biden leaves office for the final time, canceling student debt is a (relatively) easy but key reform. The price tag only seems high when we don't put it into perspective. In reality, the American people cannot afford for Biden to _not_ cancel student debt.
_A[version](https://substack.com/redirect/a66df065-de89-40f7-b41d-488ad42c84d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of this OpEd appeared on NBC Think._

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Big Counting Day - Provisional Ballots
body:
Counting is going on in all five counties today. We have observers in each county as the Provisional Ballots cast in Early Voting and on Election Day | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=bcd0cfb72b)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

Counting is going on in all five counties today. We have observers in each county as the Provisional Ballots cast in Early Voting and on Election Day are counted.

**There are approximately 20,000 provisional ballots. ** We won with voters on election day and in early voting, so this count should be very different from the vote-by-mail counts.

**Could you make a quick donation to help to make sure every ballot is counted properly?**
---
| [Send $10 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=163814ae88&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $10 Today")
---
| [Send $25 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=e0b1f106c1&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $25 Today")
---
| [Send $50 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=42bda369c2&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $50 Today")
---
| [Send $100 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=5065b7ddac&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $100 Today")
---
|
---
| We have poll watchers at each of the counting locations right now to make sure the votes are counted fairly and accurately.
Volunteers and I have been working day in and day out because we CARE ABOUT OUR COUNTRY.

Could you donate right now to help make sure the count is performed accurately?
---
| [DONATE $10](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=bd8f7221c7&e=5a45ee1154 "DONATE $10")
---
| [DONATE $50](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=bdcce79a47&e=5a45ee1154 "DONATE $50")
---
| [DONATE $100](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=c46ab9e0dc&e=5a45ee1154 "DONATE $100")
---
| **__Thank you for your help and for your prayers. Today is a critical counting day, and I am thankful that so many people are helping.__**

Sincerely,
Neil
---
| [SEND WHAT YOU CAN TO HELP ENSURE A FAIR COUNT](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=77455d04e7&e=5a45ee1154 "SEND WHAT YOU CAN TO HELP ENSURE A FAIR COUNT")

Could you make a quick donation to help to make sure every ballot is counted properly? | "Send $10 Today" | "Send $25 Today" | "Send $50 Today" | "Send $100 Today" | | We have poll watchers at each of the counting locations right now to make sure the votes are counted fairly and accurately. Volunteers and I have been working day in and day out because we CARE ABOUT OUR COUNTRY. Could you donate right now to help make sure the count is performed accurately? | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | Thank you for your help and for your prayers. Today is a critical counting day, and I am thankful that so many people are helping. Sincerely, Neil | "SEND WHAT YOU CAN TO HELP ENSURE A FAIR COUNT" | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | Parrott for Congress P.O. Box 32 Funkstown, MD 21734 240-329-2660 mailto:neil@neilparrott.org Copyright © 2024 Parrott for Congress, All rights reserved. | "Donate to Parrott for Congress" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Delegate Neil Parrott PO Box 32 Funkstown, MD 21734-0032 * USA

name: Alma Adams
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alma Adams for Congress
body:
While the presidential outcome isn’t what we had hoped, the people have spoken. Vice President Kamala Harris ran a brilliant campaign in a difficult environment, and women and girls everywhere have seen what’s possible.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97041221/512075349/-1824608032?refcode=BLU_EM_ALMA_2024-11-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzEzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGY4Y2EyYy1lZWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkfIzbDsSrRO-uv5rQmBhoMT-jxsR8qUbX-_eEQOqRM=)
---
| Peter,

I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for your support of this campaign and the work we did throughout this election cycle.

This campaign wouldn’t have been possible without you, and I am so grateful for everything we’ve done together._My commitment to the people remains as strong as ever._

**While the presidential outcome isn’t what we had hoped, the people have spoken.** Vice President Kamala Harris ran a brilliant campaign in a difficult environment, and women and girls everywhere have seen what’s possible.

Access to quality healthcare, support for working families, and the pursuit of equal rights for all remain at the forefront of this mission. I will continue advocating for policies that address these urgent needs, ensuring we don’t just make progress but defend it as well.

With every challenge, I’ve always known I could count on you to stand with me. Today is no different. **Together, we’ll keep pushing forward, working to protect the rights and futures of all North Carolinians.**

Thank you again for being part of this journey with me.

With unwavering gratitude,
Alma
---

Together, we’ll keep pushing forward, working to protect the rights and futures of all North Carolinians. Thank you again for being part of this journey with me. name: Katie Porter
subject: How you can support Will Rollins today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu)
Derek,
Donald Trump is already making appointments--including Elon Musk.
So we need to do everything we can to strengthen Democratic power in the House of Representatives to fight back against Trump, his henchmen, and extreme policies we know Republicans will be working on passing.
Will Rollins, running against Republican incumbent Ken Calvert, still has an opportunity to flip CA-41 from red to blue. Over 20% of the votes still need to be counted, Derek.
**[Will’s race is so close--less than 3% apart from his opponent—and he’s gearing up for a recount. Can you split a $5 donation right now to get Will the resources he needs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-39294&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39294_3422442_-S-Xdu&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-39294&refcode2=39294_3422442_-S-Xdu&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu)
I know Will is going to be a real champion for working people in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he helped prosecute some of the insurrectionists who attacked our Capitol on January 6th.
Our fight isn’t over. We must do everything we can to fight back against Republican extremism and Donald Trump.
**[Please take action today by splitting a contribution between Will Rollins’ recount fund and Truth to Power. In a race as close as this one, every single vote will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-39294&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39294_3422442_-S-Xdu&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu)**
Thanks,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241113-39294&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39294_3422442_-S-Xdu&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39294%2E3422442%2E-S-Xdu).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
clean_body: Derek, Donald Trump is already making appointments--including Elon Musk. So we need to do everything we can to strengthen Democratic power in the House of Representatives to fight back against Trump, his henchmen, and extreme policies we know Republicans will be working on passing. Will Rollins, running against Republican incumbent Ken Calvert, still has an opportunity to flip CA-41 from red to blue. Over 20% of the votes still need to be counted, Derek. I know Will is going to be a real champion for working people in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he helped prosecute some of the insurrectionists who attacked our Capitol on January 6th. Our fight isn’t over. We must do everything we can to fight back against Republican extremism and Donald Trump. Thanks, Katie Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

subject: MAGA is making Musk more powerful
body:
The Trump-Musk alliance is growing stronger. WE need to stop the billionaires.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2ven1r-gkp4c2-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **The Musk-Trump Alliance**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2ven1r-gkp4c3-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | folks, Elon Musk and Donald Trump form a powerful alliance threatening the heart of American democracy. Musk’s plan to amplify his PACs and lead Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency signals a strategic push to concentrate power among billionaires. Their goal? To dismantle federal agencies, strip away regulations, and privatize essential public services for personal gain—eroding the protections that keep everyday Americans secure. With Musk’s $200 million funding Trump’s campaign, his influence over social media, policy, and finances skews democracy itself, manipulating voters and shaping policy to benefit the elite few. This unchecked power undermines our elections, courts, and safeguards. [**_Now, in these off years before the 2026 midterms, mobilization is essential. We must hold MAGA forces accountable, expand our base, amplify our message, and make an impact wherever we can. This isn’t just politics—it’s about safeguarding the future. name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We are still not going back.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241113&t=1&akid=1435%2E587540%2EcGDON9)
**It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about Tuesday without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.**
After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — nothing would have changed. Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times.
This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either.
Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge:
Last Tuesday, we helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads.
Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom.
We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature.
We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockely to be the youngest member of the Ohio House.
Of course, these victories are bittersweet in the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them.
Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and will unlock the opportunity for so many more young people to win in the future. Between our opportunities to recruit more in the next few years and targeting more congressional races, it's going to be incredible. These new, young leaders will be pivotal to our path forward.
Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either.
Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work and continues to do so as we pave the path forward. It’s time to get back to work.
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241113&t=2&refcode2=1435_587540_cGDON9&akid=1435%2E587540%2EcGDON9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1435%2E587540%2EcGDON9)

Numerous Democratic candidates have either taken the lead or gained serious ground as blue leaning vote-by-mail ballots get counted. That’s why the California Democratic Party is keeping our field operation up and running to ensure that every single vote counts. This has been a demoralizing election, but control of the U.S. House is still on the table. = = = = = = We know many of you have already generously donated this election. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
The voters have made their decision and we must respect it. I will not be the next Representative for Arizona’s 6th Congressional District.
While we came up short, I couldn’t be prouder of the work we’ve put in.
From donors to volunteers to staff to my family, we’ve all made sacrifices to be a part of this campaign, and I want to thank you. I am deeply grateful for all of the time and effort everyone has contributed.
In 2016, I first ran for the State Legislature because I saw our flailing public education system and wanted to make a change. I wanted to serve my community. That’s the same reason I ran for the State Senate four years later and then for Congress.
Together, our campaign has done exactly that. We fought to lower housing, energy, and grocery costs, defend our fundamental freedoms, secure the border, and protect our water future.
It has been an honor to be the Democratic nominee for Congress and, while I won’t be serving CD6 in Congress, my work to make life better for Arizonans will continue.
Thank you for being part of Team Engel.
Onwards,
Kirsten
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

name: Derek Tran
subject: Too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

| Peter – It’s Derek Tran.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race.

**We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

_The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._

And, Peter, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.

[_**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and Fight for Progress to help us count every vote? # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I’m counting on you.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6deae6a7-8243-481f-acf9-0a52baa8a9d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us. I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard. That’s why we have to see this across the finish line. I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going. [Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $15 or more right now between myself and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1428370-188e-4705-8d67-e452e09d81ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e6859d1-c1f7-464a-8855-0870f987f774/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either. Let’s finish this strong: [Split $15 or more between Blue Amp Action and me to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50068922-95f7-48c6-9094-78a20b65d47d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude, Bob Casey
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241113_finishstrong_b4_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted326c1e-8417-4d3f-bb50-77e841192852/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: House Majority will come down to CA-45
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
There is still a path for Democrats to flip the House Majority from red-to-blue – and it will come down to uncalled, toss up races in California.

| Peter,

It’s all going to come down to California.

**There is still a path for Democrats to flip the House Majority from red-to-blue – and it will come down to uncalled, toss up races in California.**

California’s 45th District is a MUST WIN for Democrats in order to take back the House.

And right now, the CA-45 Democratic nominee, Derek Tran, is closing in on his extremist Republican opponent.

**There are still thousands of ballots yet to be counted, so victory hinges on counting every vote in CA-45.**[_**That’s why I'm asking; Will you split a donation between Derek Tran’s recount fund and me today to help count every vote and ensure Democrats can take back the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97043714/512083611/-177490216?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-11-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTFmZjVkYTgtZjVhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yJvxhwV-bolLTUTYsqUXUSedC6tFB9_Ne7nFdNJYaSk=)

Here’s why it matters:

A Democratic House Majority may be our last line of defense against Donald Trump and the Project 2025 agenda.

With Donald Trump in the White House and MAGA Republicans controlling the Senate, we need a House Majority that will stop a national abortion ban, cuts to Social Security, and guts to healthcare dead in their tracks.

**The Democratic House Majority is still in reach, but only if we can flip CA-45 blue and send Derek Tran to Congress.**

[_**Will you help me in securing this last line of defense by splitting a donation to Derek Tran’s legal fund and me? clean_body: There is still a path for Democrats to flip the House Majority from red-to-blue – and it will come down to uncalled, toss up races in California. | Peter, It’s all going to come down to California. There is still a path for Democrats to flip the House Majority from red-to-blue – and it will come down to uncalled, toss up races in California. California’s 45th District is a MUST WIN for Democrats in order to take back the House. And right now, the CA-45 Democratic nominee, Derek Tran, is closing in on his extremist Republican opponent. There are still thousands of ballots yet to be counted, so victory hinges on counting every vote in CA-45.= | = Here’s why it matters: A Democratic House Majority may be our last line of defense against Donald Trump and the Project 2025 agenda. With Donald Trump in the White House and MAGA Republicans controlling the Senate, we need a House Majority that will stop a national abortion ban, cuts to Social Security, and guts to healthcare dead in their tracks. The Democratic House Majority is still in reach, but only if we can flip CA-45 blue and send Derek Tran to Congress. = | = | = | = | = | = We can do this, April McClain Delaney * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.

clean_body: I’m counting on you. | | | | Friends, We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us. I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard. That’s why we have to see this across the finish line. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either. Let’s finish this strong: With gratitude, Bob Casey The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
| | |
---
Hello, friend.

This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97044089/512084750/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2527-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4NDRjNWMtZjZhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vBSJxbLDJ1doh51thwa7gZg6HvhqI9dC92MXBYk5Q-0=)

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, split $5 or more between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97044090/512084751/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2527-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4NDRjNWMtZjZhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vBSJxbLDJ1doh51thwa7gZg6HvhqI9dC92MXBYk5Q-0=)**

name: Derek Tran
subject: Reaching out with an urgent update on our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend – It’s Derek Tran.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you an update on our race.

**We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.

_The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._

And, folks, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.

[**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and the Voter Protection Project to help us count every vote? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85099?t=6&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran - Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85104?t=7&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85105?t=8&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85102?t=9&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85103?t=10&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85099?t=11&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
Thank you for standing by me,

Derek
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85099?t=12&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18032%2E878179%2Eudn6sE)

name: Dan Carr
subject: NOW IS THE TIME
body:
Why We Need Strong Conservatives in Office

| |
---|---|---
|
# NOW IS THE TIME
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
**Why We Need Strong Conservatives in Office**
Strong conservatives bring principles that emphasize limited government, individual freedoms, fiscal responsibility, and traditional values, all of which create a framework for liberty and opportunity. With the challenges facing society today, from the erosion of family values to excessive government spending, it's crucial that conservatives run for office to ensure these foundational principles guide our communities and country. Conservative candidates can promote policies that protect religious freedom, uphold the sanctity of life, and secure a stable future for generations to come.
[10 Steps to Run for Political Office:](https://substack.com/redirect/8359d3bf-2b6d-4e2d-953e-b7a0e9b71738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | | | | **This is very important**...

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19088/6374453/b75a717b35f8c648e17f1fefcdd41f4a76b3a210/e837e7575443a0310cd2240f81b8e5066f521297)
| | | **_that's the new generation 2 Rats tourniquet._**

**It saves lives.**

You should _absolutely have at least one_.

LISTEN, even though 30,000 people die from loss of blood due to an unforeseen freak injury each year...

**I highly doubt it will happen to you or a loved one,** and surely hope not BUT...

_Why not be prepared?_

So, if you or a loved one are ever faced with a critical bleed out injury, you'll have the ability to apply this tourniquet in less than 7 seconds, and you'll survive.

Especially when [you can have the best life saving tourniquet for HALF PRICE.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19088/6374453/b75a717b35f8c648e17f1fefcdd41f4a76b3a210/e837e7575443a0310cd2240f81b8e5066f521297)..

I mean less than 10 bucks.

[... and secure it in under 60 seconds by clicking here.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19088/6374453/b75a717b35f8c648e17f1fefcdd41f4a76b3a210/e837e7575443a0310cd2240f81b8e5066f521297)

**I think you, your life and other lives are very much worth it.**

[Grab one right now](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19088/6374453/b75a717b35f8c648e17f1fefcdd41f4a76b3a210/e837e7575443a0310cd2240f81b8e5066f521297), and hopefully YOU'LL never need it...

But if you do, [you'll have the tool to save your life or theirs.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19088/6374453/b75a717b35f8c648e17f1fefcdd41f4a76b3a210/e837e7575443a0310cd2240f81b8e5066f521297)

Stay Ready.

\- Lou

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now. His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure every ballot is counted. Bob’s team is working hard to make all Pennsylvanians have their voice heard, but they need the resources to make that happen. Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪 If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thank you so much ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania ** Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
body:
Hello.

This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help
to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-1554&refcode2=1554_21716__bieEO&akid=1554%2E21716%2E_bieEO ]Donate »

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be
counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must
allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.

My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but
we’ll need the resources to keep up this work.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241113-1?refcode=em20241113-1554&amount=5&refcode2=1554_21716__bieEO&akid=1554%2E21716%2E_bieEO ]So please, split $5 or more between Sarah McBride and me
today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241113-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241113-1554&refcode2=1554_21716__bieEO&akid=1554%2E21716%2E_bieEO ]Donate $5 »

I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard,
whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election.

Now, let’s finish the job.

With gratitude,

Bob Casey

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.sarahmcbride.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1554%2E21716%2E_bieEO

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: Derek Tran
subject: The Democratic House Majority hinges on my race in CA-45
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97046014/512091494/-491556796?refcode=241113&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGExMTk1Mi1mZWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyROSFv1SVQcuoTw4UYEbWKlIcL07Xoiz60O5SEN3r0=)
---
Friend – it’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. **We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. _The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._ And, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense. [**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and Serve America to help us count every vote? name: VoteVets
subject: The fight starts here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Our National Security depends on people of resolve and dedication speaking out and working to stem the worst of the effects of Trump as he rolls out Project 2025.
#
Peter, we won’t be able to take on every single horrendous thing that comes out of the Trump administration.
We’re going to need to be focused for these next four years, and we’re going to need to drill in on righteous fights when we can have an impact.
And, frankly, when we do pick those righteous fights... we’re going to have a tough time winning them. We’re dealing with a man who made his intentions clear: A dictator on day one.
**But none of this — not a single piece of it — means that we won’t fight back. VoteVets will be on the frontline, same as we always have been. There is too much at stake to check out and give up.** Our National Security depends on people of resolve and dedication speaking out, spreading the word, and working to stem the worst of the effects of Trump as he rolls out Project 2025.
When we can win, we will do everything we can to make it happen. When we can’t, we will extract a cost. But at every opportunity, we’re going to need this team backing us up in the months and years ahead.
And today, one of the first fights is taking shape.
**Reporting indicates that one of the core Military goals of Project 2025 — the purge of “disloyal” senior officers and their replacement by loyalists who swear an oath to Trump alone — is coming together.**
Everyone vows to support and defend the Constitution when you join the Military. Most people know this. But you also vow not to follow any illegal order. And when you continue in your career, your promotions are determined by fellow officers — and ultimately are approved by the Senate when you reach the senior ranks of Generals or Admirals.
Trump aims to set up what are effectively “Purity Boards” that exist outside of the current promotion structure, composed of true believers. These boards will review current senior flag officers and fast track their removal if they are deemed insufficiently loyal. Once they’re gone, we can expect that Trump will elevate officers who will answer every order he gives without question — legal or otherwise.
**It is outright, clear politicization of the Military over professionalism and competence, and it puts the entire Constitutional order on the chipping block.** Our Military is the most powerful and capable force in the history of the world, and Trump would destroy it. History is littered with defeated Militaries who sacrificed their warfighting capability on the altar of politics.
If Trump succeeds our adversaries will take note and we will all be less safe.
Peter, we want to make this absolutely clear: We might not be able to prevent Trump from doing incalculable damage to our Military by enacting this plan. **But you can be damn sure we’re going to try.**
[**Please. We need you to add your name and speak out against Trump’s “Purity Boards,” and this blatant attempt to purge and politicize the Military. Our best option today is to come together and speak out against this. Make noise. We have to make it politically untenable.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?source=em241113-1-30&akid=33749%2E3013755%2E7OAW-M)**
| [SIGN ON NOW](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?source=em241113-1-30&akid=33749%2E3013755%2E7OAW-M)
---
Thank you for adding your voice as we start to fight back.
The team at VoteVets

body:
The shocking truth is coming out.| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=ceedb2fff0204ef9832e26689a1b2a88&_e=L8LqI2iBF_55X6Hq-4KKiRdNy0Tl7_WMdKhr3bjzbZus5ZuNvYUNRQlw2eHulRlI3sSwp2ruQm-Ujm1fA3p9h-N4vMhmQV5CqMg5tN5DjGZDCiN1PEiwafZh-I60ZvsnF7fZ34JFIREMyDLSo43ec3UFDHBrQseCY_LYRtsUZJTRb_j-raxLfjr85_QCmwK6DPx-pHRWzc3scJuKXCcQvKj-vtaSPllT4FD5F6QptrqFMYHRzpd94NTmtJzmqSzMs41XYOQpwdXpP0x7bPCgA36fABcu2bT2RRTb4unrTYKaV4MZu2NM2OmZCU7Lvz03ZCXb4H4OPmA31YMmgxuSV-IDLcEYswmcxsDXaLYrEvU%3D)
---
Peter

I’ll be honest, when I heard that FEMA workers were skipping over homes with Trump signs, I thought the rumor was too outrageous to be true, but I started digging. And now the truth is finally coming out, and it’s more shocking than I could have imagined. FEMA workers canvassed areas in Florida impacted by Hurricane Milton and were directed to avoid houses with Trump signs. The supervisor who directed those canvassers was fired, but in the preceding days, she defended her actions, saying the directive was FEMA policy that came directly from Washington.

---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=ceedb2fff0204ef9832e26689a1b2a88&_e=L8LqI2iBF_55X6Hq-4KKiRdNy0Tl7_WMdKhr3bjzbZus5ZuNvYUNRQlw2eHulRlI3sSwp2ruQm-Ujm1fA3p9h-N4vMhmQV5CqMg5tN5DjGZDCiN1PEiwafZh-I60ZvsnF7fZ34JFIREMyDLSo43ec3UFDHBrQseCY_LYRtsUZJTRb_j-raxLfjr85_QCmwK6DPx-pHRWzc3scJuKXCcQvOh0c7PoswypIJuR_G_J7bdsCLfFY9VrSGF_jJNtEOEeRrF-J0TIDJKlXN0XPyI4RdPeM5I2CBD_mjmEMDeM0VrjvHYbYEZlVF2865WPr5p1iF1ent59yevTcg5z9tnHx1-RO0ODv_md0DTurX_5v9s%3D)
---
This is so wrong on so many levels, but it illustrates just how far the Left has gone to poison the well and demonize their political opponents. I will make you this promise—this kind of persecution will not stand, and I will not stop until we get the full truth behind this shocking scandal and get justice for those impacted!! Change is coming and justice will be served!
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let's finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Friends,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going. Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $30 or more right now between myself and Tim Kaine ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount?express_lane=true&amount=30]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount]
Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
Let’s finish this strong: Split $30 or more between Tim Kaine and me to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount]
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-casey-recount]

P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Action needed in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
**Derek, the race is not over in Pennsylvania.** This Senate race is still too close to call, and we need to act fast to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. Our team needs your help to keep this work going. **Please donate $20 or any amount you can to Bob Casey and the DNC at the link below to ensure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard:** [**https://democrats.org/go/Help-Win-PA**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bc-split-nov-2024?amount=20&refcode=em_20241113_2330_fr&refcode2=2330_22930333_Yjkry4&akid=2330%2E22930333%2EYjkry4) We’re relying on supporters like you to chip in the resources while votes are still being counted in Pennsylvania. name: Team Lateefah
subject: The real fight starts now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111324_Thankyou_TF [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111324_Thankyou_TF]
Friend,
We did it! Lateefah is headed to Congress — and it’s all because of your relentless dedication to this movement. As exciting as this victory is, we know the real fight has only just begun.
Since day one, Lateefah promised that once she was elected, she’d hit the ground running. True to her word, she’s already out there — attending town halls, speaking in Washington, and connecting with people to address the issues that matter most.
As she steps into Congress, she’s more than ready to fight for hard-working Americans and the countless people who are counting on real change. Especially now, with the House majority still undecided, we can’t afford to slow down or lose our momentum.
The challenges ahead are real, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. What we need now is your continued support as we push back against Trump and his allies. The next four years will not be easy, but Lateefah has never backed down from a fight, and neither will we.
Friend: we know this victory comes with mixed emotions. Like so many of you, we feel the weight of uncertainty and fear for our communities. But as we’ve always done, we’ll rise up, ready to continue our fight — for housing justice, comprehensive public safety, environmental protection, and so much more.
Lateefah is ready to get to work for you, for our communities, and for the vision we’re building together. Stick with us; together, we’ll keep pushing forward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111324_Thankyou_TF]
Thank you,
Team Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111324_Thankyou_TF [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111324_Thankyou_TF] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

subject: Sign Our Congrats Card Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ab4307fcb93d4180a3a4cfac79308799&_e=Hq-JW1oaNgmn4ttA9yyeOsNonSf-glq06VXiTZd9kxrhIe_YyhA2Yi0OqpvZYrkyoF6jKkJ1Jx7JadMk62ORoCrqywFTla7M1L_WMxlCX-tk9zBnfe5Wz-QIeczTDJ1w8Hu527ucnKM8WHFoPWKjNPCUg-CXGjuuZsLxAi_EOEcMHs467VmDgqHtBzJvSrmLoncsQdALVV0_77CCs4doxe4fbWD2TYSc1DApMqIWoLSaBJ0_4xQAz-r68MXw5Hiyc1GPn-pt8xMshvsP5--kmd-2nSLVxZwAGz7OIGXdgPxZKTJpDx1qO1zIc7GtL0lJqMtXP6z6dZM6YjJV0pQmh0pHu6qoIDVVwxBmzF80iNA%3D)

Patriot,

We hope this message finds you well and filled with the same pride and optimism that we're feeling for our country today! It's a new day in America, and together, we're going to Make America Great Again!

As proud patriots who believe in the principles that make America exceptional--freedom, hard work, and faith--we have a chance to come together and show our support for our new 47th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump! President Trump has achieved something truly remarkable, and now, we want you to join us in celebrating his long-awaited success in a personal way by signing a special congratulations card.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ab4307fcb93d4180a3a4cfac79308799&_e=Hq-JW1oaNgmn4ttA9yyeOsNonSf-glq06VXiTZd9kxrhIe_YyhA2Yi0OqpvZYrkyoF6jKkJ1Jx7JadMk62ORoCrqywFTla7M1L_WMxlCX-tk9zBnfe5Wz-QIeczTDJ1w8Hu527ucnKM8WHFoPWKjNFn2oYtvkgS_4YPiN7g0zSmKZB5KeiHAIqAmQLhcVMeWasMy-Ig17xfRs38MLSCx-QZmZsomleHNuXmBcnk5Nk7TjjWXB4eaFLbeukLTmA9cRPVne9MEuyaqWCHTyahEK5_TFrGZlwEnk52LgPRQ6ufHxv_oW1t30oJo45maXdyPedqpNlEOVlEfWNI4eYjKaA%3D%3D)
| [**SIGN HIS CARD >>>**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ab4307fcb93d4180a3a4cfac79308799&_e=Hq-JW1oaNgmn4ttA9yyeOsNonSf-glq06VXiTZd9kxrhIe_YyhA2Yi0OqpvZYrkyoF6jKkJ1Jx7JadMk62ORoCrqywFTla7M1L_WMxlCX-tk9zBnfe5Wz-QIeczTDJ1w8Hu527ucnKM8WHFoPWKjNPCUg-CXGjuuZsLxAi_EOEcMHs467VmDgqHtBzJvSrmL7kS2OUdtxNCn5WrAeAbQxOESkZQ0PwTLUo1ZUYz2K0P9NOUEXA-R3mrZFjl2HAAVkFZfSc9hJgnzm7nt1vaRQ0MRoZGJTDT3h-PRPQmVLaqeYMP132vy9f4ZsRi0z6OrH06NKaoBtV3kiuIMXOOP2Mz2W_jfe8dgHtzeUkZyGBk%3D)
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME >>>**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ab4307fcb93d4180a3a4cfac79308799&_e=Hq-JW1oaNgmn4ttA9yyeOsNonSf-glq06VXiTZd9kxrhIe_YyhA2Yi0OqpvZYrkyoF6jKkJ1Jx7JadMk62ORoCrqywFTla7M1L_WMxlCX-tk9zBnfe5Wz-QIeczTDJ1w8Hu527ucnKM8WHFoPWKjNPCUg-CXGjuuZsLxAi_EOEcMHs467VmDgqHtBzJvSrmLfq2YDtZD8ehwET5WgJwqF4WFSARIJAAh2gjqdC89gKwantfqWQZtEgZsoJ7KwZyXPdGeVvdC3qzfJOD4AmKkj0vqcFoeKMMjDjh7Yefp5InuJhUTdNLWZxgu8AjYVfQ9yjlKaAcijLUG_X3_r-1PQjqFyZlUJFrbgv8FTAny9uI%3D)
---

This isn't just a simple gesture; it's a statement of our shared values. It's about showing our appreciation for those who stand strong for the causes we hold dear--those who fight for limited government, individual liberty, and the preservation of the American Dream. your signature is a reflection of your commitment to those principles and your pride in our great nation!

We've seen firsthand how challenging these times can be, but moments like these remind us why we must continue to stand together. By signing this card, you're letting President Trump know that you're with him, support our MAGA movement and are helping push forward the mission that will preserve the greatness of this nation for future generations.

As conservatives, we understand the power of grassroots support, and that's exactly what this is. It's a chance for you to add your voice to a wave of support that will remind our America-First leaders--and our country--that we're not backing down.

**[Take a moment to sign our personal congratulations card today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ab4307fcb93d4180a3a4cfac79308799&_e=Hq-JW1oaNgmn4ttA9yyeOsNonSf-glq06VXiTZd9kxrhIe_YyhA2Yi0OqpvZYrkyoF6jKkJ1Jx7JadMk62ORoCrqywFTla7M1L_WMxlCX-tk9zBnfe5Wz-QIeczTDJ1w8Hu527ucnKM8WHFoPWKjNPCUg-CXGjuuZsLxAi_EOEcMHs467VmDgqHtBzJvSrmLKDAbS2Nnd644ECTOGze9378F3YAxwP4Gy5bSjP_PNmW8135U5dErNIIZTQPjID56PdM-rBgEoUu9S4id0xLo76NMZGzWjS41Z9YTX1gnpXRhy4WbqT99Dnr0xVFcw2snCO25085skwGFvYdPOL-2A5Q6l4eXQ5WnIXZdp3k0OEw%3D)**

**God bless you, and God bless America.**

_Warmly,
The Harrigan Family_

name: Derek Tran
subject: House Majority will come down to CA-45
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97047693/512097269/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.11.13_Tran_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZkZjdhOC0wM2EyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=994UBRr7SiOSjcP1B1g85Qg2hiz_ieRtCYkRxRpeNKg=&emci=0118fa9e-dfa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=ac6df7a8-03a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=23483442) | Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. **We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. _The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district._ And, Peter, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense. [_**The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and Emily Randall to help us count every vote? clean_body: The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district. | Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district. And, Peter, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense. = = Thank you for standing by me, Derek = = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. We have some exciting news: Our endorsed Kids First Candidate, Rep. Kim Schrier (WA-08), has officially won re-election!

Rep. Schrier’s victory is another crucial win for kids and families, as she rejoins the slate of Kids First champions in Congress who are committed to putting the well-being of our children front and center.

The road ahead may be challenging, but with your support, we're determined to keep moving forward and fighting for our kids and families. **[Can you pitch in $5 today to help make sure all of our Kids First leaders are ready to hit the ground running on day one?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsRG117EnKkqnjHrrqPXlmZB6OhSLiDjA3acSVpsvrwDBWBNF12qr2wqBj9tyOUjv9xW7HsHo5EP-ZUAc3dXYqLt0KLqASHz-kjZiTlhLnWRPnkkdR1Uf6px1uk02NeXmOthg3LHfm4Rfn5aWLc0CP4LRglMrYeiqwU8y9KPvAI_3Z8imbST4MycVMslsNv9_pP5NVI9PdMXXBk0Fi07Wg8qUWPZd9CKp4yx73JXNtE6vnb5sOLGuCH84Tu7Wn872WCuYCRrIuzzi5eB4-ddYKe1wrb0M8PlSBTpQbvarRjJJn1dEqBIuXQ6aT2ywTEMTWp1cIbgAaVizyo-ydv_JBf/4bf/T8qQ3Jj9Tv6JN7Q_cV7b1Q/h1/h001.mmSMMBzGSBMf9_Jk89fkdxp8rrK69Rj_dNO7bWd1pqE)** | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsRG117EnKkqnjHrrqPXlmZB6OhSLiDjA3acSVpsvrwDBWBNF12qr2wqBj9tyOUjv9xW7HsHo5EP-ZUAc3dXYqLt0KLqASHz-kjZiTlhLnWRPnkkdR1Uf6px1uk02NeXmOKIYaaiC_nLE_fL-zGM5jxAIPLz77AgvoDcB4TQB77L4cP-vYTZAie5dsGCjhfx3R9AHtE2p6eu2Jr_YbsV0CfK21nOQReUa0GiRV-SVhnutIWytaanVEr_zdnTlhS0YxYQwDhd09oTGRoM9jxM4kfzJPDBGIelGdtHPpjr_fAsrbvzZWMmvOz9MbppKQv2-8e0_W-qX-7emcfhu-8oERG/4bf/T8qQ3Jj9Tv6JN7Q_cV7b1Q/h2/h001.1BEsaM6CFQsqKMvW8sXozkj2kh2wm7gVEUJaOdWizw4)

The truth is that Rep. Schrier’s voice — and the voices of all our Kids First candidates — will be all the more important as we head into this next congressional session and the next four years.

As a pediatrician, she knows how important it is that we advocate for common sense gun legislation, climate action, and education investments to protect and support our kids.

We’re going to have to work harder than ever to strive towards a bold agenda that prioritizes our kids’ future. From ensuring access to quality education and healthcare to protecting families from economic hardship, **our fight is just beginning.**

That’s why every dollar you contribute is crucial to building the momentum we need to pass policies that put kids and families first.

Thanks, Dave McCormick Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

The fight continues — we won’t back down to protect care workers and families
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97048005/512098451/664783965?ms=111324_electedcarechampions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTRkMGU5ZS0wNWEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MrxfXUHMQKrS7FuUYKUiRDnUXW9PUoxMyjYinSu1u8=&emci=a34e9972-fca1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=514d0e9e-05a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)
Dear Care in Action community,
While the presidential results were not what we hoped for, we wanted to congratulate the Care Champions elected to office last week, and highlight some good news about their wins across the country.
These candidates won by standing with and speaking up for care workers and families, and we’re ready to fight alongside them. These wins wouldn’t have been possible without the support of folks like you in our Care in Action community.
In a major victory, Democratic Attorney General **Josh Stein** was elected to be the next Governor of North Carolina. He’s highlighted affordable childcare and protecting public education as key issues he’s ready to tackle once in office.
In Arizona, **Senator-elect Ruben Gallego** was elected as the state’s first Latino Senator, showing just how important his strong support for affordable childcare is to Arizonans.
After knocking on thousands of doors across Nevada, care workers won big by reelecting **Senator Jacky Rosen,** who has worked tirelessly to raise wages for care workers and lower costs for families.
**Check out all of our endorsed Care Champions who won last week:**

Peter, it goes without saying: we didn’t get the results we were all hoping for last week. **But regardless of the outcome, we still made HISTORIC strides:** ✅ Democratic voter turnout increased by 2.4%.
✅ Kamala Harris earned more votes than any Democratic candidate in Georgia's history, earning 70,000 new votes from 2020.
✅ All of our incumbent Democratic State Senators won re-election.
✅ Democrats flipped two seats in the House, narrowing the Republican majority. name: Conroy4Congress
subject: C4C Newsletter | One Week On
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conroy for Congress]()
body:
So much gratitude | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/conroy4congress/one-week-left-922?e=a7b299e420)
---
[](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=b544ddf4cb&e=a7b299e420)
| | | | |
#
---
|
Thank you for joining our mailing list, our campaign, and our grassroots movement to elect Conroy for Congress. We are deeply grateful for and honored by the support of so many union members, veterans, active military, families, retirees, former national security professionals, and others who donated, volunteered, and/or cast their ballots for a brighter future for Eastern Washington.
While the results of the 2024 race did not go as hoped, it was remarkable how much our representative-elect stressed his intent to work in a bipartisan manner. His campaign promises included putting the interests of the people of Eastern Washington over party: opposing tariffs that would raise inflation and draw retaliatory measures against farmers; working to pass a quality Farm Bill; protecting Social Security; supporting Veterans; and refusing to use federal powers to restrict reproductive rights.
As a Spokane-based daily newspaper reported, prior to the primary his own party assessed him as “polished but not genuine. The same paper reported in early November 2024 that he said he would be a “team player” for the Republican Party.
We will be watching, and we are looking forward to 2026. If you have a Conroy for Congress yard sign, please hold onto it—we anticipate asking for your support in the future. If you have a 4’X4’ sign that’s too big for you to store, please email [info@conroyforcongress.com](mailto:info@conroy4congress.com?subject=Please%20collect%20a%204'X4'%20yard%20sign&body=Please%20contact%20me%20to%20coordinate%20collecting%20a%204'X4'%20yard%20sign.%20) for collection.
Thank you to everyone who knocked on doors, wrote postcards, hosted house parties, donated to our campaign, had conversations with family and neighbors, and cast your vote for progress.Sincerely,
---
[Donate Now](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=c2a9042ae4&e=a7b299e420)

name: Carville, James
subject: Bob Casey needs your help right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend, Bob Casey needs your help in Pennsylvania RIGHT NOW.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_4_casey_recount?refcode=jtk2528-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

This race is still too close to call , and we need to act fast to make sure that Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. Bob’s team needs urgent resources to keep this work going.

I’m not $#!ting you when I say this is the most important race in the country now. We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat. Bob Casey MUST be re-elected to stand up to Republicans and Donald Trump in the Senate.

That’s why it has NEVER been more important than now for you to split $5 or more between Bob Casey and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. Your donation will immediately go to work to make sure Bob’s team has the resources they need to run through the finish line.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_4_casey_recount?refcode=jtk2528-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

Thank you,
James Carville

name: Mitch Kates, Executive Director, PA Dems
subject: we’re running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

**There are still thousands of ballots left to be counted in Pennsylvania, and Bob Casey and Dave McCormick are neck and neck.**

**We can’t give up. We need to make sure every single voter’s voice is heard.**

Our democracy depends on this seat, on us putting one more voice of reason in the Senate instead of another MAGA fanboy. _And we’re running out of time._
