name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Democrats need to challenge a rigged system and fight for working people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The true “swing” voter for Democrats is not someone who usually votes for Republicans.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241113-4512-footer&t=1&akid=4512%2E420207%2EXGojzu)
Peter, did you see this from the _New York Times?_
[__](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241113?refcode=em20241113-4512&amount=3&refcode2=4512_420207_XGojzu&akid=4512%2E420207%2EXGojzu)
It’s simple: Too many Democrats didn’t state clearly enough how we would make a meaningful difference in people’s lives, and people chose to sit out the election as a result.
Going forward, we need to recognize that the true “swing” voter for Democrats is _not_ someone who usually votes for Republicans.
**It’s working class voters who need to see that we are fighting for them and challenging a rigged system that works only for the wealthiest corporations.**
If they don’t believe that, they will “swing” to the sidelines — and we’ll keep losing to people like Donald Trump.
That’s why I believe so strongly that we need to keep pushing for policies like Medicare for All, paid family and medical leave, raising the minimum wage, increasing union membership, and more. Because those kinds of policies will actually make a real, meaningful difference in people’s lives.
But I don’t take corporate PAC money, Peter — I was one of the first members of Congress to refuse it. And that means I’m counting on your grassroots support to sustain this movement.
[**Peter, if you’re with me in this fight for real progressive change, please pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help us grow our people-powered movement. We need your help now more than ever.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241113?refcode=em20241113-4512&amount=3&refcode2=4512_420207_XGojzu&akid=4512%2E420207%2EXGojzu)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241113?amount=3&refcode=em20241113-4512&refcode2=4512_420207_XGojzu&akid=4512%2E420207%2EXGojzu)**
In solidarity
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241113-4512-footer&t=2&refcode2=4512_420207_XGojzu&akid=4512%2E420207%2EXGojzu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

It’s working class voters who need to see that we are fighting for them and challenging a rigged system that works only for the wealthiest corporations. If they don’t believe that, they will “swing” to the sidelines — and we’ll keep losing to people like Donald Trump. That’s why I believe so strongly that we need to keep pushing for policies like Medicare for All, paid family and medical leave, raising the minimum wage, increasing union membership, and more. Because those kinds of policies will actually make a real, meaningful difference in people’s lives. But I don’t take corporate PAC money, Peter — I was one of the first members of Congress to refuse it. And that means I’m counting on your grassroots support to sustain this movement. In solidarity Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: Do you want pharmacies to distribute the abortion pill?
body:
Imagine walking into your local pharmacy...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. #
Friend of Life,

Imagine walking into your local pharmacy, the same place where you purchase groceries for your family, while pills that end innocent lives are dispensed just a few feet away from you--medications specifically designed to end the lives of preborn babies.

Today, major chains like Costco, Walmart, Albertsons, Kroger, and McKesson are under pressure from government officials such as NYC Comptroller Brad Lander to start dispensing these fatal drugs. This demand is being made in the name of "long-term shareholder value," despite the devastating human cost.

Over 600,000 preborn babies were killed by abortion pills last year alone. This heart-breaking number is expected to rise unless pro-life individuals take a stand.

We cannot allow these life-ending drugs to be available at our most frequented stores. Corporations must understand that becoming involved in the abortion industry means complicity in the ongoing genocide of future generations.

Pharmacies like Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid, which have already agreed to dispense the abortion pill, have faced backlash from customers who desire a pharmacy that promotes true health and wellness.

We need your support to urge these major chains to resist the pressure. By signing our petition, you can make your voice heard. Let's ensure our local grocery stores and pharmacies remain places where life is embraced, not ended.

Sign the petition and urge major pharmacies to resist the pressure to distribute the abortion pill:
**[https://www.liveaction.org/resist-pressure-to-dispense-the-abortion-pill/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=8ba012d479dc4ffeb4d9f25f1a778188&_e=sYgSMzVaeAXERrb_dDu2ddxx1rE0XF2uvdKFb3C4Z5X7GsetHclYNPGRHkhR702fTP-_B58bFOcDxUV_w_r49E8SEfTSAhe0Da64spqvsGSDfiyU0pYjMp8uqy8fUo0lDoHtw_PQHIXezeQnollKTAEGe1NmLt_YZCFDkGhJrCn7WiIbTjQrFzsKb2J33dmRCppvdKmGDTZ6_tjO5Bf_a_SRzthG9dgxp9YiFeNcMeGoKlqF7o4Lrk1V6FO1svFW61sCMtUJN90m8PwrXTJxxXdoDPu_pRR1bd3MXvwIcQ75jy4IcBS1fui7EHBmFuxAElydoINH6uuL3bM7mlu4CG6caVoCoEHg11cGDKGwlqRnYdXcIDQDwJcCzRBZ0OEYCo1gZzhuAYeYcBapxdNoNg%3D%3D)**

For Life,

Josef Lipp
**Chief Operating Officer**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=8ba012d479dc4ffeb4d9f25f1a778188&_e=sYgSMzVaeAXERrb_dDu2ddxx1rE0XF2uvdKFb3C4Z5X7GsetHclYNPGRHkhR702fTP-_B58bFOcDxUV_w_r49E8SEfTSAhe0Da64spqvsGSDfiyU0pYjMp8uqy8fUo0lDoHtw_PQHIXezeQnollKTAEGe1NmLt_YZCFDkGhJrCn7WiIbTjQrFzsKb2J33dmRCppvdKmGDTZ6_tjO5Bf_a_SRzthG9dgxp9YiFeNcMeHcd-rWqwrrwgqjiyl6yJ_jjt2gGXx8-Gcjk46PNZH7b-gsKz1oiXmBsrd6GavOuhPLxSCskG9K9DNVkLfnhxLyN3kICKbJarQxi5QPmrNklcN5JMordovg6cJ4tlN0XH3uLQtiTNH9vX2aA6URBdTask5yuy3VupCTOjPECpt0jw%3D%3D)

name: Keith Ellison
subject: What happens next
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

In the past week, I’ve heard from many people who are worried about this upcoming Trump administration, including immigrants who want to live freely and without fear, workers concerned about their wages and wellbeing, and people seeking reproductive freedom.

I can’t tell you what’s going to happen next. But one thing’s for sure: We’re going to resist any attempt to interfere with Minnesotans’ rights.

As Attorney General and the People’s Lawyer, I promise to stand up for Minnesotans and keep fighting for liberty and justice for all. If our office needs to take on Trump and his administration to preserve your rights, then that’s what we’ll do.

Our grassroots movement is going to be needed more than ever in the difficult days ahead. While the circumstances under which we’re organizing have changed, we’re still part of a powerful collective united by shared values and goals.

I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support our campaign. Please know that your work and contributions are valuable, even if the overall results aren’t what we hoped for. You helped us reach out to people that most campaigns overlook, build long-term relationships, and grow this people-powered movement.

Please take the time you need to grieve, rest, and reflect, but don’t let anyone convince you that the work we’re doing together doesn’t have an impact. It’s an honor to fight alongside all of you.

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241113ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: One-click Survey: Permanent Mail-in Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111324_1&amount=25]
Bolts: Connecticut Ballot Measure Could Make Voting More Inclusive [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_CTMailInBallotInitiative.png]
Folks -- Connecticut recently passed a ballot initiative to expand the use of mail-in voting to all citizens with no excuse, every year. This follows other states, like Maryland, which allow voters to permanently opt-in to receive and submit their ballot by mail.
Mail voting -- in use in the United States since the Civil War -- has repeatedly been proven to be a safe, secure, and reliable voting method used by voters of all political parties.
As we move towards the next set of state legislative sessions, we need to know what issues you favor the most. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Are you in favor of having the option to vote by mail permanently?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111324_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111324_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111324_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111324_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111324_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111324_1&amount=25]

name: Justice Democrats
subject: 30 days later
disclaimer_text:
paid for
by our tax dollars
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last month before the election, President Biden issued a letter warning
Israel that if they continued blocking desperately needed humanitarian aid
from getting to millions of starving and injured Palestinians in Gaza, the
U.S. would consider withdrawing military assistance.

Well, 30 days have come and gone, and human rights organizations report
that the situation in Gaza has only gotten worse. Instead of allowing a
minimum of 350 aid trucks into Gaza per day as demanded in the letter, the
Israeli government is only letting in 33 trucks per day — nowhere near
enough to stop the mass starvation of Palestinians.

When questioned about this by the press yesterday, Biden officials made
excuses and said the U.S. would continue to arm Israel despite failing to
comply with State Department demands. No consequences and no
accountability.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241113-stop-arming-israel/?source=em20241113-36146-2&akid=36146%2E1203867%2Eeju-ES ]Tweet from Rep. Summer Lee: Israel is blocking aid into Gaza and
starving Palestinians while continuing to receive US-made weapons paid for

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Last month before the election, President Biden issued a letter warning Israel that if they continued blocking desperately needed humanitarian aid from getting to millions of starving and injured Palestinians in Gaza, the U.S. would consider withdrawing military assistance. Well, 30 days have come and gone, and human rights organizations report that the situation in Gaza has only gotten worse. Instead of allowing a minimum of 350 aid trucks into Gaza per day as demanded in the letter, the Israeli government is only letting in 33 trucks per day — nowhere near enough to stop the mass starvation of Palestinians. When questioned about this by the press yesterday, Biden officials made excuses and said the U.S. would continue to arm Israel despite failing to comply with State Department demands. No consequences and no accountability. [ ]Tweet from Rep. Summer Lee: Israel is blocking aid into Gaza and starving Palestinians while continuing to receive US-made weapons paid for by our tax dollars. The White House is failing to do what US law requires, and what the majority of Americans want: Stop sending weapons to Israel. [ ]As Justice Democrats Rep. Summer Lee said, it’s time for the Biden administration to listen to the American people, follow U.S. and international law, and stop using our tax dollars to send arms to Israel. If you agree, add your name to our petition now → [ ]Add Your Name There are no more excuses. As long as President Biden is in the White House, we must continue to keep up the pressure and demand he stop enabling this genocide. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Will Rollins
subject: Update: CA-41 is too early to call >>>>
body:
Peter: it’s tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=5]

subject: Let’s finish strong

body:
I’m counting on you.
| | |
---
Peter,

We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.

I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.

That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. body:
There’s only one thing we can do to keep Trump in check...
| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

**_But there’s still _one thing_ we can do to keep Trump in check:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0) **[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0)** | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0)
---
Folks, we _cannot_ safeguard our Democracy if Trump is NEVER held accountable — but thanks to his MAGA Supreme Court picks, he’s practically a KING!

**We can still stop Trump from causing irreparable damage over the next 4 years,_but we must act FAST:_**

**[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED FOR TOP DEMOCRATS: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241113_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0)**

Thank you,

Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18034%2E878179%2EZhndz0).**

I have a major announcement to share with you | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxhVubElcn_wVkle73FXspOTOexQt1jWeyZHZviYqvg4Y_Afi0TqGzCW-yf_wY6AhO4E8ObRSDtGp2SjAgfpn_RCjRrNAskPC_GsKAwsLlEwDPnW7EQCE2aOZUDpoYOnGIlb85nWoVyt3Trj3lhAHNk-84niLBvS1iZYicCQBYUv1Y%3D)

Fellow Republican, We’ve done it. We’ve put one of the greatest Presidents in American history back in charge. We re-took the Senate, and NOW we have OFFICIALLY retained the House majority! **_[But this isn’t the end of the fight, it’s just the beginning. Our House majority will be RAZOR THIN once again.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxhvpHZoh42YONGJyFy_1iNSwmkTiAbwjgXTwdXbs34qJp6vZouT3iS4KWm5-cyuKvq_A8RZ_zAyoZPl_dqaq8t5I-cr1BAgiBM618kn4EN-OvIYBzc89ZX6ZMZesxSE7VkIoSiqUGvxCpK36FIP1BqaCiLdUfenaaAuFn7ynYJH9A%3D) _** That means if anything unexpected happens and a Special Election is called – we MUST be prepared! Needless to say, we cannot take any risks with our Republican House majority. So I am announcing TODAY that we are gathering the resources to DOMINATE the Democrats in any Special Elections that may come up and to start building our war chest to take down the Democrats once again in 2026. **_[**_Will you send in a donation of ANY amount today to ensure that we have the resources on hand to defeat the Democrats in any unexpected Special Elections that come up over the next year?_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxhVKFT67Ibq2g-yjqR44R4TzxoIRrgJ2zFlB5wt4episSZ9bTk1mUe5Bq3bGq0akVajzso2DZ5N5dQ1DOq_Gh-mPyejOXcL4d3lMZ3CNy2ovOyaRLwRoQjqCAEMWp6eH6xwD9deBg1SOloNfSn_fZ8yMQsFmYBN2ezAZcjQ_AdE-c%3D)_**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW!**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxh85NqxGvlhHd7NFLwT8GgEE2n4MUOIN7qTMsgew6m7A7vnnTDcghmxAbqB5Ep9o3M3OatvgSWVZGyfSzMwJZhb4BCjr4q60X9aiPs3EfIkL5HHbBIoECF2F0XV6D5eWjFK1xcCV3fScPb-dTpFBWf0Eaf2Slfgol8srwx31ebNE8%3D)

**_[Truthfully, Fellow Republican, you can say GOODBYE to all the things we have set out to do together if we’re not prepared to battle the Democrat’s fundraising machine. We know that the radical left will dig in their heels and pull every stunt in the book to stop us from making the changes we need.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxhWQnuDPkZLYNaX56QBbuyzMnFuStK_zGVWwviQqryN3ydknQ1B52fNrfrJK_WfA0d5EhlEsZjq4H0CpYlmr4A-cKRbHb6s5YQ5WFJfWtNTteNVibJtfPPHKrYoB2xNSGt2MikoN8cFah6U0-E7_pQyUGB6EWNCcFuMxCcpzwfodk%3D)_** **_Do you want to secure the border and KEEP IT SECURE? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to DRAIN THE SWAMP and demolish the deep state? We need the House majority._** **_Do you want to pass tax cuts, cut waste from the budget, make America energy DOMINANT, and restore peace through strength? We need the House majority to do that. _** It goes without saying... I am extremely grateful for you and everything that you’ve done for my team and our wonderful country. And if you can’t afford to give today, I understand. We are still mounting our great economic comeback. Together, WE WON! **_[**_But together, we must continue to fight._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d62b38715c034e2a9475875be080238f&_e=IyaGZe6DqVvx-_GryR6YDR4BXIfjztIyf2g-bvzTXPoNUNHbA7i6iscFIxA_wUxYsSaPiRKP9prZwvYRTSnJom68-se6t-OwnhcabPc0QcUJoygnWfZzp32gc6VPOcPh6cLl798oYGjrxHjreIsJj6d6a97av3IZ7ytQkIoG7Toiq7vD05LB4kZ16GRyCOzJpbJoAZyA2qfNFnfa37X_L3eKnhUosg19u0FEUbz5cwBS_BvcPwFJ4LoTfOijJayLZJiw90iN6-hM5yNCh34dFMNsWhjszptQY_LbTRH35bs64ZN0uior7cMQ6Fnu7qxhpWBvJk8x8E0ZZbZzG3L0Ar1vs3Wu8nDjzOftTvdp3gkcJg7OaNAT6Ex1TSEvl-I7WID6Xkx6VTsVj-XclglqvprmF8ixOTedUMKg-IocSiI8y0A_lwnvnUVf5gL2-12iO-KeaU8vF1i3-j5Jk2ysiRzSBoich9ac0H1tNQQGT18%3D)_** Sincerely,
Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
You won’t believe what Elon Musk had to say about the PA Senate race!
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7b9a26808dc545338bb4eea41007958b&_e=s_EOVnV608KQ1oIfgR8f545RJfdc_WhT4wJTV6QO44Y2pJXDXO3zpruhQ3ytDycTSyMK6xx6m2Dx_bq7ejO9oKsE9ssjz3_yzBa-9BawIfiqzVRwKzEtLaJwqXNlk0SQy5RB4bI9Q0R4j5HdWHxqK2eupI1mFVyWgtsIcbmKFBT50QFGmMqV4wXRff8mBe6R0_mX1d44Uv3dzlKcwTXIeN7Fgo2qUi-FKW5MjNGDMzpGuUIuKSavinfqcfW9zmz_kbtM2oBlsL7FwBmiFWzWnPuX-Pqk6B725pFqmXHhbTifsDJSt4wPMn7Cscwj6Vr-jWLyA0sag78aI8BewxA0nHxeBb4UCSCqePfb3zl2trXms39O-E2-5Pwog42nR8x3Is6Ceear1JdNFRDJ_IWr3Z-hYlcYLwlG5og3GQaO1n4%3D)
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7b9a26808dc545338bb4eea41007958b&_e=s_EOVnV608KQ1oIfgR8f545RJfdc_WhT4wJTV6QO44Y2pJXDXO3zpruhQ3ytDycTSyMK6xx6m2Dx_bq7ejO9oKsE9ssjz3_yzBa-9BawIfiqzVRwKzEtLaJwqXNlk0SQy5RB4bI9Q0R4j5HdWHxqK2eupI1mFVyWgtsIcbmKFBT50QFGmMqV4wXRff8mBe6R0_mX1d44Uv3dzlKcwTXIeN7Fgo2qUi-FKW5MjNGDMzpGuUIuKSavinfqcfW9zmz_kbtM2oBlsL7FwBmiFWzWnCY0AI5n0sqjos1ByaXucmLhIhxUG78B9dGEmyOtZraoeZF4LKbCROLx8VkjWHJEL0zV5jbNlanVDek0dNrzi1PM1IHC53Xx5GSUvuHXJ7VpOpmhP2iAyDeR_YIiuG2iOIFjiv48k-tJli_Dej824zU%3D)

Peter,

**FIRST** , Democrats LOST the U.S. Senate seat in PA.

**THEN** , shady Democrat lawyer Marc Elias, the lawyer behind the Steele Dossier, descended on PA declaring the race was not over. His goal was to do whatever possible to overturn the results of the election and steal this seat for the Democrats.

**NOW** , the sore loser Democrats are trying to count UNREGISTERED VOTERS for Bob Casey to steal this election from Senator-elect Dave McCormick!

_Day in and day out, the Left has done everything they can to stop Dave from winning this Senate seat. And their dirty tricks haven 't stopped, they're getting WORSE!_

subject: Corporate America is sponsoring abortions
body:
Today Live Action is the online, educational leader of the pro-life movement.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=fea29979d1a345e2a99ed33ed2ff78c7&_t=u_qkvlgzWvRn2ma9M7wFjz5If7vv5MYztWRscXORGHyxaX6djZCvk9eVmSLDyOwm0WB2ZusFwwIY-Eo_y5kzg0E3wmb-6tBIZBQCFQZWDdrQpT-Znnc7jrwdgvbC8ncS)_

[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=fea29979d1a345e2a99ed33ed2ff78c7&_e=uB2b9f-PVA4pUZ3A7ukjwHP7kaZ-mu-obLn6NSLRxbKt0GpkCxmWOdvqqE9mcDb0dvrqrNWLsNjDdMnQ3y-pC41Bae7pTlzclHHsNVEXgleJUGVIs0d1Fj9-WlERlkw4fRl3TiTvKf66YzJpbl4frwhj0I9SGp7FOrZ_2wxZhIfo4XQkrdkzb336NQWwWLUoyRWb673WYyFcdyz9asdD7UTAdBttDm9oo8yKER_WbuVpfc2UuL_cIxdAaqg3Cj70Ewtbbzk1tw2SHtu3wAbJ26xJ8lctrlsm_YASQ-n0nPPeMyB9C19GXCnhHeY7Qy9c4aVoQ1MrlukTKyed22DqTcDIKT950j-0sNOT25W0OAE%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

My name is Lila Rose. I'm the founder and president of Live Action.

Today Live Action is the online, educational leader of the pro-life movement. We reach millions of Americans each month--changing minds and hearts and saving lives.

I wanted to alert you about a growing threat to preborn babies, one that is contributing to the growth in abortion numbers this year.

That's right. Even though _Roe v. Wade_ is gone, abortion rates are _growing_ instead of decreasing. Reports say that a preborn child in the United States now loses its life every 31 seconds.

And, corporate America has decided to jump on board and expand the killing.

**You see, at least 114 big corporations are paying --often pressuring--their female employees to fly to pro-abortion "sanctuary" states like California to kill their preborn children.**

Corporations like Amazon, Nike, Uber, Target, Disney, Starbucks, Sony, eBay, CVS, Apple, Bank of America, and 103 others are offering women $4,000, $5,000, $10,000, or unlimited "travel" and "lodging" to go abort their children.

It's beyond sickening.

Killing a baby is cheaper for businesses than maternity leave. Bosses can get the mother back to work faster. This is calculated evil, sugarcoated as "affirming" and "healthcare."

Corporate America should _help mothers_ embrace the lives of their children, not pressure them to have them killed!

**[Will you give $50 right now to help save at least one baby from this corporate greed?](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=fea29979d1a345e2a99ed33ed2ff78c7&_e=uB2b9f-PVA4pUZ3A7ukjwHP7kaZ-mu-obLn6NSLRxbKt0GpkCxmWOdvqqE9mcDb0dvrqrNWLsNjDdMnQ3y-pC41Bae7pTlzclHHsNVEXgleJUGVIs0d1Fj9-WlERlkw4fRl3TiTvKf66YzJpbl4frwhj0I9SGp7FOrZ_2wxZhIfo4XQkrdkzb336NQWwWLUoyRWb673WYyFcdyz9asdD7bDI5mvo13Uz7ent8VdSqdYPOmuWDlTzW4oSH7ycuanJIyjaqHp_gE6edObm0yNz3-1HP36ontjBIzWmtgzp__88vKzUUw8RG049gOEyPV9wCSCkfghJTgMiJCZJh17GDBQmYShtLYaxfXNqE7qrZ_4%3D)** You will also spare parents a lifetime of loss and regret.

Your gift will reach parents moments away from an abortion decision with the truth they need to embrace life.

We discovered that spreading TRUTH in compelling and persuasive online videos is the single best tool to reach and compel millions of Americans, especially abortion-minded parents, and prevent abortions. Our videos include:
* Eye-opening facts about the humanity of a baby in the womb
* Raw, horrific truths about the abortion procedures
* Shocking details about the ugly, corrupt abortion industry

These high-quality videos change minds and hearts. 43% of those who follow Live Action say our content changed their position from pro-abortion to pro-life!

Your donation will also reach parents with _Window to the Womb_ , a state-of-the-art, Hollywood-quality, 3-D animated video showing the development of "Baby Olivia" from fertilization to birth.

**Some pregnancy resource centers share that 75% of abortion-minded women who view ultrasounds reject abortion.** One single mother sent us this note after viewing _Window to the Womb_ depicting "Baby Olivia":

"_I can barely pay the bills on time. . . . I was considering abortion for my 5th child, but after watching, I came back into the light and realized it would be so wrong to deprive a child of this wonderful thing we call life. Her name will be Olivia, too._"

We even developed an app to put the lifesaving truth of Window to the Womb at the fingertips of abortion-minded people on their cell phones.

But as long as corporate America keeps pouring millions of dollars of funding into abortion, we face an uphill battle. **That 's why we are looking for 79 courageous pro-life people in your state who are willing to give as little as $50 before midnight so that we can reach more parents with these videos before it's too late for their children.**

Here's the secure link to rush your gift: **[https://give.liveaction.org/corporate-greed/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=fea29979d1a345e2a99ed33ed2ff78c7&_e=uB2b9f-PVA4pUZ3A7ukjwHP7kaZ-mu-obLn6NSLRxbKt0GpkCxmWOdvqqE9mcDb0dvrqrNWLsNjDdMnQ3y-pC41Bae7pTlzclHHsNVEXgleJUGVIs0d1Fj9-WlERlkw4fRl3TiTvKf66YzJpbl4frwhj0I9SGp7FOrZ_2wxZhIfo4XQkrdkzb336NQWwWLUoyRWb673WYyFcdyz9asdD7aC8yInG2mxxYbTqnKVfIFE-JUQM1bLmyXYnIo5GXOXnkgJPtSaD7MYtdjg-GmgN-uFC73OYLzSEwaG-4X8f5gF9Rl_QEKZAX3wZ3yxCodnjFp9s90qwVTuhNRmAgP12EOJL0j6ErU0I-ZovZNLnQYo%3D)**

Through our careful tracking, we know that $50 is enough to reach and change the minds of 1000 people, so your gift will likely save more than one child from violent death.

Meta (Facebook), Amazon, Apple, Microsoft, Disney, Target, and more than 100 other companies are determined to pay to kill babies that don't fit into their corporate plans.

But you can intervene in time to save a life. Please join us today.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=fea29979d1a345e2a99ed33ed2ff78c7&_e=uB2b9f-PVA4pUZ3A7ukjwHP7kaZ-mu-obLn6NSLRxbKt0GpkCxmWOdvqqE9mcDb0dvrqrNWLsNjDdMnQ3y-pC41Bae7pTlzclHHsNVEXgleJUGVIs0d1Fj9-WlERlkw4fRl3TiTvKf66YzJpbl4frwhj0I9SGp7FOrZ_2wxZhIfo4XQkrdkzb336NQWwWLUoyRWb673WYyFcdyz9asdD7Yx6K-NPTp2sSKKQu3vNdg9LlhUoQGVDaP_G4v2_gm6Heh34Q8GnVndvSKmbythyidGGY1HfVhLIyAqjJ6M9JWkkZdIg_b3ZjEeyjmw-Qg8kf1jfL9Y2bf_1EG2NZxPc7RAS0Z0OLN-LmezUAmmBR6w%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJybBxLlKjQfwJgXt1nM6SapiiiA9v51JTAhbT0_2Zi88qARb1796FCJxnoU07eVwSJ-OLEPbRF1m6-0nzcgY7VfTIdGep8TJ1bR6ZwNhPCeszvpdHNIwZk6bNNLlZp4avP0oPU_SV7CzsCwMO-uE3GtT88MvcaNh1AARFHcX3Eg-7Q%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJyZNtIVowVC4tGsejlifOwlC1hoTx6NatM3hfXyVydWswFHRrJ5nqfpHoVOjU7GiwFLxl2k9DVjsbqdvpyoS12bZ3Sei8PxSYSuuYOJVFN5lQlW61XHNoCdsxKLn4RHHbUgqIlTtXEaaSN6EKw64q2xVhAo4PSLH5ugAXRxnlZERXg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJyabOdAz_3QGZ5lSCV4oFxRWqBQwcif_oqmQ5_5OoYYjt9e6FIFz3Vc1wdfZgD_LQUYEsDwH3JURSP5cwWUTEGqEtFyqBNbPxakOAgXemKTf_svCBCPoqLJvnTFllXpV8Gsdiq5TFHRuJMaHlYEMkbL0F0IoprLOpfwlo1_zixsguA%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJyaYm9zLMA6LEBqoj0JCtP6kjy1y8KcQtKbDtlXBGRJI9drZW3JSATPSInCpiKlx9iChS2iJprxueqeD_rFs5hC4BtoNB6xFtQAQZOxGnXMh6EvAFhrO4BPYiVWBynJc4XfLAsPcbVhfxtp5c9Pm-lhZDFGcB_d6RYYCBiNgqGtzVA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJyYnmP1uAoz9bNEX4AJCVPZxz95gQiEvt_m8U-kLhICUOOZ_kkfwxBJVz1xziV5hKZpbabfXB-lpXUZnihcPHTDYyfEqjvCS_o_wS1hKxSMIxUuXiZzMnlBCRl3kdrDRRgSm1mgAz-crIglNPnn10lslkveFYtWMALj5EwTqjIzh4A%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELogwDKaJCNSW773OHE0yuZ6_IZf9IwmelRjgma9xx-2P3ULRnBDW8pscsIZBfuQ2JRfnv2l1TDVrpqE1kB3v63wBMkIPxKNLW-jJT5qRX28GPurbc6XFnLZ2y1qP2VKeLyc_bJNITpHOCzqZgVDHdzZZQaFSuKNqE9OeRtEmIWogA0OYFDkCe4yFDcDZ_AJV-3gLacETzx5K3INqT1-SPJyYYiF7dlJtfcrFEThpNXUSODXP4ERQrFTNRAQWTsT7MB09HkZgufVpMmSzyjMAGX30k9Ne6r6G5MXXbKFEkALB8-iVzTbiybgALdM3JHxSJXmuddsZUGAaor9MvS8rQfB3kLbzMi7fQSXfQAQwoD29bwk81BRvKtGoIIHheKDXOAw%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_e=JyN8pG5sweU7UBB4nmELou-SKTcH3M4yvv9EMe9O5WzCP7P8AA8jp6sFHQ5HjJGWMv4cIb22Gti0hejOAkonR6Ow8hx-Lnm0cvyrpdjT09h3eZQz2K2AcI1Sv0ve2c1NDgOv1FcWMi09owdxx4GwyYC2TStKElnlnjjuimG90lDQfh-SWWWZW0g2KHbwxM01FhwH3HxgVQIlENF54jprXw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=8bbeac887d8b4db6970e6ada3d64ee0a&_t=DrqXMnJs_zOj1RB_xDgyA9MubgZ4UJEIFN-1h9bGRXOPxKzbp-gGpC10R7g_8eqJ8GA5OZwKwGAj6liWtsX9yPENE1Dxib7jTY1FbAvWf6aiCyMqjdaye3EAmAy3rDru)

So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click here to

body:
Our personal budgets, climate finance, and the effects of climate change

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..VuOma7YCJHG57WZx9Bnh3YpIMHi4WDnCww4p2Cd4AIk?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [It's all so intertwined](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151613211&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjEzMjExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1NDE4ODYsImV4cCI6MTczNDEzMzg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OiLfr-3uhbvseVkTIlHPEsP1WSTXStHNWRn7uyjCkOI)
### Our personal budgets, climate finance, and the effects of climate change
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151613211&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjEzMjExLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTU0MTg4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzM0MTMzODg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ol8jp4t97_IaeZBWZs6PxOdf8kGoQtYLcerpvInC-UU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151613211&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjEzMjExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1NDE4ODYsImV4cCI6MTczNDEzMzg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OiLfr-3uhbvseVkTIlHPEsP1WSTXStHNWRn7uyjCkOI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151613211&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjEzMjExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE1NDE4ODYsImV4cCI6MTczNDEzMzg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OiLfr-3uhbvseVkTIlHPEsP1WSTXStHNWRn7uyjCkOI)
---
| | [](https://substack..vx2olux1-KMki4gsvnCk7DeNTt3FHrRfRtHxCOyh9bY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/its-all-so-intertwined?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
### I remain hopeful that I will be on the ballot for the Special Election
This is a reminder that I am hoping to get the nomination from the 15 county chairs of New York 21 to be the candidate on the ballot for the 2025 Special Election. I am the most recent face the voters have seen and I have current momentum that is in play. For that matter, I know where the current lines are in the district. It's been a puzzle, believe me!
I am grateful to you for your support in the General Election in 2024. I hope that I can continue to build on that support. For now, the most effective means of tilting that decision in our favor is for you, as voters, to reach out to your respective county chairs and express your support.
### I really should be out campaigning for our climate
Really, as awful as the political news is, the climate news is worse.
Oh. I guess that did not help mood, did it?
All of Donald Trump's awful nominations to his new administration will be mere small talk for us if we don't wake up to the news of what is happening with the climate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06c4d2ce-b7ce-4c09-af3a-75204b2f1ad0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### COP29
The 29th Conference of the Parties to the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change (COP29), is taking place this year in Baku, Azerbaijan. [COP29 is in session from November 11-22, 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/15ae706b-e163-452f-b5a2-3d838f8db099?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Pause for a moment to reflect on a vision of my former opponent, Elise Stefanik, in Baku. (She isn't there now, but as the appointee to the UN Ambassadorship, she will be representing us at these kinds of events faster than any of us can say, "global warming".)
Compounding the multi-generational poverty that much of the population in New York-21 faces will be the climate injustices that are rife throughout the district.
Things like your roof getting blown off, and simply not having the money or the insurance to fix it.
A bridge getting destroyed in a flood, and your commute is suddenly an hour longer in each direction.
Colder winters, hotter summers, no insulation in your house, and no extra money to pay the utility bills.
### Upstate counties will start seeing more climate migrants from drought-ridden New York City
It rained last week in New York City, but not enough to get out of the drought watch. In fact, despite the rain, [the reservoirs are even lower than they were the prior week](https://substack.com/redirect/8fada621-f436-4aa8-b13c-2fed73714967?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The huge amount of water use per week in NYC (around a billion gallons of water daily) combined with the evaporation that naturally occurs, was not enough to balance the needs of the reservoirs to replenish.
We can't ignore this.
Restaurants need water. Many apartments in NYC are rented with the cost of water included. Once those prices start spiking you will see more migration of people from the city coming up to the comparatively cheaper counties upstate.
Wasn't it not that long ago that we saw a similar migration due to Covid?
But wait -- where will we put them? Several of our counties have fewer residential properties than ever due to recent floods and tornadoes.
### Climate Finance
[Climate finance](https://substack.com/redirect/c7812950-398b-4279-bf5a-37c6fb5f8530?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- that idea of making loans and funding available for remediation and resilience against the effects of climate change-- is not new. It's been talked about since 1992 and it is the focus of this year's COP29.
While it sounds like a chapter in a college economics textbook, the topic of climate finance will become increasingly relevant to how towns, cities, counties, and states can afford to build infrastructure to face the effects of climate change.
Climate finance has a deep connection to social justice. "While all people have inherent human rights to live and thrive, the lack of resources to limit and adjust to the impacts of climate change is pushing a decent life and even survival beyond reach for many." (See [this page](https://substack.com/redirect/c7812950-398b-4279-bf5a-37c6fb5f8530?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at UN.org.)
At this year's COP29, UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres shared the good news that for the first time in history, the amount of money invested into renewable energy overtook the amount spent on fossil fuels. Solar and wind have now officially become the cheapest sources of new electricity.
### But how does this play out in NY-21?
That may be good news to Guterres, but many people in NY-21 flatly disagree.
The interconnections of solar power and finance are complex in NY-21.
We had venture capitalists come in to places in Fulton, Schoharie, Lewis County and others and set up acres upon acres of solar panels. Unfortunately, those investors and operators did [not hold themselves accountable](https://substack.com/redirect/45a78165-c77c-476d-8b7e-3e59267cc281?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the communities in which they set up shop. The environmental impact -- primarily on water supply and rock formations -- has been devastating to some communities on several different levels.
The land in many counties in NY-21 is far less expensive than elsewhere in the country. But when farm land is converted to solar farm land, the property tax valuation changes. The result is that counties then have far fewer dollars flowing in, further depressing local economies. [A group of towns in Schoharie County have filed suit against the valuation methods. ](https://substack.com/redirect/f1b64271-70ba-4af1-bbce-7c2655dff19e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The other collateral consequence is that the lower tax value placed on the solar farm drives the valuations of other neighboring properties down. Soon all land values in the surrounding area are depressed. A family's greatest financial asset -- literally the family farm -- gets devalued because of the renewable energy project at the next farm down the road.
State and local governments should tune in to the discussions on climate finance. There is an answer and a path forward somehow, some way. But it will take lots of dialogue and local and state tax code changes.
### What else did they say at COP29?
COP29 will be ongoing until November 22, 2024. But so far, Guterres outlined these three action steps:
1. Make emergency emissions reductions - cutting emissions by nine per cent every year towards 43 per cent of 2019 levels by 2030. This is the clearest path to limiting global temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
2. Do more to protect people from the ravages of the climate crisis. The gap between adaptation needs and finance could reach up to $359 billion a year by 2030. The missing dollars are not abstractions on a balance sheet: they are lives taken, harvests lost, and development denied.
3. Tear down the walls to climate finance by agreeing a new finance goal that contains a significant increase in concessional public finance; a clear indication of how public finance will mobilise the trillions of dollars developing countries need; taps innovative sources; sets out a framework for greater accessibility, transparency, and accountability; and boosts lending capacity for bigger and bolder multilateral development banks. (See [this page](https://substack.com/redirect/213da95b-10d2-4d5a-aa5d-d98adc6a856d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at UN.org)

### The voters told us it was the economy
The lesson I learned from the 2024 election was that I needed to believe voters when they said that [their top issue is the economy](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/lets-not-gaslight-the-voters-on-the?r=3g6fcu&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web).
Most people really only care about having food on the table, gas in the car, and enough money in the checking account to pay rent or the mortgage.
Democrats did exactly that when President Biden delivered three separate Covid stimulus checks to the people, in addition to helping out with unemployment checks, and relief checks for small businesses and self-employed people.
### Our next crisis might be a climate crisis. And for that, we need a plan.
Instead of a pandemic, our next crisis -- or really the crisis that hurricane survivors, wildfire evacuees, and flood victims have already experienced, is a climate crisis.
The poor and middle class will catch the brunt of this.
I'm talking about the farmers who would lose crops due to too much flood water or too little rain. Send me to Congress and I will work to get the Farm Bill, which includes vital provisions for crop insurance, in it.
I'm talking about the hourly wage earners who rent a small manufactured home, but who won't have enough money for a deposit if they suddenly have to move because their home was damaged in a storm. Send me to Congress and I will work to raise wages and create sustainable low-income housing.
I'm talking about the homeowners who just did not have the money to reinforce the retaining wall before a mud slide destroyed their car. Send me to Congress and I will make sure that we create climate financing at the individual homeowner level to avert this crisis before it has hit.
If you are still getting to know me, part of my story is that I lived most of my life on the Gulf Coast. I worked at home, teaching piano lessons and homeschooling my child. I developed a plan to leave the Gulf Coast when I lost income and had to incur debt in order to evacuate multiple times during the hurricane seasons, and then could not get back to my home because the roads were blocked because the grocery shelves were empty, and there was no electricity -- for 14 days. The hit to the pocketbook is real.
We need a climate plan that makes communities and infrastructure more resilient, and that offers climate financing to every day homeowners and renters.
### Meanwhile, in one week of the Trump transition...
Meanwhile, Trump's appointment of two New Yorkers should give us little hope of heeding the call from UN Secretary Guterres at COP29. Example one: the appointment of [Lee Zeldin as head of the Environmental Protection Agency.](https://substack.com/redirect/d92e53ae-62ed-459a-9ef8-fa668f55d4ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Casey Wetherbee, in [Jacobin](https://substack.com/redirect/296de21b-b79d-4c69-b4e2-aeacbd5e37b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), released an article about Zeldin's new appointment. It's not good. Wetherbee interviewed Peter Bauer, the executive director of the group Protect the Adirondacks, who [said](https://substack.com/redirect/22453bf6-3e49-49e1-8190-77eb761db051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> I expect Lee Zeldin to be very zealous in gutting the Environmental Protection Agency. I don't think that since the EPA has been around over the last fifty years, I don't think we have ever encountered a leader of that agency who will be so strongly at odds with its historic mission and wants to completely change its role in public policy and environmental policy. I think the combination of Zeldin and Trump is very worrying on a lot of levels.
### Avoidable injustice
Back to COP29, the [UN coverage](https://substack.com/redirect/213da95b-10d2-4d5a-aa5d-d98adc6a856d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said this: "In the global economy, supply chain shocks raise costs - everywhere: Decimated harvests push up global food prices; destroyed homes increase all insurance premiums."
"This is a story of avoidable injustice: The rich cause the problem, the poor pay the highest price," stated the UN chief, noting that Oxfam has found that the richest billionaires emit more carbon in an hour and a half than the average person does in a lifetime.
"Unless emissions plummet and adaptation soars," he emphasized that "every economy will face far greater fury."
### It is vital that we have Representatives in Congress who are aware of the interplay between our personal budgets, climate finance, and the effects of climate change.
When I go to Congress I will be one such Representative.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
